- Alongside the Recon Log Mek, this was one of the first new-type clockwork meka to be made (though of course, after hundreds of years, no one refers to them as "new-type" anymore — this was simply to differentiate them from traditional clockwork mechanisms that were powered by potential energy.)\nIt was named to commemorate a friend of its inventor, and was originally designed to help people. However, its ability to attack people — thereby avoiding the need to put friendly personnel at risk — subsequently came to be seen as its real strength. ｜ 与「侦察记录型」一样，是最早设计制造的新式发条机关机械之一（数百年后的如今已经无人将其称为「新式」。这在当时是用以区分传统发条势能动力的机械机关用的说法）。\n名称是用来纪念发明者的友人而起的，最初设计的目的是帮助人。但后来的使用者普遍认为用它攻击人较之用人攻击人的相对优势更大。

- A noble and elegant bird, with a pair of broad wings and long, slender legs, nicknamed the "Toothless Saurians." Despite the fearsome connotation of its moniker, the Red Flamingo is of a remarkably gentle disposition, often seen frolicking at the water's edge with other animals in the Serenitea Pot. However, due to its appearance, which bears a resemblance to the Qucusaurus from certain angles, some creatures hold a peculiar fearful reverence for the Red Flamingo... ｜ 高贵优雅的鸟类，生着宽阔的双翼与修长的腿，有着「无牙之龙」的绰号。尽管绰号听起来颇为凶猛，但赤鹳实际上性格非常温和，经常会跟「尘歌壶」内的其他动物一起在水岸边玩耍。不过，由于它某些角度下形似「绒翼龙」的外表，一些动物对赤鹳抱有了独特的敬畏之心…

- The moment the "determination" within your heart is finally fully expressed, you will be able to unsheathe that greatest of blades from the depths of your heart, and use your honed will to defeat even the strongest of foes. ｜ 当你完全释放心中「锐意」的那一刻，你就能彻底拔出心底至强的那柄剑，锐不可当地击败强敌。
- You're giving Delusions to the resistance... ｜ 你们把邪眼分发给反抗军…
- Valley Residence: Custom Complexity ｜ 秀谷良居-「繁简由心」
- Paimon's sorry! Please have mercy, Navia! If you do that, then Paimon really won't be able to sleep at all! ｜ 对不起，对不起，那真要睡不着了！
- I haven't heard anything new about the Fatui. But don't worry. I may be a lowly tone-deaf bard, but you may contact me whenever you need me. ｜ 我也没听说任何有关愚人众的新消息。不过别担心，虽然我只是个卖唱的，必要时也可以联系我。
- A proud crown that once belonged to the Viridescent Venerer. It is as lush and green as the breezes of the wild. ｜ 曾属于绿野猎人的骄傲头冠，如同原野之风一般青翠。
- Hehe, it's pretty long, huh? ｜ 嘿嘿，很长呢。
- Yeah, I don't know what we can do about it either... ｜ 是啊，不知道怎么办才好呢。
- Defeat various powerful opponents in the Shinryuu battles. As long as your mind believes in it, you too can become "the strongest in Teyvat." ｜ 在「心流」的战斗中，征服各式各样的强敌。只要能在自己的心中成立，谁都可以成为「提瓦特最强」。
- You're studying architecture to make Mora? ｜ 你们学建筑就是为了赚钱？
- Read "Evolution of Ancient Literature" ｜ 阅读《古代文字演化》
- But at least that kid's not— ｜ 不过这样的话，那孩子总算是不会…
- "We'll ask Sonny to treat us to roast chicken next time."\nSo says Turner as he walks away with Hunter. ｜ 「下回再让桑尼大哥请我们吃烤鸡。」\n特纳说着，带着亨特离开了。
- Okay, story time. So, whenever Kouichi brings one of his friends from the trade association to see me, they always mention how they used to play with me when I was a kid, or held me once as a baby, or something. ｜ 说起来，耕一每次带着商会的朋友来看我，他的朋友都会说小时候陪我玩，还抱过我的事。
- And how might I address you, Sir, as well as your... ｜ 请问先生怎么称呼，还有这位…
- ..."The years may erode all, yet the Millelith shall never be moved." ｜ …「纵岁月消磨，唯千岩不动。」
- Our suffering will not soon be forgotten, but there will come a day when we can proudly declare to our progeny that this war is won! ｜ 漫长的苦难会永远地成为我们的记忆。但终有一日，我们可以挺起胸膛，自豪地告诉我们的后辈——我们已经战胜了它。
- I'm not worried. ｜ 我有自信。
- Uh, N—Nothing! ｜ 没什么！
- You're not going to see us off? ｜ 你不来亲自送送我们？
- Oh, yeah! Abyssal power kept surging out! If Chasca hadn't destroyed the stone, Vichama would have been consumed by the Abyss. ｜ 对啊，深渊力量一直往外冒，要不是恰斯卡果断地破坏了「灵觉髓石」，维查玛恐怕就被完全侵蚀了。
- Thanks for the treat, Director. ｜ 多谢堂主款待。
- About Petrichor's customs... ｜ 关于佩特莉可镇的风俗…
- Nacker ｜ 纳克
- They scared you that bad, huh? Looks like they really do have a knack for spooking people. ｜ 居然能把你吓成这个样子，看来它们在吓人方面确实有一套。
- You've seen "Worshiping Adepti" and "Exorcising Demons" so many times already. Haven't you got tired of it? I want to see the part where the Bravebeard goes home to see his sister. ｜ 《拜仙》和《缚鬼》都看了好多遍了，你不腻吗？我选虬髯公回家看妹妹那段。

- How is this even possible... ｜ 怎么这样…

- Sky-ripping Dragon Spine ｜ 斩裂晴空的龙脊
- ...Bye. ｜ …再见。

- We did not arrive in time to avert this disaster, and I will not have it happen again. ｜ 这次我们没来得及阻止，我不会允许再有下一次。
- I wouldn't say no to that. ｜ 有点兴趣。

- That's what everyone was saying... But surprisingly, after just six months, no one would dine in his restaurant anymore. ｜ 他周围的人也是这么想的，但没想到，才过了半年，这家店就无人问津啦！
- The equipping character gains <color=#99FFFFFF>104%</color> of their Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK. When an Elemental Skill hits opponents, the Dream of the Scarlet Sands effect will be gained for 10s: The equipping character will gain <color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color> of their Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK. Max 3 stacks. ｜ 基于装备者元素精通的<color=#99FFFFFF>104%</color>，获得攻击力加成。元素战技命中敌人时，将产生持续10秒的「赤沙之梦」效果：基于装备者元素精通的<color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color>，获得攻击力加成，该效果至多叠加3层。

- I'd better go buy some colored cloth for my Dad now. He needs it for Turnfire Night. Let's play again some other time. ｜ 现在我要去给爸爸买回火夜要用的彩布了，我们以后有机会再一起玩吧。
- Obtained from an event ｜ 活动兑换获取。

- We managed to rescue her! ｜ 我们拯救了神明。
- ...You won't kick me out, right? ｜ 可别赶我走哦？
- The original purpose of the golden castellum was to unify our surviving kin and prevent the catastrophe of the rising waters from ever occurring again. But evidently, Boethius had his own designs... ｜ 建立黄金城堡的初衷，是为统合幸存的同族，避免高海吞没大地的悲剧再度上演。但波爱修斯显然有他自己的想法…

- A small crystal obtained from a defeated Fontemer Aberrant.\nFontemer Aberrants arise from Fontaine's sea. They are believed to be a unique life form born from the mysterious energy in the water. ｜ 击败原海异种后，从其体内取得的细小晶体。\n原海异种依托枫丹的「海」而生，推测是因为水中奇异的能量而形成独特形态的生命体。
- Sorry, which place is where now? Paimon didn't understand you at all! ｜ 什么呀…完全看不出哪里是哪里！
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- An intricately-made cup. Its appearance betrays nothing of its age to an observer. ｜ 从外观无从断定经历了多少岁月的精致杯盏。
- At this point, I cannot let the efforts of this benefactor go to waste! They must have left the bait to inspire me, not to give me a completed product for me to copy and rely on. ｜ 事已至此，我不能辜负那位大师的良苦用心！大师给我留下鱼饵，一定是为了启发我，而不是让我依赖现成的东西。
- Huai'an of Wangshu Inn is trying to fix the other crack in the inn staircase, and he's looking for someone to help him... ｜ 望舒客栈的淮安想要修理客栈楼梯上的另一道断口，正在找人帮忙…
- Oh! I know who you're talking about. It's the girl with the really big hat! ｜ 噢！你说她啊，我记得，那个帽子很大的女孩。
- I think that'll do me for today. ｜ 今天就到这里吧。
- Paimon, Traveler, you came at just the right time! Listen, there was a dangerous— ｜ 派蒙和旅行者，你们来得正好。听我说，刚才很危险…

- Looks like you've succeeded. Congratulations. ｜ 看样子你成功了，恭喜。
- Though Captain Beidou says that she doesn't blame me, I can't help but feel guilty inside. ｜ 大姐头说不会怪罪我，但我的心里还是很不好受。
- Want to eat... ｜ 想吃…
- Which means they were afraid of us, too... And if that's the case, then there shouldn't be anything to worry about. ｜ 说明它们也在害怕我们，这么一想，我就冷静下来了。
- That's where you're rating surfing too low! "Winning hearts is as hard as conquering the tides" — bet you're remembering that famous quote from the great hero Uenuku right about now! ｜ 哼哼，可不要小看冲浪了！「征服人心难如征服潮水」，大英杰乌努库的这句格言，两位想必也不由自主地回忆起来了吧！
- Ah, my apologies. I've let myself get a bit carried away... You should get back to your business. ｜ 哎呀，抱歉抱歉，拖着你聊了这么多，你也该去忙别的事情了吧。
- Then, it changes when it is sung for different memories and different stories, just like how a great river diverges into creeks. ｜ 后来，又因为不同的记忆、不同的故事，所以唱出来以后，发生变化。就像河流变成小溪。
- I'm curious about your dream, but it's my duty to bring you back. ｜ 我对你的梦挺感兴趣的，但我得先把你带回去，这是我的任务。
- Where's the manual? ｜ 说明书在哪里？
- *sigh* That's why I was... so nervous just now. I truly am sorry. Maybe I have become what they call "paranoid" now. ｜ 唉，所以我才…这么紧张，真是不好意思。用人家的话来说，我简直有「被害妄想」了。

- !!! ｜ ——！——！

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nPut some spring in your step and your "discovery" glasses on, it's time to say "hi" to our animal friends!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and complete the quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nUse the Inscribed Mirror near the signs left behind by Lamiya to connect to devices and see what the adopted animals see, getting information about where they are so you can find them. Then, go say hi to your animal friends, and claim the gifts prepared by the mysterious adopters! ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n放轻脚步，睁开发现的眼睛，和我们的动物朋友打个招呼吧！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级，并完成以下前置任务：「巨龙与自由之歌」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n在拉米雅留下的标记牌附近使用铭随流镜，通过铭随流镜链接的装置，能够看到被认养的小动物视角内的事物，利用获得的画面信息，找到它们所在的位置。然后和你的动物朋友打个招呼，领取其他神秘认养人准备的礼物吧。

- The Withering ｜ 死域
- Elder Leik happened to be teaching the day that Kinich showed up to school as agreed. The Elder stood at the center of a circle of seated students and motioned for Kinich to find a place to sit.\nKinich sat at the circle's outer edge, the other kids looking him up and down inquisitively. The Scions of the Canopy lived simply for the most part, but even amongst them, Kinich was shabbily dressed.\nBarefoot, he wore an ash-stained headband, a coarse handmade linen shirt, and an animal-skin skirt, making him look like a wild child indeed.\n"Why don't you wear shoes?" A young girl called out. "Because he's a muddy monkey from the forest," jeered a strong-looking lad and his friends.\nElder Leik immediately coughed to interrupt them and signal that class was about to start.\n"Now, children, today we shall speak of our heroes and their sagas. Can anyone tell me their names?"\n"'Malipo' Burkina!" "Master Yupanqui!" ... The answers rolled forth from the children in waves.\n"That's right. Every one of our heroes deserves to be remembered, not only for their strength, but also for their spirit of self-sacrifice."\nAt this moment, Kinich raised his hand from where he sat, furthest beyond the circle. "Why would they want to sacrifice themselves?"\n"There is no particular why or wherefore. That is simply a virtue innate to heroes," the Elder replied. "And what did this virtue get them in return?" Kinich asked again.\n"Virtue is a thing beyond price. It cannot be exchanged for anything, for it is a reward from the heavens."\n"A reward?" Kinich's doubts had not been assuaged. "What sort of reward, exactly? Fame? Mora?"\n"All these, of course, but they were not the key. The key is virtue itself, for it is the basis of noble character, and that is what makes a hero a hero."\nThe old scholar closed his book and gave Kinich an earnest look, though the boy had not particularly understood this statement. Instead, he was thinking back on the past—\nThe mountains told him that the forest boar was the noblest of things, for it could fill his stomach. The next noblest was water, for without it, humans would die of thirst.\nBut neither of these were his birthright, and that made them precious. Thus, when he gave them up, he would seek something in return.\nMora was the "something" he preferred best, for it could be exchanged for many other things.\nAnd so he told Elder Leik, "If I become a hero, I want to be rewarded with Mora."\nHow the other children laughed then, the boy who had mocked Kinich foremost amongst them. "Why don't you go back and swing in your trees then, selfish mud monkey?"\nBut his little gang was not satisfied with just this. Standing up, they squeezed Kinich out the door. Though Elder Leik tried to stop them, Kinich took the opportunity to leave all the same. He felt no need to stay there any longer, for his keen mind had caught onto a certain truth—\nThese noisy brats in the Lodge were just that — brats. As they gathered to heap praise upon the heroes, it must have seemed to them that they had become the companions of those heroes, sharing in their nobility. But such false glory would not teach them how to fill their tummies. Once school was over, every single one of them would have to return home and be fed by their mothers.\nKinich could have taught them a lesson right there, too. Laid a couple out for half a month or so, just to let them know how far they were from being heroes.\nBut what use was there in giving out free life lessons... emphasis on "free"?\nStill, this class was not an entirely fruitless endeavor. If nothing else, he now had some answers to his doubts.\nHe knew what he must do in the future. Become a hero — for the Mora, that is. ｜ 当基尼奇依照交易来上课的那天，讲课的老学者正是利克长老。他站在学生围坐的圆圈中央，示意基尼奇找一个位置坐下。\n基尼奇坐在了圈子的外围，其他孩子好奇地打量这位新同学。虽然悬木人的生活大多朴素，但基尼奇的打扮还是过于简陋了。\n他额头绑着染灰的布带，上身是手工活很粗糙的编织麻衣，下身是兽皮裙，光着脚，像个野人。\n「你为什么不穿鞋？」一个小女孩好奇地问。另一个壮硕的男孩和他的小伙伴们哄笑出来：「因为他是住在树林里的泥巴猴子。」\n利克长老立刻用咳嗽声打断了他们，示意现在要上课了。\n「孩子们，今天我们来讲悬木人的英雄史，有谁能告诉我他们的名字？」\n「马力卜的布基纳！」「尤潘基大人！」…孩子们的回答此起彼伏。\n「没错，我们的每个英雄都值得铭记，不仅因为他们的强大，还因为他们的自我奉献。」\n听到这里，最远处的圈外，基尼奇也举起了手：「他们为什么要自我奉献？」\n「不为什么，那是英雄与生俱来的美德。」利克长老回答。「那他们用美德换来了什么？」基尼奇又问。\n「美德很珍贵，它不是用来交换的，它本身就是上天的奖赏。」利克长老微笑地看着基尼奇。\n「奖赏？」基尼奇的疑惑还没有解决，「具体有什么奖赏？名望？摩拉？」\n「都有，但都不是重点，重点在于，它本身即为崇高，使英雄成为英雄。」\n老学者合上书，认真地看着基尼奇，但基尼奇不是特别理解，他想起从前的事——\n群山告诉他，最崇高的东西是林猪，它能使肚子变饱；其次是水，没有水，人就会渴死。\n但它们都不是与生俱来的，所以它们很珍贵，如果自己要拿出珍贵的林猪和水，那肯定得换回些什么。\n他最喜欢换的是摩拉，因为摩拉还可以拿去换别的。\n于是他告诉利克长老：「如果我成为英雄，我想要获得摩拉的奖赏。」\n孩子们纷纷笑起来，之前嘲讽基尼奇的那个男孩笑得最大声：「那你还是回林子里荡秋千去吧！自私的泥巴猴子。」\n他的小团体似乎还没有满意，他们站起来，把基尼奇往门外挤了个趔趄，虽然利克长老立刻喝止了他们，但基尼奇还是顺势往外走去。他感觉自己不用继续待在这里了，他敏锐的小脑袋发现了一个真相——\n屋子里这群吵闹鬼都还只是些小屁孩，他们聚在一起吹捧英雄，好像这样自己就成了英雄的同伴，和英雄拥有同等的崇高，但这种虚假的荣耀不能教会他们填饱肚子，等到放学后，他们还得各自回到自己的家里跟妈妈讨吃的。\n基尼奇本也可以给他们一点教训尝尝，比如一拳让他们躺上半个月，让他们知道自己离英雄还有多远。\n但他又觉得自己没必要白白让他们增长人生经验，毕竟他们没付钱。\n不过他也觉得这堂课不算完全白来，至少他的疑问得到了些许的解答。\n未来要怎么样呢？去成为英雄吧，为了获得摩拉的奖赏。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- #But anyway, didn't Paimon tell you? {NICKNAME}'s super strong! ｜ #怎么样，我就说，{NICKNAME}是很强的！
- Bye. ｜ 嗯，再见。
- Music... very nice. But... don't understand. ｜ 琴声…很好听。但演奏…不明白。
- <color=#FFE14BFF>Amur Maple</color>\nA slender tree that sways with fan-shaped leaves red as fire. It's vibrant color paints the mountainside in red and is often quoted in poem and song as the symbol of late autumn.\nAmur Maples can be found dotting the landscape of <color=#FFE14BFF>Narukami Island</color> and other places. Cut an Amur Maple down to obtain <color=#FFE14BFF>Maple Wood</color>. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>「羽扇枫」</color>\n形姿婆娑的树木，叶片赤红如灼，形似羽扇，明艳的色彩足以染红群山，常被诗句歌咏为深秋的象征。\n「羽扇枫」极少的分布于<color=#FFE14BFF>「鸣神岛」</color>等地，砍伐「羽扇枫」可以获得<color=#FFE14BFF>「枫木」</color>。
- That's right! Ms. Hina is the person in charge of "That's Life" magazine's advice column. She is the one we all admire and adore so greatly. ｜ 没错！希娜小姐就是《闲事月刊》问答栏目的负责人，也是我们一直敬仰和崇拜的人。
- Stay safe. ｜ 一路平安。

- *sigh* The robbery took everything from us. We can't just let that slide. So, I'm taking my men to confront them, and get back some of what they stole, at least. ｜ 哎，东西全被抢光，我们实在咽不下这口气，本来打算叫上几个兄弟去和那劫匪拼了，再不济也能夺回些货来的…

- #If the goal was only to follow the rules and move about on the stone piles, then I'm sure {NICKNAME}'s agility would have made short work of it. ｜ #如若只打算循规蹈矩，在石桩之上闪转腾挪，以{M#少侠}{F#女侠}矫捷的身法，想必也是易如反掌吧。

- A fixed torch prominently featured in the Grand Wrestling Grounds of the Collective of Plenty, crafted with Flammabomb Wood and metal components. The term "Extremity" originates from the title of the "Grand Wrestling Extreme Champion," a legendary combatant who, in a single day, triumphed over thirty consecutive challengers, marking the first recorded nighttime matches in the arena's history. The torches that were ignited to illuminate the matches that night were later renamed "Extremity" in honor of this formidable wrestler, and their legacy lives on to this day. ｜ 以「燃爆木」和金属构件制成的固定式火炬，可见于「沃陆之邦」的大摔角场。据说，「极限」一词来自于「大摔角极限冠军」这一头衔。该头衔的拥有者曾在一天之内接连打败三十名挑战者，使得摔角场首次有了夜战的战例。而当时为照亮大摔角场所点亮的火炬也为了纪念这位摔角手，被改名为了「极限」并流传至今。

- An ancient greatsword that gleams like the waters themselves. A thousand years of sand erosion has not dulled its unnaturally sharp edge one bit. ｜ 一柄光泽如水的古老大剑，经过千年流沙磨洗，锋刃依然锐利异常。

- A watchtower like the ones seen in the Kujou Encampment. It has excellent sightlines that allow it to survey the surrounding areas clearly, but it does lack some cover and defensive capacity, and you never know when an arrow with your name on it will come flying in from afar. Additionally, it can be tricky for soldiers wearing heavy armor to climb up and down the tower, so some just prefer to jump down. After all, who knows? You might just injure yourself in the process and get to report sick. ｜ 九条阵屋式样的哨塔，拥有良好的视野，足以清晰监控周边情势，但缺乏遮挡和防护。值守的士兵可能被远射而来的箭矢点名。此外，身着重甲的士兵上下哨塔较为麻烦，有的士兵宁愿直接从哨塔侧面一跃而下，如果走运摔伤了腿，正好能抱伤避战。

- Honey-roasted fowl. The honey and sweet flowers come together to complement the tender fowl meat. ｜ 蜜酿后烤熟的禽肉。细嫩的禽肉里渗着甜甜花的丝丝蜜汁，香甜可口。
- Merusea Village ｜ 海沫村
- Yes, they weren't optimistic about the potential return on investment. Plus... I don't know, there seemed to be some other risks they were worried about. ｜ 嗯，其实是投资人认为这个主题回报率太低，而且…他们好像还在担心别的风险。
- Th—Thank you, thank you! May your business forever be blessed by the Lord of Geo! ｜ 太、太谢谢你们了！愿你们的生意永远有岩王爷庇佑！

- Leaderboard ｜ 排行榜
- Vacher... Why did you come... Didn't I say... You don't need to look for me... ｜ 瓦谢…你怎么来了，我说过…不需要你来的…
- That's true! We've already accomplished some really amazing things, and it wouldn't be exaggerating to say that we're living legends! ｜ 确实哦！在一般的冒险家看来，我们两个已经取得很厉害的成就了，说是冒险家中的传奇也不过分吧！
- So I guess that your land is either in Liyue or in Mondstadt. ｜ 想必您的封地不是在璃月，就是在蒙德吧。
- I didn't do anything, but it's just that... I really think they're going to fire me. ｜ 我倒是没闯什么祸啦，但就是…觉得自己要被开除了。
- Um... Or... Why don't you pick a card? Since I ran into you here, that means, uh... our fates are, like... interfering with each other... ｜ 啊…或者，你也来抽一张？既然在这遇到了你，那我们的命运就…唔…产生了干涉…
- Yeah, but now a leaf covered in Anemo has found its way to an Inazuma-styled mountain, and Shibasuke is missing. That means... ｜ 嗯，可是现在带有风元素的叶子到了稻妻风格的山上，柴助不见踪影，也就是说…
- Switch between Whitenight and Evernight once. ｜ 转换一次「白夜」与「常夜」。
- Ah! Looks like we interrupted their art-appreciation session... ｜ 呜啊！看来我们打扰到它们的艺术鉴赏了…
- Beauteous Beryl Conch ｜ 漂亮的苍晶螺
- Life at the Society is rich and fulfilling. We all enjoy it immensely. ｜ 「檐帽会」的生活丰富多彩，我们都很享受。
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}

- Yep, we're family now. We're gonna be together for ever and ever! ｜ 嗯，我们已经是家人了，要一直一起哦！

- Where does his confidence come from, though... If we hadn't helped him out, he'd still be stuck in the secret chamber! ｜ 不过，他到底哪来的信心…要是没有我们帮他，他早就困在遗迹的密室里了。
- Haha, guess I've been feeling unlucky recently and wanted the God of Hot Pot's blessing. ｜ 哈哈，其实我总觉得最近运气不太好，需要火锅之神的庇佑来转转运。
- "You too will experience this suffering." ｜ 「将痛楚…与你分享。」
- I agree. It does, but considering that non-human races in Inazuma are by no means uncommon, spooky events are to be expected... And that's exactly what my book is about — please, take a look. ｜ 不错，我也这么想。但考虑到稻妻确实存在非人种族，发生一些怪异事件也很正常，所以，我写出了这部作品——请看。
- When an attack hits an opponent, deal AoE DMG equal to <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color> of Max HP at the target's location. This effect can be triggered once every 15s. ｜ 攻击命中敌人时，在目标位置基于生命值上限的<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>，造成范围伤害。该效果每15秒至多触发一次。
- Is it your eyes? ｜ 视力不好吗？

- This part's important. I just wanted to make it stand out. ｜ 这里很重要，所以强调一下嘛。
- If you're worried about getting tired, I can just fly you straight to the top. ｜ 嫌累的话，要直接飞到山上吗？
- Come on, don't be discouraged. You just need to get well, and... keep trying! You'll make it to the mountaintop in no time! ｜ 乖乖喔，不要灰心，只要你身体好了，然后…加油学习！一定能很快爬到山顶的！
- Mmm! Stones heavy enough! ｜ 呶！石头够重！

- Perhaps this... might come in handy. ｜ 也许…这个能派上用场。

- A ceremonial cup that holds the blood of the innocent. It is brimming with the thundering fury of the prayers that echo within. ｜ 注入无辜者鲜血的祝圣的仪式之杯，祈愿雷鸣回荡其中。最终溢满了如雷的盛怒。
- #Anyway, guess it's time to talk about business after all that drinking. {NICKNAME}, you came here because you need my help, I presume? ｜ #喝了这么多杯，也该聊聊正事了。{NICKNAME}你找我一定有重要的事，对吧？
- Why not learn a few more dishes? ｜ 为什么不学做新菜？
- I'm sorry, I know you mean well, but I really need to wait for it to cool off before I eat it. ｜ 不好意思啊。明明是你的一片心意，我却只能放凉再吃…

- Go to the Stadium of the Sacred Flame ｜ 前往圣火竞技场
- I am truly delighted to see you find a new lease on life. ｜ 能见到你振作起来，我也由衷感到高兴。

- What do you mean? I always dress like this when I'm chopping firewood... ｜ 有什么问题吗？我在劈柴时也是穿这身的…
- My responsibilities increase with every passing day... ｜ 我的责任内容，真是与日俱增啊…

- Ah, there is truly no hope for me... Why did I... Oh, Archons, why did I do those things... ｜ 我真是无药可救…为什么我之前…天哪…我之前做出了那种事…

- Cream ｜ 奶油

- Shh! You'll get me yelled at by my father... ｜ 可别乱说了！你别让我挨老爹骂了…
- If only there were some landmarks or lights along the way... ｜ 如果有什么标志，或者照明就好了…
- Brilliant Blessings will grant considerable buffs to characters who meet the requirements for this season, enhancing their effectiveness in combat via <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reactions</color>.\nSelect Brilliant Blessing events continuously to <color=#FFE14BFF>increase your Blessing Level</color> and further enhance the corresponding Elemental Reaction buffs. ｜ 「辉彩祝福」将为符合本期参演条件元素的角色提供可观的增益，加强这些角色通过<color=#FFE14BFF>元素反应</color>进行战斗的效率。\n通过不断选择「辉彩祝福」事件，可以<color=#FFE14BFF>提升祝福的等级</color>，加强对应元素反应类型的增益效果。

- And that's exactly why they mustn't ever find out. Once I've finally managed to acclimate to life in Sumeru City, I'll show them my success... I hope that day will come, eventually. ｜ 所以不能让他们知道，等我完全适应了须弥城的生活，再让他们看看我光鲜的样子…希望有这么一天吧。

- Guess we've got no choice. ｜ 唔…看来只能这样了吧。

- An adepti disciple with a most unusual air about her. Having spent much time cultivating in isolation in Liyue's mountains, she has become every bit as cool and distant as the adepti themselves. ｜ 气质出尘的仙家子弟。隐修在璃月群山之间，个性也如仙人般淡漠疏离。

- Alright, stop scaring people. If Beidou found out you were just tying up anyone who came in, you'd be the one being dealt with. ｜ 好了，你别吓唬人了，北斗姐要是知道你不分好坏随意绑人，非先料理了你不可。
- Something wrong? ｜ 怎么了？
- ...Save time. I've heard you say it so many times my brain is sore. The only time you don't care how long something takes is when you're telling stories — then you can keep talking from dusk till dawn. ｜ 节省「时间」…我听得脑袋都痛了。你只有讲故事的时候才不在乎你的时间，能从天黑讲到天亮。

- You mean my title as Fontaine Research Institute Materials Retrieval Project Director? *sigh* Please don't mock me so... ｜ 您是说「枫丹科学院文材回收组主任」这个头衔吗？唉，还请您别笑话我…

- A form of Phlogiston that resembles a gas.\nIn essence, it is still Phlogiston, and it contains massive amounts of heat, making it very dangerous. While in Wind Currents formed by gaseous Phlogiston or areas with large amounts of gaseous Phlogiston, you will be burned by the high temperatures.\nHowever, Qucusaurs and some tribespeople who have adapted to gaseous Phlogiston's high temperatures have mastered the art of using it without being burned. ｜ 形态犹如气体的燃素，\n本质上还是燃素，具备极高的热量，十分危险，在气态燃素形成的风场或在气态燃素富集区内会受到高温灼烧。\n不过绒翼龙与部分适应了气态燃素高温的部族成员，似乎拥有不被灼烧也能利用气态燃素的技巧。
- We just need to win one final battle... ｜ 只要打赢关键的一战…

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Cyno's super into that card game "Genius Invokation TCG," isn't he?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Doesn't it seem kinda weird for the General Mahamatra to be into playing cards...?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well... not when you consider his hairstyle.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? What has his hairstyle got to do with it?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>You know, when you're playing a card game, the fancier your hairstyle, the more distracting it is for your opponent.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>"What's going on with this guy? How did he manage to shape his hair like that?"\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>When your opponent's mind is consumed with thoughts like this, you'll quickly gain the upper hand.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hmm, really? Then we'd better think twice before playing against him...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I don't know... I think I might just have an advantage over him.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But you don't have a fancy hairstyle at all. And your clothes look pretty normal, too...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>But I do have Paimon.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>"What's up with her? And what's that pesky flying companion of hers up to?"\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>As long as Paimon is floating by my side, Cyno's mind will be consumed with thoughts like this.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I, on the other hand, would be completely unfazed by his hairstyle. So I'd be able to focus, and victory would be mine.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Forget it! If you wanna play cards, go get a funny haircut! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>话说，赛诺是不是特别喜欢玩那种叫做「七圣召唤」的牌类游戏来着？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>明明是「大风纪官」，却喜欢玩牌，真奇怪啊…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>看到他的发型之后我就一点也不奇怪了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？玩牌和发型有什么关系？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>在打牌的时候，越是夸张的发型就越能吸引住敌人的注意力。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「这家伙搞什么啊，这么夸张的发型到底是怎么梳出来的？」\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>让对手的脑子里都被这种想法填满之后，就可以在牌桌对决上占得先机了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>是这样吗？那我们以后还是别轻易和赛诺打牌了吧…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我倒是觉得，我和赛诺打牌会占得优势喔。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可是你的发型很普通啊，也没有穿奇怪的衣服…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但是我有派蒙啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「这家伙搞什么啊，后面飘着的那个小东西到底是干什么的？」\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>只要派蒙飘在我旁边，赛诺的脑子会被这种想法填满。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但我却不会对他的发型惊讶，这样子我就可以轻松抢得先机了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你还不如去弄一个特别的发型啦！

### Part 052

- If you ask someone in Fontaine about tailoring recommendations, there's a good chance that you'd either hear my name... ｜ 你若去询问枫丹哪位裁缝衣服做得好，那多半会提到我的名字。

- Each animal behaves in its own unique way. We don't lock them away in cages. Instead, we employ professional caretakers to monitor their physical condition. ｜ 每一只动物都有自己独特的习性，我们并不会把动物关在笼子里，而是雇佣专业的饲养人员跟踪监控它们的身体状况。

- Cowell planned to use the prepared apparatuses for the magic tricks to dissolve Halsey inside the magic box.\nAs "Halsey" has appeared completely unharmed before all of our eyes, Furina's conjecture no longer holds water.\nAnd <color=#60B4D2>how would "Halsey" have reacted</color> when the Water from the Primordial Sea suddenly began to trickle in? ｜ 考威尔使用预先准备好的魔术机关让海尔希在魔术箱中溶解。\n既然「海尔希」毫发无伤地出现在了众人面前，芙宁娜的推断显然不再成立。\n「原始胎海之水」落下之时，<color=#60B4D2>「海尔希」会作何反应呢？</color>

- Bounce ｜ 弹跳

- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- All I need you to do is keep him in your sight. Think you can manage that for me? ｜ 你只要负责看住他就行。如何，是不是一份美差？
- Also, don't worry about fees. I'm just helping out. ｜ 不用担心费用，顺手帮忙的事情。
- (A worn-out Yumkasaur. They don't look like they're in the mood to talk.) ｜ （有些疲惫的匿叶龙，看起来不怎么想说话。）
- That's weird, that device just appeared all of a sudden. ｜ 突然出现的机关…好像有蹊跷？
- Complete "A New Star Approaches" ｜ 完成「迫近的客星」剧情
- Hmm... ugh, what a headache. What should I have for lunch? Not Fried Tofu again, I'm in the mood for something a little lighter today. Ah — I know. I haven't seen the Yashiro Commission girl in a while. Let's get her to make us a little something. ｜ 嗯~伤脑筋，中午吃些什么呢？油豆腐吃腻了，想吃点清淡的。话说好久没见到社奉行家的小姑娘了，我们不如就去吃她做的点心吧。
- The main task of the Forest Watchers and Forest Rangers is to observe the state of the rainforest and protect travelers. ｜ 巡林官与巡林员的主要职责是监测雨林生态，保障旅客安全。
- Report back to Neko ｜ 向寝子回报
- Like the statue's shadow, transcending time, space, and dreamscapes alike... Ah, a shame that I did not have that dream myself. ｜ 就像是一个跨越了时空与梦境，附着在「石像」身后的「影子」…真可惜，我没有做那场梦。
- Of course, there was a happy accident involved... With Mr. Bossuet's departure from the Institute, there's no one left to reject my research plans! ｜ 当然，这也多亏了一个意外…那就是在博絮埃先生离开枫丹科学院之后，没人否决我的研究计划了！
- Li Ding ｜ 李丁
- Oh, neither good nor bad, really. But at least I no longer have any regrets. ｜ 不好不坏，但至少我不会后悔了。
- It is only because of our harsh environment and the slander and ostracism by the Akademiya that we have been reduced to this. ｜ 但是因为环境艰险，教令院的那些家伙又排斥污蔑我们的学说，才会变成现在这个样子。
- Strange... It's very unusual for such records to be so sparse on details. The scroll only vaguely alludes to two things. ｜ 奇怪，很少见到这样语焉不详的记述，织物上只隐晦地提到了两件事。
- Flowfrost Arrow DMG|{param1:F2P} ｜ 霜流矢伤害|{param1:F2P}
- That's a bit extreme... ｜ 这有点太极端了…
- So cool. Very big hands. ｜ 好帅，好大的手。
- How am I feeling? ...Was I unwell? ｜ 我的身体？我的身体怎么了么？
- The tail feather of a large bird. Perfect for discretely concealing a trump card. ｜ 大型鸟的尾羽，其中能藏得下能改天逆命的牌。
- Weapons ｜ 武器
- Tighnari's Hobbies ｜ 提纳里的爱好…
- Wow! So, did he make it? ｜ 呜哇！他没事吧？
- A Primo Geovishap awoken from a centuries-long slumber that can absorb different kinds of elemental power to unleash a Primordial Shower infused with Hydro, Pyro, Cryo, or Electro. If this attack hits a character protected by a <color=#FFE14BFF>shield</color>, the Primo Geovishap will take some DMG in return. If <color=#FFE14BFF>the shield's elemental type is Geo</color> or it <color=#FFE14BFF>matches that of the Primordial Shower</color>, the amount of reflected DMG will be increased... ｜ 从悠古的长眠中苏醒的古岩龙蜥，能汲取各种元素的力量，进行水、火、冰、雷四种元素的「原岩喷吐」攻击。当这种攻击命中受到<color=#FFE14BFF>护盾</color>庇护的角色时，古岩龙蜥会受到伤害反噬；如果<color=#FFE14BFF>护盾的元素属性与原岩喷吐的元素属性相同</color>，或者是<color=#FFE14BFF>岩元素护盾</color>，反噬的伤害会更加剧烈…

- (*sigh* I must do something to reassure my patients...) ｜ （唉，必须要让病人们再安心点才好啊…）
- Looks like someone beat us here... Is this, like, a popular tourist spot, or... ｜ 哎，有人先到了？这里是什么观光景点吗？

- Least Favorite Food ｜ 讨厌的食物…
- Athos's shirt, 1,000 Mora... Morticia's necklace... Tsk, tsk. Youngsters these days sure know how to spend. ｜ 阿托斯的衬衫一千摩拉…莫蒂西娅的项链…啧啧，现在的年轻人真会花钱啊。
- Aether's Shadow 02 ｜ 空哥影子02
- I know the way! But those Jibashiri just had to say that I got lost, and even scolded me for crying over a small matter... ｜ 我明明认得路的，地走官一定要说我走丢了，还凶我，说一点小事就哭实在太没出息…
- Boss, I got the veggies, but they're all out of Marcotte. ｜ 老板，菜都买回来了，但那家店里的茉洁草都卖光了。
- Lirio ｜ 莉莉尤
- No problem. ｜ 没问题。
- Do be careful if a pretty little house, delicious food, or golden Mora ever suddenly appear before you while you're in the mountain forest. ｜ 平时行走在山林中，若是看到漂亮的小屋、美味的食物或是金灿灿的摩拉，一定要多加留意哦。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4级后解锁

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- It's so nice here. The breeze is so comforting... Really lifts my mood. ｜ 这里很不错啊，风很舒服…感觉一下子心情好了很多呢。
- It doesn't look like treasure. ｜ 长得不太像宝藏。
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- #{NICKNAME}, you're the brighter spark here. What should we do next? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你脑子好，你说接下来怎么办？
- #Morning, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #早，{NICKNAME}。
- Leave it to me. ｜ 交给我吧。
- Simply put, every person prepares an ingredient to add to the hot pot. Once the meal begins, we add all the ingredients together. ｜ 简单来说，就是每个人准备不同的食材，一起放到锅里煮。
- I won't disturb you then. ｜ 不打扰你了。
- I've revised the rules and gameplay once... Uh, well, several times since then. ｜ 我对游戏规则和玩法进行了又一次…呃，准确来说是好几次的改进。
- This is a good spot, and the guard hasn't noticed us at all. Let's hurry... ｜ 这个位置不错，卫兵好像也完全没有注意到我们，那我们就快点…
- I'm actually more concerned about Merieux... When I mentioned Gillian, his reaction was pretty unusual. ｜ 倒是梅里埃刚才的态度，在提到吉莲的时候，有点不自然。
- Wish-Fulfilling Treasure Hunt ｜ 得偿所愿的寻宝之旅
- Can there really be no exceptions? ｜ 难道就没有任何例外吗？
- Share... croppers? How do those things even connect!? Are you trying to say that exchanging time for pay is a form of giving your time to others? ｜ 一点也不好！这和雇佣…佃农？有什么关系啦！你是想说，用时间换取报酬，也算是将时间交给别人吗？
- Let's go up. ｜ 往上走。
- Well, I mentioned before that people with ample free time are an important consumer base for my industry. But, actually, the same is true for people who are incredibly busy and overwhelmed with work. ｜ 之前我们提到了忙碌不休的群体，他们也是酒类消费者中无比重要的成员。
- Elemental flow in the region has increased ｜ 区域内的元素流动更加通畅了

- Um... you should still be careful... ｜ 唔…不过还是得小心吧…
- Let's pay a visit to Marjorie at With Wind Comes Glory. Roger broke his cat toy recently and I ordered him a new one there. ｜ 我们先去玛乔丽小姐那边一趟吧，罗杰之前又把它的玩具玩坏了，我在玛乔丽小姐那边新订了一个。
- Are you serious? ｜ 真的吗？

- Okay, that's a pretty strong oath... ｜ 发的誓倒还挺毒…
- Wonder what this year's theme is going to be. Oh, Paimon can't wait to find out... ｜ 不知道今年的主题会跟什么有关呢？真让人好奇呀…

- Wanna get some rest, Traveler? We have to head out again in a bit. ｜ 要休息了吗？等下还要赶去其他的地方。
- Once you've retrieved the adeptal energy-filled Votive Rainjade, we'll meet again by a deep pool shrouded in cloud and mist to the south. ｜ 待三位取回了充满仙力的祀珑，我们再在南方云集雾罩的深潭相会吧。

- Seems like an emergency. ｜ 病宜速救。
- Enjoying exciting competitions as a volunteer is also a great experience. ｜ 从志愿者的视角享受精彩的竞技，也是一种很不错的体验呢。

- The wine here tastes more bitter than those from Mondstadt, but I'm used to it now. ｜ 这里的酒啊，和我家乡的比起来普遍偏苦，但喝久了也就习惯咯！

- At a festival like this one... the more, the merrier. ｜ 嗯…大过节的，人多点总是好的。
- Let me see... ｜ 我看看…
- Huh? Why the hurry to get back to the Feiyun Commerce Guild? Don't tell us you have work to do, too... ｜ 行秋，你赶着回飞云商会，莫非是有什么工作吗？
- Oh! My analogy doesn't seem to be fitting... I'll have to come up with a better one next time. Anyway, I have nothing against the pigeons. I just wanted you to know how powerful the Spark Knight's weapons are! ｜ 啊！这说明我的比方不太形象，下次我会换个比喻…总之，我对鸽子没有成见！只是想让你们想象火花骑士大人的武器有多惊人！

- See? Humans are creatures full of lies. ｜ 看吧，人类就是这种谎话连篇的生物。

- Hey! Who's talking about me behind my back? ｜ 嘿！是谁在背后说我坏话呢？
- Preparing... ｜ 正在准备牌局…
- Even now, I don't believe I have fully grasped the nature of the threat that Dragonspine poses. ｜ 即使到现在，我也无法完全掌握雪山上的威胁。
- There were ill feelings between me and Samail, but I only regarded myself as an insignificant grain of sand. I did as Thutmose needed of me. ｜ 我和萨梅尔早有嫌隙，只是彼时我只当自己是一粒无足重轻的沙子，图特摩斯希望我这样做，我便执行。

- Are you two playing me for a fool here? ｜ 你们在耍我吗！
- Come see the kites! ｜ 来看看风筝吧！
- In addition, our special guest has the honor of announcing a "special award." Shogun, if you could... ｜ ——另外，还有一个临时设立的「特别奖项」，会由特邀嘉宾亲自颁布。

- A delicate and elegant snack. Its exterior looks fair enough, but its sickening sweetness almost causes it to get stuck in your throat, leaving you with no appetite for another. ｜ 细腻雅致的点心。外形尚可，但吃完一个后，过于甜腻的味道仿佛粘在喉头，让人没有胃口再吃下一个。
- But I think it must be quite easy to play a pirate. ｜ 但我觉得…这种人，应该挺好演的吧。

- Although her plans to grow taller have not gone smoothly, at least you helped her catch a glimpse of the future. ｜ 虽然长高之事并不顺利，但至少你能让她看到未来的风景。

- Maybe Melo was just bluffing, and she didn't actually put any treasure in the chests? ｜ 难道梅洛夫人是在吓唬报社？她根本没有把那些放进来？
- Event Cards played on this side of the field this Round will be invalid.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 1</color> ｜ 本回合中，所在阵营打出的事件牌无效。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：1</color>
- I don't get it now! ｜ 我又不懂了！
- Alright then. Let's head for the next floating Shadow Pin. I want to fix this issue and start writing by nightfall! ｜ 好了，我们到下一根浮起的「小缝影针」那边去吧，快些解决问题，我今晚就能开始动笔啦！
- Compared to the simple fact that I am afflicted with this, its effects on my life have been much more painful. ｜ 不过相比自己患有魔鳞病的事实本身，更让我痛苦的还是它对我的生活产生的影响。
- Elphane ｜ 欧菲妮
- Oh, but I bet you two are more worried about Karkata. Let's head back. ｜ 当然，我估计你们此时更关心卡卡塔在做什么。走，一起回去看看吧。
- But you must! It's your wages for YOUR work. It no longer belongs to me... and if you won't take it, I'm just going to consign this coin pouch to the waters. ｜ 必须收下，这是您由工作所获的报酬！这些钱已经不属于我，如果您不要，我就让钱袋子沉进水底去。
- Looks like you really are the cat's meow, eh, Razor? ｜ 看来雷泽真的「猫缘」很棒！
- Nameless Researcher's Notes (IV) ｜ 无名学者的记事·其四
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- I've had it with you! Do you think contracts are just bits of paper? ｜ 行了！你是真拿契约当废纸了？

- Wait, Dain... ｜ 啊，戴因…

- Paimon can't do that! ｜ 我怎么可能想变就变啦！

- Shoom-Shoom Shoes, Boom-Boom Bandoliers, and Crash-Clang Canisters are the three buff types that Dodoco can pick up. They boost Movement SPD, maximum bomb capacity, and explosion AoE. These buffs <color=#F39000FF>are hidden amidst the Steady-State Seagrass</color>. Additionally, Dodoco's improved <color=#F39000FF>attributes can be viewed in the status bar on the right</color>. ｜ 嘟嘟可可以通过拾取「快快跑鞋」、「掷弹背囊」和「薄壳炸弹」三种增益效果，分别提升移动速度、携带炸弹的数量和爆炸范围。这些增益效果<color=#F39000FF>隐藏在场上的均质水草之中</color>。此外，嘟嘟可获得提升的<color=#F39000FF>属性能够在右侧状态栏中查看</color>。
- Anyway, knowing who I am won't help you get closer to the truth, so you should focus on other things. Don't get distracted and miss any clues~ ｜ 好了，知晓我是谁并不会对你们了解真相有什么用处的，还是把注意力放在别处吧，当心漏掉什么线索哦。
- Sweating ｜ 汗
- Illusory Bubble Duration|{param1:F1}s ｜ 泡影持续时间|{param1:F1}秒
- Interesting... Well, good. Murasaki, go help Shion please. ｜ 果真如此…也好。阿紫，你该去帮白音了。
- Chiori ｜ 千织
- Increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. On hit, attacks against opponents with less than 30% HP increase all party members' ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color> for 12s. Can only occur once every 30s. ｜ 攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>；攻击命中生命值低于30%的敌人时，队伍中所有成员的攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>，持续12秒。该效果30秒只能触发一次。
- This green-leaved tree and mountain rock aren't anything special.\nA certain alley poet once claimed that everything in this world has an aura and that this tree and the rock were having a wordless conversation. Many others, influenced by her words, came to believe more and more that these words were quite fitting indeed. ｜ 并无特殊之处的青叶盘伏树和山石。\n某位小巷诗人一时兴起，声称天地万物皆有灵气，此树和山石正在无声交谈。众人被她影响，越看越觉得，这句描述相当贴切。
- It is a manifestation of the God of Wisdom's power. ｜ 是智慧之神力量的具现。
- Morning! If I hadn't stayed up all night, I never would have known you get up this early. ｜ #早啊，{NICKNAME}。要不是我通宵了，都不知道你起这么早。
- "Meow! All Caskets of Tomes are issued by Margaret, so you will need to see her to claim yours..." ｜ 喵…「秘典之盒，都由玛格丽特发放，所以要去寻找玛格丽特领取…」
- I remember all the strange and wonderful Oceanid creatures we saw before we met "Mary-Ann." ｜ 想起了我们在遇见「玛丽安」之前，见到的奇特纯水小动物。
- And the Tanit have always had good commercial relations with the Adventurers' Guild. With Ms. Jeht as our point of contact, they have proven themselves reliable across many acts of cooperation. ｜ 况且塔尼特部族一直与冒险家协会维持着良好的贸易关系，又有婕德小姐牵线搭桥，诸多合作证明他们是值得信赖的。
- ...At least he was able to see this chapter come to a close before he passed. ｜ …我们总算在他看得见的时候完成了这件事。
- Combat units are split into Normal, Elite, and Apex classes, which each class starting at Level 20, 25, and 30 respectively.\nAs the Wargame proceeds, the chance of more elite Combat Units appearing will also increase. - <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nA huge number of foes have appeared all over the Golden Apple Archipelago! Start the challenge and defeat your opponents within the time limit to accumulate points and unlock different levels of rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 21 to take part in the "Never-Ending Battle" event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Rules: Points and Rewards</color>\nDefeat opponents to receive the corresponding amount of points. Your score multiplier will depend on the difficulty of your chosen challenge difficulty.\nBased on the highest score you achieve in a stage, you will obtain corresponding rewards after reaching the required score.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Rules: Momentum and Blessings</color>\nEach challenge stage has unique mechanics that will provide basic buffs. Defeat berserker opponents or destroy Momentum Discs using Wind-Blessed Harpastum to obtain Momentum.\nOnce you have accumulated a certain amount of Momentum, you will obtain the corresponding level of Momentum Blessing, which will then provide you with various buffs. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n大量敌人出现在金苹果群岛各处！开启挑战，在限定时间内击败这些敌人，即可获取积分，用以解锁不同等阶的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到21级后，才能参与「无尽骤战」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：积分与奖励】</color>\n击败敌人可获取相应的积分，依据所选定的挑战难度，获得积分的倍率不同。\n依据在该关卡中所取得的最高积分，可以在达到指定积分时领取对应的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：气势与祝福】</color>\n每个挑战关卡都有着不同的关卡特性，提供基础的增益效果。击败狂热敌人，或使用「风佑之羽球」击破「气势靶盘」均可获取「气势」。\n「气势」积累到一定程度后，将获得挑战中对应阶级的「气势祝福」，提供各种各样的增益效果。

- After your character takes DMG: The DMG that character deals in this match increases by 1 (Up to 3 stacks, +3 DMG total).\nWhen Action Phase begins: Draw one random Talent Card from your deck, and your opponent's <color=#{0}>active character receives a shield with 3 points</color>. ｜ 我方角色受到伤害后：使该角色在本场对局中造成的伤害+1（可叠加，最多叠加到+3）。\n行动阶段开始时：我方从牌组中随机抽取1张「天赋」牌，敌方获得<color=#{0}>3点保护出战角色的「护盾」</color>。
- Go to the fireworks storage ｜ 前往烟花存放点查看
- Kimosi ｜ 基莫西
- A stone statue of a sword-bearing soldier whose stance speaks of power and grandeur, as though extolling a hard-won victory for the ages. An imitation of the statues found in the Faded Castle.\nIt is said that researchers once attempted to restore the broken left arm of the statue, seeking to fully and faithfully recreate how it would have appeared during the days of that bygone civilization, but all such attempts ended in utter failure, without exceptions. So things remained until an artist raised the critical question: "What if this imperfect state is actually its perfect state?" This crucial query not only caused them to cease their debates over this statue, but birthed a completely new idea — being incomplete is not the same as being imperfect, and within incompleteness can a unique aesthetic be found. ｜ 手持利剑的甲士石像，其姿态威武雄壮，仿佛在歌颂一场来之不易的伟大胜利，是褪色古堡内石像的仿制品。\n据说，学者们曾试图还原石像原型断裂的左臂，以期能完整重现那个古代文明的风貌，但这些尝试无一不以失败告终。直到某位艺术家提出了最关键的提问——「这种不完美的状态是否才是它的完美状态？」，这一关键性的疑问不仅让人们停止了对这尊雕像的争论，更催生出了一个崭新的观点——残缺不等同于不完美，残缺之中也蕴含着独特的美学。
- #Hehe, you really are awesome, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}! ｜ #哇啊，不愧是{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}！

- Lady Furina has a very captivating presence. She was born to be a star. Euphrasie once assigned a journalist to shadow her, but he quit not long into the assignment... From what I've heard, the reason he left was that Furina insisted on seeing every photo he took of her right away, and she'd make him redo it if she wasn't happy with how it turned out. Apparently, she was so picky that the poor guy once had to take 127 shots of her in the same pose before she was content... ｜ 水神芙宁娜大人的言行举止都十分富有感染力，是一个天生的大明星。欧芙小姐之前还指派了一位记者专门去跟访她呢，但是他没过多久就辞职了。\n至于辞职的原因…据我打听到的消息，是因为这位记者每拍一张画片，都要拿去给芙宁娜大人看，如果她不满意就得重拍。最夸张的一次，这位老兄对着芙宁娜大人的一个姿势整整重拍了一百二十七次…

- If you can stay within the Ideal Tension Zone while fishing, this rod will shorten the time in which fish will struggle by a stable amount and increase your chances of success. This effect only works in Mondstadt.\n\nA long, bright, transparent rod created by a poet from Mondstadt. To help borrow the power of Anemo to help raise the rod, the poet rather ingeniously designed a fishing reel made from the leaves of Windwheel Asters, which also imparts a certain romanticism of "lingering in the wind" to this device. But perhaps there were issues in the handiwork or in the design itself, for the finalized product could not spin as freely as expected. Perhaps this is what they call "the chasm between professions?" ｜ 钓鱼过程中，若能使张力处于最佳张力区，使用此竿可稳定缩短鱼儿挣扎时间，提高钓鱼成功率。仅蒙德地区生效。\n\n由一位蒙德诗人创造的长竿，碧荧通透。为了借来风的力量帮助提竿，诗人别出心裁地设计了由风车叶组成的渔轮，也使其蕴含了一丝「与风缠绵」的浪漫意味。但不知是制作工艺还是设计本身的问题，最终的完成品并不能如预想中自由转动，或许这就是所谓的隔行如隔山吧？

- I specialize in solving problems. ｜ 我是解决问题的专家。
- The Washer Octopus seems to have learned something... ｜ 螺帽章鱼好像学到了什么…
- As Dehya's reputation gradually grew amongst the Eremites, those of her band grew proud of the fame she was earning and, during a day when everyone happened to be present, the rowdiest of her companions stated their desire to grant her a nickname worth remembering.\nEveryone agreed that they would announce Dehya with the new nickname whenever she won future battles, so it needed to be something spectacular — capable of spreading goosebumps through people like a skin-raising plague.\nThe youngest members gave their all trying to come up with something. They chittered and clamored, trying to give Dehya a vicious moniker capable of instilling debilitating terror in potential clients, usually beginning with "bloody" or "terror."\nDehya was not such an amateur as to think that a title alone might encapsulate the entirety of what others felt about her. But still, as if everyone wanted to kill some time on this matter, she didn't mind.\nAs she listened to bad suggestion after terrible suggestion, she couldn't help but guffaw with laughter. The atmosphere reminded her of moments from her childhood when her father gathered his compatriots to put on plays for her, detailing chivalrous heroes defending the helpless or messy brawls between siblings to amuse everyone. There was no specific point to it, except to bring some cheer while surviving in the vast emptiness under the desert's midnight sky.\nAnd just as the chatting was starting to put her in a good mood, that old ne'er-do-well's shadow slid back into her mind. Though admittedly disgruntled, Dehya did her best to keep the curl of her lips imperceptible.\nThat night, Dehya rejected several laughable names, such as the "Sovereign of the Sands" and "The Crimson Edge." She thought it was time to let the farce come to a close. It was just a name after all, and true mercenaries did not let such things affect their business much.\nJust then, an aged mercenary interrupted the discussion. At first, he snorted disdainfully at the stupidity of those around him. Then, he asked a question: "The Legend of the Lion. This story ring a bell for anyone?"\nThis tale was, naturally, one Dehya was familiar with. During her childhood, her father had told her lots of old stories — far too many, really. She had wanted to forget everything that had to do with him, but memories are not so easily consigned to oblivion.\nWhile she was lost in the twists and turns of her past, her companions decided upon a title for her that actually sounded quite alright: "Flame-Mane."\nAnd though she loathed the man The Legend of the Lion reminded her of, she found herself halted just before she could reject the name. Was it not all too petty to refuse such goodwill on that account?\nMust she avoid all the things related to her father, just because she wanted to forget him? Of course not. Besides, the story had brought a genuine feeling of warmth and comfort to Dehya, allowing her to face the world with open eyes, experience all it had to offer — and those experiences had not been falsehoods.\nSo why not take up the title of "Flame-Mane?" She could have done far worse. ｜ 迪希雅凭实力逐渐在「镀金旅团」中打出名声之后，团里的大伙都觉得很有面子，某日恰好所有人都在场，喜欢起哄的几个兄弟便嚷着要给迪希雅起一个响当当的外号。\n大家约定，以后迪希雅打架打赢了就报这个外号，所以它要够帅气，一说出来就叫人起鸡皮疙瘩。\n最年轻的几个成员想得最起劲，叽叽喳喳地说要给迪希雅想个狠名字，怎么血腥恐怖怎么来，让过路的商客一听就逃之夭夭。\n迪希雅不是什么都不懂的新人佣兵了，她知道别人对她的畏与敬不可能系在一个名字上。但既然大家乐意借这件事打发时间，她也没什么意见。\n她听着大家提出的各种馊点子，忍不住哈哈大笑。那氛围像极了小时候听父亲讲故事，当年的父亲总喜欢拉上团员闹哄哄演些英雄救美、兄弟斗殴的戏码逗大家开心。没有任何目的，只是为沙漠寂寥的夜晚添些热闹。\n聊得正高兴，突然想起了那个不着调的老混蛋。迪希雅自认扫兴，不着痕迹地撇了撇嘴角。\n当夜，迪希雅接连拒绝了「沙漠第一」和「血腥大剑」之类毫无魄力又惹人发笑的名字。她想：胡闹就到此为止吧。归根结底，名字只是一个代称，沙漠里的实干家不靠虚名谋生。\n这时，一个老佣兵插话进来。他先是对众人的糟糕品味嗤之以鼻，接着问道：「狮子的传说，你们听过没？」\n迪希雅自然听过。童年时代，父亲给她讲过太多老掉牙的故事。她本想忘掉关于那个人的一切，深刻在脑海中的回忆却无法轻易抹去。\n就在她走神的一小会儿里，同伴们居然已经想好了一个算得上响亮的名字——「炽鬃之狮」。\n她讨厌由狮子传说联想到的那个人，原本不想接受这个称号的，拒绝的话语说到嘴边，又觉得为小事辜负一番好意太过小气。\n只为不再想起一个与自己不再有关联的人，就要刻意避开和他沾边的一切事物吗？没必要吧。何况那些故事带给迪希雅的温暖并非虚假，它们领着她走向世界，睁大双眼去看、去感受。她所体悟到的一切都不是虚假的。\n所以，不如就这样——「炽鬃之狮」，还不错的名字。

- You stumble out of Tenshukaku gloomily. By chance, the resistance forces have broken through the leaderless Shogunate troops, arriving beneath Tenshukaku. Having not met them in some time, you step forward, but just then, the Raiden Shogun appears behind you, unleashing her legendary Musou no Hitotachi. Just as it seems that divine punishment will be meted out, the Masterless Vision Kazuha carries crackles to life. Wielding his sword, he meets — and miraculously blocks — that strike head-on. Encouraged by his bravery, the resistance troops charge at the Raiden shogun, and the Visions inlaid upon the Statue of the Omnipresent God glow in response to their former masters' courage. Yet you know that their valiant effort will not avail them against the Raiden Shogun and that this may yet be the moment to execute Yae Miko's plan, and so you turn to strike the Shogun. As expected, the Plane of Euthymia opens before you once more... ｜ 你在昏昏沉沉之中，走出了天守阁。巧合的是，反抗军的众人已击破群龙无首的幕府军，来到了天守阁下。你与他们许久不见，正要向前，雷电将军忽然在你身后现身，那传闻中「无想的一刀」正向你砍来。眼看神罚即将落下，万叶随身携带的那枚神之眼空壳中竟然再度亮起雷光。万叶挥刀迎上，直面并奇迹般地接下了那一刀。随后，受到万叶此举的激励，反抗军众人的压抑情绪被点燃，向雷电将军发起了最后的冲锋，而千手百眼神像上的神之眼，也随着它们曾经的主人的冲锋而亮了起来。可是你深知反抗军并非将军的对手，而且此刻或许是实施八重神子计划的好机会，于是你转身挥刀砍向将军。果然如你所料，「一心净土」在你面前展开…

- Haha! Surely you jest! The Sebastos must have assigned you some secret mission again, or else I am an ignoramus! ｜ 哈哈，您可真会开玩笑，我看又是至尊给您派下了什么秘密任务吧！
- Current <color=#FF5E41FF>Corrosion Index</color> is too high.\nReturn to the statue to <color=#FF5E41FF>Recuperate</color> and clear Corrosion ｜ 当前「<color=#FF5E41FF>侵蚀指数</color>」过高。可返回雕像处进行「<color=#FF5E41FF>休憩恢复</color>」清空侵蚀
- Well, no matter how good your memory is, you won't quite be able to capture the joy of traveling together if you're apart from your companions for too long. ｜ 唔…确实呢，不管记性有多好，和伙伴们分开太久的话，也未必能想起一起旅行时的快乐呢。
- Oh, uh — present! ｜ 啊，到！
- Intimidating Man ｜ 威严的男子
- Got it. ｜ 好的。
- Xu from Liyue Harbor's Feiyun Commerce Guild is currently in a pickle... Two customers came to have their pictures taken, but he forgot to write their names on the back of their pictures, and now has no way to deliver the pictures to the customers. So he has turned to you for help. According to him, you should be able to find the customers' locations by studying the pictures taken by the Kamera... ｜ 璃月港飞云商会的阿旭正陷入苦恼… 有两位顾客过来留了影，但阿旭却忘了在这两位顾客留的影上标注名字，无法将「留影机」印出来的「画」送给顾客，只能拜托旅行者帮忙。 根据阿旭的说法，也许可以根据那两张「留影机」印出来的画找到顾客的所在地…
- The ruins in the north, around where you first met each other. Don't forget. ｜ 北方的遗迹，你们最初遇见的地方附近…别忘了。
- Oh yes... I don't believe I've thanked you yet, have I? Thank you for the omamori. I'll make sure that my granddaughter keeps it with her. ｜ 说起来…还没谢过这位巫女？多谢你准备的御守了，我一定嘱咐孙女好好带着。
- Oh, oh! That reminds me, a few days ago when I was closing up for the night, I noticed a customer had left a couple of Character Cards on the bar counter. Haha! Maybe you could use those for now. ｜ 哦对了，前几天打烊以后才发现，有位客人把几张角色牌留在了吧台上，不如就暂时借给你们吧！
- I'll stay behind to keep him safe. Meanwhile, you and Jeht keep looking for an exit. ｜ 我留下保护他，在这期间，你们和婕德继续去找出口。
- We Could Build A Popsicle? ｜ 或许可以做个刨冰？
- "Maison Cardinalice's Clerk" ｜ 「枢律之宫的文员」
- Tell me about Milu Nui's music... ｜ 关于米卢·努伊的唱片…
- Who are you? ｜ 谁？
- I'm sorry if I'm suddenly not making any sense. However, I do think it's possible. ｜ 抱歉，我突然说了难懂的话，但我觉得很有可能。
- It seems like I won't need you to answer my last question. ｜ 看来我最后的问题也不需要你亲口回答了。
- Just so you know... I've already greeted them. Politely, of course. ｜ 不瞒你说，我已经和它们礼貌地打过招呼了。
- Hmm~ the Perch seems to be in a good state. This year's ceremony should go well. ｜ 嗯~栖木的状态很好。今年的祭典一定会顺利的。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Alright, deal! ｜ 好嘞，一言为定！
- I never saw him wear this during the war. I didn't expect him to start wearing it later. ｜ 战乱时期从未见他穿过这件，没想到，后来才用上。
- But I'm one of the Children of Echoes, and we're always around Tepetlisaurs. You can figure out what they're trying to communicate from their eyes, their expressions, and the humming noises they make. ｜ 但是我是「回声之子」的人，我们天天和嵴锋龙们相处，你可以从它们的眼睛，神态，发出的哼哼声懂得它们想要述说的东西。
- Are you waiting for someone? ｜ 是在等谁吗？
- You just couldn't let sleeping dogs lie, could you? ｜ 你们还真是爱管闲事。
- Oof, I'm so full... I'll have to pass on the post-meal fruits this time... ｜ 呼，好饱，连餐后水果都要吃不下了…
- Cheers. ｜ 干杯。
- I'm counting on you for the seeds, Traveler. See you beside Jahangir's shop. ｜ 那种子的事情就拜托你了，旅行者，我们等会在贾汉吉尔的店旁边碰头吧。
- Aranara ｜ 兰那罗
- I'm a little low on energy. ｜ 需要…补充能量。
- Thank goodness you're here. I think I'm lost... ｜ 你来得正好，我好像迷路了…
- Food ｜ 食物
- Only that child who loves painting still speaks to me, and she even brought her friends — that's how I came to meet you. I truly am happy that that's the case. ｜ 只有那个爱画画的孩子，还一直愿意跟我说话。而且，还把好朋友带来，我才有机会认识你。我真的好开心。
- If you're quick, you might be able to catch up with those weirdos. ｜ 你们赶紧向前追去，说不定还能遇到那些奇怪的家伙。
- H—Hey, I said I don't know anything! I'm just an average member here. I'm telling the truth! ｜ 说、说了不知道！我只是个小跟班，我还能说谎吗？
- And by the time they realized that they'd have to go to the Experimental Field Generator to retrieve the backup energy supply, the Generator would have already finished charging. ｜ 当他们意识到，必须去拿「实验性场力发生装置」内的备用能源时，「实验性场力发生装置」也充能完毕。
- At the right juncture, they will come bursting out and take the form of a great poem... or a painting... or something else. ｜ 当某个契机到来，这些灵感就会一口气喷发而出，形成一首优秀的诗歌…或者是一幅画，或者其他什么。
- They'll find us for sure if we don't do something. ｜ 这样下去一定会被发现的。
- I'm not your Captain anymore, y'know. ｜ 我已经不是「队长」啦。
- Ouch...! ｜ 痛痛痛…！
- "...My ears itch. I can hear someone calling out to me, telling me that there is water in the depths. Mushrooms..." ｜ 「…耳朵仍然痒，听到有人叫我，她说深处有水，有蘑菇…」
- Well, he's got a point. Why didn't we think of that? ｜ 他说的有道理欸，我们怎么没想到！
- *sigh* Wish I could've frozen that moment in time, so you could just listen to yourself! ｜ 唉，真想把这话记录下来，让你好好听听。
- You look like you've been keeping well. ｜ 你看起来精神不错呢。
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- I'm searching for my husband, Inaba Tousaburou Kyuuzou. He is a tall man without any facial hair and has a scar on the side of his forehead. He has yet to return home despite the ceasefire. ｜ 寻夫稻叶藤三郎久藏。高大无须，额角有剑疤。自停战以来尚未归家。
- Is that so? ｜ 真的吗？
- I just didn't expect that Slime Condensate could run out so quickly... ｜ 但史莱姆凝液消耗得实在太快，出乎我的预料…
- Sangonomiya Kokomi ｜ 珊瑚宫心海
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Man, that Kautilya guy knows nothing about respect. He summoned his students like servants, making us do all sorts of chores for him for free... ｜ 考特里亚那家伙，从来都不知道「尊重」这个词该怎么写，把普通学生当成佣人使唤，给他干各种杂活，一点报酬都不给…
- I believe it was the sound of a finch flapping its wings. ｜ 那应该…是小团雀扇动翅膀的声音？
- Can be accepted upon reaching Level {0} and when your EXP meets Ascension requirement(s) ｜ 达到{0}级且经验值满足升级所需条件时接取
- I disowned him long ago... He is no child of mine! ｜ 他早就已经跟我们没关系了…我可没有那样的孩子！
- The tension in the air hangs over us like a shroud. Our doors aren't closed, but... ｜ 现在街上的气氛都紧张起来了，虽然还没到商家闭门谢客的地步，但是…
- I'll help. ｜ 我会帮忙。
- I just think that the gods really don't understand us sometimes... ｜ 只是我觉得，神有时候真的不理解我们…
- "Fantasy Institute" ｜ 《奇幻科学院》
- Claim ｜ 领取
- Sounds dubious to me... ｜ 听起来好假…
- I mean... clearly you don't want to go... You could just— ｜ 实在不想去的话，要不就…
- The Weight of Falling Branches ｜ 坠枝之重
- Woodland Guide ｜ 林薮引路人
- Hold your foul tongue! How dare you utter Her Majesty's name? ｜ 大胆！你怎敢直呼国王陛下的真名？

- Talk to the silent Melusine ｜ 与一言不发的美露莘对话
- I can't claim to fully understand it, but I could tell that he'd lost something very important to him. He went off on a walk, alone, circled the village a few times, and then out of the blue, he announced that he was going to leave and become a wanderer. ｜ 我说不上来，但感觉他好像失去了什么重要的东西，独自一人绕着村子转了几圈之后，突然就说要出去云游四海。

- Shake Head ｜ 摇头

- I'm positive that you must have been behind this once again. Thank you, thank you from the bottom of my heart! ｜ 这所有的事一定都是你们帮的忙吧，太谢谢了，真的太谢谢了！
- Sure, I guess... ｜ 可以是可以…
- Verr Goldet ｜ 菲尔戈黛特
- Xinyan's Father ｜ 辛焱的父亲
- I know, and I will do my best not to cause you guys any trouble. ｜ 我明白。我会全力以赴，不给你们添麻烦。
- #Oh, and by the way, {NICKNAME}, is that guy gone? He didn't say anything weird, did he? ｜ #啊，对了，{NICKNAME}，刚才那个部族的人走了吗？他没说什么奇怪的话吧。
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- Those were a part of it, yes. But just those on their own weren't enough. They had another tool at their disposal. They called it a person's "record." ｜ 嗯，确实如此，但光有这些还不够，他们还有另一个武器，名为「案底」。
- With all that said, it also helped that our fruit actually tastes really good! And, I'm not just saying that — you'll see what I mean in a minute! ｜ 但总归还是因为家里种的水果很好吃，大家才愿意来照顾生意。我可不是自吹自擂哦，你们马上就会理解了。
- (No, Furina. You shouldn't be selfish...) ｜ （不行，芙宁娜，你不应该自私…）
- Creating humans using human knowledge can only be achieved by gods, and the same applies to Oceanids creating Oceanids. It usually should be impossible — in this world, at least. ｜ 至少这个世界里，以人之智识造人是神一般的功业。纯水精灵幻化纯水精灵也是一个道理。通常来说是不可能的。
- She knows what she's doing. ｜ 她会有分寸。
- Lynette ｜ 琳妮特
- Still, the Captain has priority matters she needs to attend to at the moment. Certainly not matters that should be delayed by a few small odd jobs. ｜ 而且大姐头她在稻妻还有更优先的订单要完成，不能为了这种小事耽误了当前的任务。

- Use Catalyze reactions to recover what should have been lost. ｜ 利用激化反应，发现原本被隐藏的事物。
- Final Score ｜ 最终得分
- This isn't over yet... ｜ 还没结束…
- ...It's adventure time! ｜ 冒险…
- If we are to defeat him... I fear we must await the moment when all his soul fragments have gathered around one body. ｜ 若想再次击败他…当他所有灵魂的碎片再度汇聚到一个躯体之上时，恐怕这就是唯一的机会。
- ...Over by the statue... ｜ 好像是神像那边…
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- The Lord of Geo sure is something. Barely been gone and already his name is being slandered. ｜ 岩王爷，是很了不起的！这才刚刚离去，就有人开始诋毁了…

- Fatuus ｜ 愚人众

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Hehe, I'm sure you'd just get even sleepier if I delved more deeply into it. Anyway, I was just thinking about how grateful I am to my mother, as well as the rest of the Spina. ｜ 展开来讲的话你会更想睡觉的。我想，应该是多亏了刺玫会，还有我的母亲吧。
- Oh, you mean my poems, right? Ahem. It's been forever since I performed in front of someone. One sec... Get ready! ｜ 打油诗对吧？咳咳，许久未在人前大显身手，你等，洗耳恭听！
- Still, it'd be a shame to let it all go to waste... Why don't you take it instead? ｜ 可是全倒掉的话又有些可惜…要不然，你拿走吧？
- Could I buy some fish? ｜ 可以买鱼吗？
- I'm only interested in capturing the aesthetics of the sword, especially the interplay between light and shadow. Combat, for me, is a chance to get a wealth of inspiration in the bag. ｜ 我只想捕捉光与刀影的美学，将从战斗中裁剪的灵感全部收纳进我的素材袋。
- We've provided him with a mattress to lie down on, and the restraints are made of fine satin. I'm sure that no harm will afflict him, except for his own guilty conscience. ｜ 我们给他准备好了垫子，绑住他的也是绸缎，我相信他不会受到除了良心谴责外的任何伤害。
- Meeeow? ｜ 呜喵？
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- The only problem is that Dragonspine is really far from Mondstadt. I can't be troubling you every time, either. I have to find some other way in future... ｜ 不过，雪山距离蒙德城有些太远了，总不能每次都麻烦你，以后得想个方便的办法才行…
- ... ｜ ……
- #Araja's in the house over there. If Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon are willing, you can show yourselves to everyone there. ｜ #兰拉迦就在大屋那边。如果那菈{NICKNAME}和派蒙愿意，也可以让大家看看自己。
- Adventure Rank too low. Cannot equip. ｜ 冒险等阶不足，无法装备
- Speaking of Elder Tlapo, I heard he went missing yesterday! Do you know what happened? ｜ 话说回来，昨天有人报告说特拉波长老突然失踪了一段时间，你们谁知道是怎么回事？
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- Follow Ningguang and observe your surroundings carefully again ｜ 再次跟随凝光，谨慎观察四周
- You'll face other "monsters" when you grow up. ｜ 长大以后会面临别的「怪物」。
- I believe you. ｜ 我相信你。
- Normal Attack: Foreign Rockblade ｜ 普通攻击·异邦岩锋
- New Entry ｜ 新怪物
- Well, that's exactly why I didn't want to bring it up to you... ｜ 我就是知道才不敢告诉千织姐的嘛…
- Annex's Spotless Dome ｜ 「别宫的无垢穹顶」
- I will await your completion of the challenge at the Tower of the Three Realms above. ｜ 我将在上方三界塔处等候你完成挑战。
- Hehe, Paimon will leave communicating with the Water Droplets to you too. You're really good at that kind of thing! ｜ 嘿嘿嘿，和其他「小水珠」们沟通的工作也拜托你了，你很擅长这方面的事！
- Um... P—Please, get away from me! I—I'm just a normal Melusine, and I'm not tasty at all! Even if you did eat me, it wouldn't fill your tummy! ｜ …呜！请、请不要过来！我…我只是普通的美露莘而已，一点也不好吃的！就算吃下去也不会饱的！
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- I can't drink alcohol yet. ｜ 我还不能喝酒来着。
- After rescuing the trapped travelers, you hear them tell of a legend from the People of the Springs. The adventurer's unique curiosity this sparks drives you toward their tribe's dwellings... ｜ 解救了被困的旅人之后，你们借旅人之口了解到了一个来自流泉之众的传说，冒险者特有的好奇心驱使你们前往流泉之众的驻地…
- Traveler, we meet again! We're currently trying to figure out how to... dive into the waters in front of us. ｜ 旅行者，又见面了。我们正在想怎么…潜进前面的水里…
- The Soulwind state of <color=#FFD780FF>Starfrost Swirl</color> can decrease the healing interval between instances caused by <color=#FFD780FF>Skyfeather Song</color>'s Eagleplume state. This decrease percentage is equal to the ATK SPD increase provided by Soulwind. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>星霜的流旋</color>产生的灵风状态能使<color=#FFD780FF>苍翎的颂愿</color>的鹰翎状态恢复生命值的间隔降低，降低比例等同于灵风状态提供的攻击速度提升比例。
- Who knows? But if it's true, Kinich can probably handle it. He knows what he's doing with weighing up contracts and costs and stuff. I doubt he'd make a contract that doesn't benefit him. ｜ 谁知道呢，要是真的，估计也就基尼奇能受住了。他对什么契约啊代价啊之类的总是看得很清。咱觉得他不会吃亏的。
- No wonder you've got no friends. ｜ 怪不得没人喜欢你。
- I had no luck finding an adventurer kind enough to help... Traveler, can I ask for your help? Please? ｜ 我一时半会找不到愿意帮忙的冒险家…旅行者，能请您帮帮我吗？
- Further Investigation ｜ 寻迹向前
- #Well, then, {NICKNAME}... The Knights of Favonius have another favor to ask of you. ｜ #那么，{NICKNAME}。这是骑士团第二次的不情之请：
- You sure don't look like you're rarin' to go anywhere. Wanna listen to my new song? ｜ 你好像不急着出发，那要不要听听我最近写的曲子？
- Let's go check it out! ｜ 快去看看！
- Your diet has been quite plain recently, and Paimon's been missing the spice of life in food...\nAs such, you head over to Wanmin Restaurant, only to meet two old friends... ｜ 最近你们的饮食较为清淡，派蒙开始想念香辣的料理…\n因此，你们前往了万民堂，却意外遇见了两位老朋友…
- Such... enviable friendship. ｜ 令人…羡慕的友谊。
- Well, to be honest, Honorary Knight, apart from testing the explosion radii of several different types of explosives, I'm not sure I found out much. ｜ 嗯…实话实说，荣誉骑士大人，除了几种炸弹的爆炸范围得到了校准以外，好像并没有什么太大的收获。
- 2 Rebels escaped capture ｜ 尚有2名游侠逃脱追捕
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Well, of course! If it weren't for the Mora my drinks bring in, how would we pay for their toys and food? ｜ 那、那是当然了，要不是我调的酒赚了那么多钱，它们的猫饭和玩具要从哪儿来…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- View Details ｜ 查看详情
- *sobs* Why don't Little Meng and Little Lulu want to play with me? ｜ 呜呜…小蒙，璐璐…为什么不跟我玩？
- ...Still not biting? ｜ 快上钩来…
- Anyway, I dunno about art, but I do know that I'm interested in business, and some patrons are waiting to be served. So you'll have to excuse me for now... Just holler if you need anything. ｜ 比起艺术，我更在乎生意。两位慢慢聊，我先去接待别的客人。
- Ah, you're finally awake! Paimon was worried sick! ｜ 哎呀你可算醒了，担心死我了。
- My heart? ｜ 心？
- Head up...? Oh, right! You mean to the Jade Chamber. ｜ 上去…哦！是去群玉阁啊。
- Win without being captured despite being marked by Sensor Aura 3 times ｜ 被「感应光环」标示3次，且在未被捕获的情况下获胜

- Yes, please try to recall. Did the doctor mention anything to you before he left? ｜ 没错，请您想一想，莫索博士最后有没有也对您说过什么？
- R—Roar... ｜ 呜，呜…
- Public Trial Performance: "Public trial against Horler for a series of criminal acts disrupting the public order and other crimes." ｜ 公审演出：「对霍勒一系列扰乱公众秩序等罪行的公审」。
- Welcome... ｜ 贵宾光临——

- "Very impressive, swordsman! So this is what people learn in books?" ｜ 「剑客哥哥果然很了不起呢，这就是读书人吗？」
- Come see Aradashan once you've beaten all the Big Iron Chunks! ｜ 如果所有石头锁里的「大大铁块」都被打倒了，就来找我吧。
- About Kaveh: Expertise ｜ 关于卡维自己·专业
- Friend requests ｜ 好友申请

- A workstation made from high-quality Brightwood, it looks like an ordinary table with an intricate mechanism underneath. Its internal structure is quite similar to clockwork. Simply turning the mechanism will allow one to store energy within the desk. This energy powers the rotation of the turntable, facilitating the pottery-making process. It is said that this particular design was inspired by similar products in Liyue that were then adapted by researchers to Sumeru's local conditions, arts, and materials. When this workstation became popular, Sumeru's earthenware production capacity also greatly increased. ｜ 以品质上佳的「辉木」部件组装的工作台，状如普通的桌案，下方设有精巧的机关，内构与发条的原理相仿，只需简单拨动机关进行蓄能，方可让桌面的转盘长时间旋转，从而方便地制作陶器。据说这种桌案的设计得到了璃月同类产品的启发，学者们因地制宜，改用了适合须弥的工艺和材料。这种工具台推广后，须弥陶器的产能得到了大幅提升。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Unbeaten Hero.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『不败的勇士』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Wait a minute... Doesn't that mean there could still be more ruins inside? ｜ 等等，那岂不是说，「火山里」有更多的遗迹嘛…
- A strange cartilaginous fish that was once thought to be a fantastical creature, only recorded in some ancient scrolls of art on Watatsumi Island. As the seal over Enkanomiya was opened, their true forms were laid bare before the eyes of all.\nIt is said that the bodily forms of these curious creatures will change color as time passes. When they are young, they are as gold as sunlight. Rays at this stage of life earned the name "Divda" in those ancient scrolls, which means "the tail end of innocence." ｜ 曾经一度被认为是幻想生物的奇异鳐鱼，只被记录在一些海祇岛的古老画卷中。如今随着尘封的海渊被打开，它们的真实样貌才展现在人们眼前。\n据传这种奇异生物的体色会随着时间的变化而变化，幼年时通常呈现出皦日一般的浅金色。在古画卷的记录中，这个时期的它们被冠以「迪芙妲」之名，其意为「纯真之尾」。

- The oni have been through a lot to get to where we are today, and look at us now — living peacefully alongside the humans. Unfortunately, there's still plenty of people out there who've got a bone to pick with us. Hmm? Change? Oh yeah, things are gonna change, alright! You can count on that! But I'll tell you what, it won't involve any sucking up to the humans on my part, nuh-uh! I'm gonna let my actions do the talkin'. They'll come to respect me eventually. ｜ 鬼族经历了很多事情，才迎来了现在这个好时代，可以与人类共同生活。只可惜啊，时至今日还有许多人对鬼族心存芥蒂。嗯？怎么办？当然要改变啦。哼，但我不会刻意去讨好他们，我要用自己的方式，赢得人类的尊重。

- The story is about a pair of children born into the household of a baron, and their struggle to survive together and take revenge for their mother. ｜ 小说讲的是一对伯爵家的子女相依为命，为母亲复仇的故事。

- Well, here's what I've got so far... ｜ 我设想的内容是这样的…
- What's taking you so long? You said we were gonna have a beetle fight today! C'mon, you promised! ｜ 你怎么这么长时间都没回来啊？不是说好了要一起斗虫吗？
- Thank you, kind soul. May your bench press today hit a new personal best and your pull-ups stay cramp-free! ｜ 谢谢你，好心人。你今天卧推一定破记录，引体向上绝对不抽筋。
- We Kshahrewar are only concerned about genuine techniques. ｜ 我们妙论派只关心真正的技术。
- Shousei, Gyoubu Koban, and Kichiboushi. Go find these <color=#00E1FFFF>three little tanuki</color> and play with them. I would do it, but as you can see, I'm not exactly at any liberty to move. ｜ 「证城」、「刑部小判」和「吉法师」。在森林里找找他们<color=#00E1FFFF>三个小狸子</color>，陪他们玩玩吧。毕竟，吾辈也没办法自由行动。
- I didn't take anything. ｜ 我什么都没拿。
- You okay over there? ｜ 吉法师，你没事吧？
- She doesn't like to travel, so in the past, it's always been the other adepti who come to visit her during the festivals... ｜ 真君一贯深居简出，以往节日期间，总是众仙来拜访她…
- Mere mortal!? Do you have any idea who you're talking to? I am a highly accomplished astrologist, thank you very much! ｜ 凡…你说谁是凡人啊！我可是很厉害的占星术士！
- Whoa, looks like they're outta here! ｜ 呜哇！他们要跑了！

- Here, have a drink. Want some chocolate? Or milk candy, maybe? ｜ 来，喝点饮料吧，要吃点巧克力吗？奶糖要不要？
- This is no reason for you to rely on her though. ｜ 这也不是你们依赖诺艾尔的理由。
- Sounds a little unbelievable. ｜ 听起来像编的。
- Phonia ｜ 方妮雅
- And there's been nothing from them so far, sir? ｜ 上面没有透露任何消息吗，长官？
- Haha, that's a good boy! I haven't seen you in ages, Swoof. No eating the frogs and hamsters here, okay? ｜ 哈哈，斯汪乖，好久都没见到你了呢，这边的青蛙和胖胖鼠不能吃哟。
- Are you going to meditate now? Do be careful! ｜ 要进行「冥想」吗？要注意安全喔…

- ...You may be closer to the truth than you think. ｜ …也许正如你所想。
- The cunning Saurian traffickers were on high alert. As soon as they saw someone attacking, they took to their hot air balloon and fled... ｜ 狡诈的龙贩子们过于谨慎，一见有人攻来，就乘坐热气球逃走了…
- Usually, these few seconds would let you find a good spot to hide if you're lucky. ｜ 一般来说，这十几秒的时间，运气好的话，足够他们藏到安全的地方了。

- Khemenu Temple is not the largest of the countless temples to be found within the desert, but it is intimately linked to the people. All people will enter this place, lower their heads, and praise King Deshret's boundless wisdom. ｜ 在沙漠的无数神庙中，秘仪圣殿或许不是最大的那座，但却与万民相关。所有子民都会步入此处，低首赞美赤王的全知。

- Silk Flowers have all but disappeared from the wild today, due to geographical changes over Liyue's history. Most are now grown by horticulturalists. ｜ 不过时至今日，大多野生的霓裳花都在璃月地理变迁的过程中绝迹了，现在多是依靠人工培育…
- I've heard that crossing rivers and seas takes a great deal of time. But if I had a friend with me, I'm sure it would be a glad time. ｜ 游遍川海啊，听起来要花很久。不过有朋友相伴，也是一件乐事啊。
- (Unable to fathom how those once cheerful humans had turned from best of friends to worst of enemies, he concluded that they must have been corrupted by the Sacred Flame Crystals themselves.) ｜ （它想不通那些曾经满面笑容的人类朋友为什么要反目成仇，只能归因于是圣火结晶蛊惑了他们。）
- Suspicious Stone Harbor Delicacies ｜ 奇怪的岩港三鲜
- Although it's all just a boatload of nonsense, the faith of her homeland may turn out to be Setaria's soft spot. ｜ 尽管是无稽之谈，但对于塞塔蕾来说，这种来自沙漠地带的信仰，刚好可以击中她的软肋。
- Ah, no! I'll get right to work! ｜ 呃，一定，一定！

- Remember the first time we met? You fainted after inhaling Spirit Borneol... ｜ 记得我们第一次见面的时候，你就因为吸入「灵酚香」陷入昏迷了吧？

- Ah, many things! Some love their feet, some their feathers... ｜ 啊，浮流鸟受到喜爱的地方有很多，有人喜欢它的脚掌，有人喜欢它的羽冠…

- An opposing piece based on the Large Cryo Slime.\nTwirly-Whirly often helps gather apples from trees, and has even learned to bait Large Cryo Slimes into jumping, using their outer spikes to knock said apples down.\nThe Lil' Large Cryo slimes will use Cryo attacks against the Lil' Fungi. If paired with Hydro-aligned pieces, it can cause significant disruption through freezing... It is itself defended by a Cryo Ward. Its defenses might crumble in the face of Elemental Reactions... ｜ 以「大型冰史莱姆」为原型设计的对手棋子。\n「转转悠悠兽」常常帮忙收集树上的苹果，还学会了引诱大型冰史莱姆起跳，用它们外壳上的尖刺帮忙把苹果从树上敲下来…\n「小小大型冰史莱姆」会使用冰元素的攻击招式攻击小小灵蕈。和水属性的棋子配合的话，可以冻结目标，带来不小的干扰…自身被冰元素护罩所保护，如果用能与之反应的元素攻击的话，或许能突破它的防御。

- Alright then, we're going to head back and look for Mayta. He should be back at the tribe settlement right now... ｜ 好啦，那我们就先回部族去找马伊塔了。唔…他现在应该在部族里吧…

- Buffs:\nGeo DMG increased.\nThe Abyss Tumor can be effectively damaged now that you have been granted Mavuika's power.\n\nNotable Hazards:\nThe Abyss's influence has greatly increased the HP of monsters in the area.\nThe Abyss Tumor is shielded by Abyssal Pylon(s) that must first be destroyed. ｜ 增益效果：\n可造成的岩元素伤害提升。\n在玛薇卡赋予的力量下，可对「深渊瘤石」产生有效攻击了。\n\n需要注意的危机：\n受到深渊力量的影响，此地魔物的生命值都得到了显著提高。\n「深渊界门」为「深渊瘤石」形成了坚实的护盾，需首先破坏「深渊界门」。
- "A crybaby who loved to listen to the ducks call at night." ｜ 「爱听夜鸭鸣叫的爱哭鬼。」
- Vengeful? Why? ｜ 报复？为什么呢？
- Here, take this. I picked some while I was out. Much cheaper to cook for yourself than eat at Good Hunter! You have to scrimp and save if you want to get by. ｜ 喏，这个给你，我在路上采了一些，自己做饭可比叫猎鹿人的餐便宜多了。过日子就要这样精打细算。
- My husband and I were both adventurers, but he passed away from an accident. ｜ 我和我的丈夫以前都是冒险家，结果后来出了事故，他就不在了。
- #Clue: Initial suspicions{SPACE} ｜ 线索·最初的嫌疑

- Th—They're already on to us!? ｜ 我们…我们这就已经暴露了吗？
- Come on, take the goods. ｜ 快，把「货」拿好。

- Atmospheric visibility is acceptable today... Enough that you can see that tower over there, yes? ｜ 今天大气的能见度还可以…总之你能望到那边的塔吧。
- ...Abyssal Corrosion Syndrome. ｜ 「渊蚀综合征」。
- A life without change, paired with unchanging coffee... ｜ 一成不变的生活，搭配一如既往的咖啡…
- Why is the Bravebeard so formidable? I wish I could be as strong as him. ｜ 为什么虬髯公那么厉害呢？我要是也有那么厉害就好了。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 消灭所有魔物
- Are you serious? You're telling us that within a day, our faces are going to rot like yours? ｜ 你说什么？不出一天我们的脸也会像你的一样烂掉？
- Hehehe... Let's hope it's really that simple. ｜ 呵呵呵…希望真的能那样顺利。
- You actually already have a lot of experience under your belt. I'm sure you just made a few silly mistakes. Maybe you exhausted yourself from working too hard recently. ｜ 其实你的经验已经很丰富了，我想这次只是操作失误吧？是不是连续工作太累了呀。
- Hmm... You claim to be regular perfume merchants, and yet... When I brought up "Amber Wine," you took it to be alcohol... ｜ 香水商人么…如果是正常经营的商人，为什么会不知道，「琥珀酒」其实不是酒呢？
- That's very generous of you! ｜ 那我也不客气了。
- Crown of the Brave ｜ 勇士的冠冕
- That was a broad summary, but not the most detailed. ｜ 好笼统的概括。
- I guess so... ｜ 话是这么说…
- An everyday Inazuman dish. The sliced Egg Roll is placed over seasoned rice. Simply made, yet full of flavor. ｜ 稻妻的家常料理之一。将切成片的鸟蛋烧放在调味过的米饭上，做法简单，美味却丝毫不打折扣。
- Azariq, you didn't just cheat, did you? ｜ 阿萨里格，你不会又使诈了吧。
- Oh, yeah! You're the best, Canotila! In that case, let's make "That Dish" together! ｜ 哦哦，不愧是夏诺蒂拉姐姐！我们就一起做「那个」吧！

- (That's right, we've got this book! Who knew it would come in handy here?) ｜ （对哦，还有这个呢！没想到这本书还能在这里派上用场。）

- Hey, Tenryou Commission! I'm the one you're looking for! I did it, I'm behind everything! Arataki Itto is innocent! ｜ 喂，天领奉行的人，来吧，来抓我，所有的事情都是我干的，跟荒泷一斗没关系。
- My friend, you can resupply here before you venture into the desert. ｜ 准备前往沙漠冒险的朋友，可以来我这里补充物资哦。
- Awaken the Fungi's potential ｜ 焕发蕈兽的潜能
- Fortunately, our boss has, in his wisdom, prepared a contingency plan! ｜ 还好老板高明，早就准备了应对预案。
- Do you believe that, too? ｜ 你也信吗？
- Solemn Purity ｜ 严正净衣

- Wait, this is... a final fragment! But why is there a ninth? ｜ 啊，这是最后一块碎片！为什么会有第九块？

- As such, we believe that the defense's hypothesis is, in fact, supported by sufficient evidence. ｜ 所以我们认为，由林尼方提出的猜想，拥有足够的证据支持。
- Leave. You shouldn't be here. ｜ 赶紧离开，这里可不是你该来的地方。

- Hahaha, just kiddin'! I'm just a bartender working night shifts here. ｜ 哈哈哈开玩笑的，我只是酒馆的晚班招待啦。
- A wooden sign placed here by "Claw Convoy" staff, demarcating the area of activity for adopted animals. Use the Inscribed Mirror to find adopted animals that live nearby. ｜ 「伴爪同行」工作人员竖立在此处的木牌，标明了被认养动物的活动范围。使用「铭随流镜」，找到在附近生活的被认养动物吧。

- S—Such precise numbers! ｜ 好…好精准的数字！

- You spend some time perusing the stalls and play-testing "Bunshin Phantasm," "Akitsu Harpastum," and "A Little Fox's Daydream."\nSoon, night falls. ｜ 在这之后，你们游玩了不少摊位，也浅试了各组的「分身幻梦」、「秋津羽球」与「小狐狸的白日梦」…\n时间很快就来到了夜晚…
- Well, Paimon was the one who gave it away in the first place. ｜ 本来也是派蒙说漏嘴了。
- Why must you do that, anyway? Sheesh! You're just a stone statue! ｜ 为什么非要吓到别人呀，真是的！明明只是个石像而已！
- Unlike what you hear from most histories, the people of Remuria were not ordinary humans like the Fontainians. Rather, they were a new race, their bodies having been cast from stone, with Ichor for blood. ｜ 与通常所流传的历史不同，雷穆利亚的居民并非是和枫丹人一样的普通人类，而是以石头为身躯，灵露为血液的新种族。
- Wow, you're pretty polite! ｜ 喔！你这个人还怪客气的。
- That's right. You should have gotten the gist of the content in my thesis when I was explaining it earlier. So, ask away. ｜ 嗯，刚刚你也了解了一些论文的内容，随便问问就行了。
- Go to the worksite to ask around for news ｜ 前往工地打听消息
- Osse ｜ 小呜斯
- Hmm, that does make sense... Actually, why don't we bring him back to Mazkal now that he's being a bit less rowdy? ｜ 说的也是…不如趁现在它没那么闹腾了，带它回去找玛兹嘉小姐吧！
- Maybe they might have even developed a spectrum of colors... White, red, and gold... Brand new species in their own right. ｜ 说不定还会有各种各样的颜色，白的、红的、金的…那会是一个全新的品种。
- Wow, this Chilled Meat looks pretty good to me... Now I just have one more ingredient left to find. ｜ 这些「冷鲜肉」看起来还不错啊…嗯，这样就只差一种食材了。

- Oh wait, it seems we have to write our wish on a lantern... So I guess just thinking about it won't be enough. ｜ 嗯…等一下，愿望好像是要写在霄灯上的，我直接许的话，会不会不灵啊…
- But I can now hit five out of ten shots, at least... And it's all thanks to you. ｜ 不过，现在我射出的十支箭里，已经有五支能上靶了…这都是多亏了您的示范。

- Springtime Folding Screen: A Touch of Red ｜ 春曦屏风-「一点红」
- Please take heed of the safety of the people, the ferocious animals and of course, yourselves! ｜ 附近居民的安全，这些凶猛动物的安全，当然了，还有你们自己的安全，都要注意啊！
- In people's imagination, the nobility's living expenses are orders of magnitude above the common folk. So for someone as noble as Kamisato Ayaka, surely she too must lead a life of wanton luxury.\nThis statement is only half right, however.\nAyaka does ostensibly live in a much more particular manner than the ordinary citizen.\nThe costs of studying flower arrangement and tea ceremony, sampling fine teas, and enjoying exotic flowers daily are also by no means small. However, these are all skills that she must master as a young lady of a noble house — such commitments can hardly be called "wanton."\nThe things that can truly make Ayaka smile are, in fact, ordinary things that even the common folk can enjoy.\nThe making of snacks, fishing for goldfish by the ponds, squirreling herself away to read the latest novels from Yae Publishing House... Each one of these is but a tiny matter.\nAt such times, she is not the adored Shirasagi Himegimi, or Lady Ayaka, mistress of the great Kamisato estates. She is just "Ayaka," an ordinary girl like any other.\nHere, she sets her dignified externalized persona aside and sets her true, casual self free. Only as "Ayaka" can she lay down her heavy burdens and do the things that ordinary girls can do.\nWhen hungry at night, she sneaks past the servants into the kitchen and makes herself some chazuke while humming a little tune. During tea ceremony classes, she might surreptitiously try to use the tea leaves to indulge in some romance-related astrology... The list of her little escapades goes on.\nThough she has never told anyone this, Ayaka treasures her time as an ordinary girl above all else, for these moments of freedom are things she rarely ever has. ｜ 在民众的想象中，贵族世家吃穿用度规格远超常人，那高贵如神里绫华，一定也过着极其奢侈、极其肆意的生活吧。\n然而，这样的想法只对了一半。\n单从形式而言，绫华的生活确实较寻常百姓讲究得多。\n平日里钻研花道、茶道，品名茶、赏奇花的开销也着实不小。不过，这些都是身为贵族大小姐的她必须掌握的技能，并无「肆意」一说。\n真正能让绫华露出笑容的，反而是那些寻常百姓也能享受的小事。\n譬如制作点心，譬如在池塘边捞金鱼，又譬如躲起来阅读八重堂新出的小说…无一不是小事。\n这种时刻的她，不是受人景仰的白鹭公主，不是掌管神里大宅的绫华大人，而是普普通通的「少女绫华」。\n卸下端庄持重的对外形象，绽放出随性自在的真我。唯有作为「少女绫华」时，她才能放下重担，做普通女孩也能做的事。\n深夜肚子饿了，避开佣人偷偷溜到厨房，哼着歌为自己做一碗茶泡饭；茶道课时，偷偷根据茶叶的形状占卜恋爱运势…等等。\n虽然从未向他人说明，但绫华无比珍惜自己作为普通少女的时间。因为，这样的自由时刻实在很少。
- The Dark Side of Dawn ｜ 晨曦的暗面

- There is a saying circulating among the shrines claiming that if you weave Naku Weed into a ring and wrap it around your body, it can dispel disaster and bring good fortune. So, do you believe that? I, however, personally find the plant's paralyzing effect a little more practical. ｜ 神社中流传着一种说法，将鸣草织成一个圈缠在身上，就能祛灾祈福，你信吗？我倒觉得，鸣草，还是麻痹效果更实用。
- Just what kind of troubles could a Fonta Vending Machine possibly have? All it needs to do is accept customers' currency and produce product. - Character Details ｜ 角色详细
- Nothing at all! ｜ 没、没什么！
- I love Inazuma's petite desserts, as well as all culinary dishes subtle and light. Similarly, I also like the feel of my homeland's fabrics, as well as the practice of taking a bath after a long working day. But on the flip side, I also adore the soft waves of Fontaine's seas, as well as the beautiful scenery underneath the waters.\nSometimes, I wonder if everything is in fact predestined, and if I'm still living in the shadow of my past. But then, another question always follows — would the answer to that really change anything? In any case, I'm still me, living in my present. Even if I'm only the way I am due to what has happened in my past, my future is still in my own hands, and no one in this world can really change that. ｜ 我喜欢稻妻的点心、喜欢清淡的食物…我喜欢家乡布料的触感、喜欢每天结束后泡个澡…但我也喜欢枫丹温柔的海水、喜欢海里美不胜收的景色…\n我常常会想，自己是否并没有摆脱「过去」对我造成的影响，是否今天的一切都是命中注定…\n但那又如何呢？我就是我，活在此刻。就算过去的一切塑造了如今的我，未来的路，也依旧由我自己选择，谁都无法改变这点。
- Kujou Takayuki ｜ 九条孝行

- Wow... What a crazy coincidence... ｜ 居然这么巧吗…

- Everyone knows when the next long-distance shipment will be arriving, so our work schedule is quite flexible if we only accept a few hours of work at any one time. ｜ 每个人对下一单长途货物抵达的时间都心里有数，只接一到两个时辰的单，工作安排起来就很灵活！
- Besides, I am in no way obligated to instruct commoners on basic courtesies. ｜ 而且，我也没有义务指点你应该怎么讲礼貌。
- I have. ｜ 已经办好了。
- Though Neuvillette believed Childe to be innocent, the Oratrice <color=#759BA7>judged him as guilty</color> in the end, and even Furina didn't know why. ｜ 尽管那维莱特认为「公子」无罪，但最终谕示机还是<color=#759BA7>宣判「公子」有罪</color>，就连芙宁娜都不清楚其中原因。

- But our mission at Yae Publishing House is to brings dreams and happiness to the masses. It would be a crying shame if we couldn't even help one adorable little girl fulfill her wish. ｜ 不过八重堂可是要带给人梦想和快乐的，如果连可爱女孩子的心愿都满足不了，就太说不过去了。

- How's my reputation in Mondstadt? ｜ 我在蒙德城的声望…

- Shortcut Wheel Configured ｜ 轮盘设置成功
- Ever since I was little, I've longed for the world outside of Inazuma. I liked to travel and I disliked being controlled by my parents. ｜ 我从小就向往稻妻之外的广阔世界，喜欢到处游历，不喜欢受父母管束。
- Hmm... Sure, here are the treats. Please take a look. ｜ 喔…好的，这是点心，请您看看吧。
- But Wriothesley said he never resented you, right? Isn't that a good thing? ｜ 但根据公爵的说法， 他并没有怨恨你呀，这不是挺好的吗？
- Whoa! What kind of marksmanship is that!? ｜ 哎吔！这什么枪法！
