- Sounds pretty badass! ｜ 听起来还挺威风的嘛…

- Noelle, why don't you choose the final training target? ｜ 那最后一个训练对象，就让诺艾尔自己选择吧。
- I hope you'll be able to catch a fish today... ｜ 但愿凯万先生今天能钓到鱼…
- Wait, what... C'mon, you're talking in riddles! Are you just annoyed that Zhiqiong's not well or something? ｜ 什么呀…这个人说话怎么不明不白的！明明你只是在嫌弃志琼身体状态不好吧！
- Just pretend you never heard anything, okay? You have my thanks. ｜ 你就当没听到，好吗？算我谢谢你。

- Of course. No matter what, we only take on legitimate cases. We don't make our money by revealing details of other people's day-to-day life just for the sake of it. ｜ 是啊，再怎么说，没有正当理由，只是单纯地揭露他人的生活细节，这样的钱还是不能赚的。

- Hehe, gotta say, this suits you really well! Nothing boosts morale like good food! ｜ 倒是挺适合你呢，能在需要的时候鼓舞大家的士气！
- After all, Sunset Vermillionite is so rare, Paimon doubts many competitors will really be able to find any. If it turns out some of them have given up already, we'll be able to take things a little more slowly. ｜ 毕竟鸣霞浮生石这么难找，想必没多少人能拿到吧…如果竞争对手提前放弃了的话，我们就不用那么着急了。
- ...Bah. I'm no good at formal conversation. If we were back with the tribe, I'd have treated you to a drink of water at least. ｜ …这谈话场面实在不太讲究。如果是在部族里的话，我至少能请您喝上一杯水。
- Oh no! The boss is back! ｜ 完蛋了！主人回来了！

- Your people!? ｜ 他、他们…？

- With the lift provided by the balloons restored, the abnormal vibrations come to a sudden halt.\nThe village ceases its descent and gradually ascends back to its original altitude, while the powerful air currents disperse the vast expanse of clouds... ｜ 随着升力恢复正常，异常的震动也完全停息。\n小镇不再下坠，反而慢慢向原本所在的高度攀升，强烈的气流排开了大片云层…

- They should be safe for now. ｜ 那边暂时安全了。
- Huh... Is... Is it over? It all kinda feels like a dream... ｜ 刚刚那是…这就…结束了吗？唔…总觉得好像做了一场大梦一样…

- Funds provided by Childe. The clinking of the coins within lifts a person's spirits. ｜ 「公子」提供的经费。袋子里叮叮当当的响声让人心情愉快。
- Speaking of which, Mom used to go to the nearby shrine to pray for my dad and I. She'd offer some Sakura Bloom petals there too. ｜ 话说回来，妈妈以前经常去附近的神龛为爸爸和我祈祷，在那里献上绯樱绣球的花瓣。
- It could have been done as an apology for the incident with Lord Childe, or as thanks for his help in tying the All-Devouring Narwhal down... ｜ 给当初错审「公子」大人案件的事致歉，感谢「公子」大人在原始胎海中拖延了吞星之鲸…

- ...Your memories have returned? ｜ …想起来了？
- I am Albedo, Chief Alchemist of the Knights of Favonius. You carry the aura of the stars, interesting... I would like to study you, if you do not mind. I'm certain we will have many opportunities to be alone in the future. ｜ 我是阿贝多，西风骑士团首席炼金术士。我对你身上星海的气息很感兴趣，想要就近观察研究。相信以后我们会有很多独处的机会。

- ...So, just a regular souvenir? ｜ …普通的旅游纪念品吗。
- With the monsters gone, the small protrusion now awaits your discovery, poking out of the ground like a shy flower bud. ｜ 在魔物倒下之后，它就如一枝害羞的花苞般探出头来，等待你们的发现。
- Flaming Flower ｜ 烈焰花
- Anyway, right now we're preparing for an exceptional Turnfire Night ceremony, and we need to find a suitable flame bearer. From what I've heard about your adventures, I believe you'd be perfect for the role. ｜ 总之，现在我们需要一位合适的游火人，来主持一次额外的回火夜。我听闻了两位的冒险故事，你们是不二之选。
- Hello, what can I help you with? ｜ 你好，有什么需要帮助的吗？

- But work's so busy I don't have the time to check it out. ｜ 不过我工作太多了，是实在没空。

- Washizu, the head of Higi Village. He used to be a very nice person... But now he's very strange. ｜ 绯木村的村长鹫津…他以前是个很好的人，但现在…很奇怪。

- At the start of the Action Phase: The player that goes first will generate a "Hot Potato."\nSpecial defeat condition: If the "Hot Potato" is on your side when the End Phase is calculated, you immediately lose the duel.\nThe "Hot Potato" will switch to the other player's side each time a Character on their side uses a Skill, and the "Hot Potato" will gain 1 point of "Piping Hot." (Max 4 stacks).\nEnd Phase: Remove the "Hot Potato," and deal 2 Physical DMG to the Active Character of the player whose side of the field the Hot Potato is on. This damage is increased by 1 for each point of "Piping Hot" accumulated. ｜ 行动阶段开始时：在先手牌手方生成「烫烫爆弹」。\n特殊失败条件：如果结束阶段中「烫烫爆弹」在我方结算，则你输掉对局。\n「烫烫爆弹」所在阵营的角色使用技能后：将「烫烫爆弹」转移到对方阵营，并使其累积1点「烫烫热度」（最多累积到4点）。\n结束阶段：移除「烫烫爆弹」，对所在阵营的出战角色造成2点物理伤害；另外，每有1点「烫烫热度」都使此伤害+1。

- When Mizuki first returned to Inazuma, she was so skittish. Whenever she saw me on the street, she would immediately avert her eyes... Oh, me? No, I didn't call her out on it. It was pretty fun to watch her squirm, actually. Sometimes, she would turn back to sneak a glance once we passed each other... I thought about turning around to face her, but I'm sure it would have scared her straight back into her baku form and sent her running for the hills.\nBut, now... she's a lot more comfortable. Well, comfortable enough to criticize me in the reader correspondence column of That's Life, at least. The baku are quick to adapt, I suppose. ｜ 瑞希刚回来稻妻那一会，总是一副揣着心事的样子，明明在路上看见了我，却还要把目光撇开…我？我当然没有主动搭讪她。还想多看一阵她那副别扭的模样呢。如果我没想错，等我们俩擦肩而过之后，她还要扭过头，瞪着眼睛瞅我两眼…要是我这时候再回头看她，只怕瑞希要被我吓得露出原形，捂着耳朵飘走了。\n不过现在嘛…她都已经会在闲事月刊的读者来信里给我挑刺了。食梦貘的成长，真是迅速哪。

- #Ah, my dear {NICKNAME}, you're here at last! Wondrous, wondrous! Come, let us be off, immediately! ｜ #亲爱的{NICKNAME}！太好了，您总算来了！咱们出发！快快快！

- There was once a survivor of that race deep within the golden desert who was friends with Queen Aranyani and the ruler of Valuka. Perhaps there are more stories to be found in the eternal oasis. ｜ 那个种族曾经有一位遗民，在金色的沙漠深处，与千树之王、巴螺迦的王交游。在永恒的绿洲当中，或许还有更多的故事吧。

- Most people in the Collective of Plenty have huge frames with big, well-developed muscles, making shorties like myself the odd ones out. When I was young, people always saw me as the one who needed protecting, and later on, when I wanted to join the fitness club, the elders tried to stop me. I joined anyway, of course, and even though I managed to injure myself a bunch of times at the beginning... I was determined to stick at it. Maybe it's because I wanted to live up to my Ancient Name, or maybe it's because I just didn't wanna be the object of other people's pity anymore. ｜ 沃陆之邦的族民大多体格健硕，我这样的小个子可不常见。小时候，周围的人都默认我是需要被保护的对象。后来我不顾长辈的阻拦加入了健身俱乐部，那段时间没少受伤…一路坚持下来，或许是为了践行我的古名，或许也是因为我不喜欢他人眼中的怜悯。

- "Please remember to take all your tools and personal belongings with you and seal off the mine entrance before you leave. And for the last time, please pay no heed to the rumors regarding Hong's letter and the hidden treasure!" ｜ 「届时请收拾好工具和行李，封闭矿洞。不要再想着屋里前矿主留下的遗训和宝藏的传说了！」
- Roll Phase\nYou will roll 8 Elemental Dice at the start of each Round.\nAfter throwing these dice, you will have 1 chance to choose any number of Elemental Dice and reroll them. ｜ 投掷阶段\n在每个回合的开始，你会获得并投掷8个「元素骰」。\n投掷后，你还有1次机会选择任意数量元素骰进行「重投」。
- If words are the vehicles of wisdom, being literate is undoubtedly the starting point of the pursuit of knowledge. Collei, however, seems to have only barely reached the foot of the mountain of knowledge.\nWhen she first arrived in Gandharva Ville, even the outspoken Tighnari showed obvious hesitation, making repeated inquiries with the General Mahamatra if she had walked through the wrong door, since he had yet to make any plans to teach preschool level courses.\nStill, after several twists and turns, Collei did finally become a trainee. To facilitate her learning of words, Tighnari gathered a wide assortment of books and documents, in the hope that Collei would soon master enough words through extensive reading.\nApart from the literacy encyclopedias for children and the mandatory-reading academic papers that made her head swell, Collei can most often be found reading fairy tale picture books from Mondstadt.\nThe logic is simple: those books tend to have fewer words and more pictures. Even if you do not know the words, chances are that you can still guess their meaning by looking at the illustrations.\nHowever, reading only children's books hardly sufficed to keep up with her curriculum. Once she had picked up slightly more words, she immediately started to look for new extracurricular reading materials.\nAccording to some travelers who had passed through Avidya Forest, there was a type of book in Inazuma known as the "light novel," which was easier to read than academic papers, and with fewer illustrations than picture books. To Collei, that sounded like the exact type of book she needed.\nMore importantly, the plots of these "light novels" were often so incredibly riveting that as soon as they got a copy, many readers just had to finish reading it in one go, even if they had to stay up all night.\nThat definitely sounded tempting to Collei, since she had to force herself, more often than not, to stay awake long enough to finish her readings.\nOne day after her forest patrol, Collei excitedly ran back to her dormitory with the newest volume of "Onibudou." She was so ready to pull an all-nighter reading the light novel — and as it turned out, she indeed stayed awake that night.\n"My sealed power!" "The lonesome avenger!" "You'd be wise to stay away from me!" "I shall never witness the grace of the gods!"...\n—Covering her head with the quilt, Collei tossed and turned upon her mattress the entire night. Even as the dawn broke, she had not yet torn her mind away from these words. ｜ 如果说文字是智慧的载体，那么识字毫无疑问是求学的起点。而柯莱，似乎刚刚抵达知识之峰的山脚。\n她初至化城郭时，就连一向快言快语的提纳里也面露犹豫之色，再三询问那位大风纪官是不是走错了门，自己现阶段还没有开学前班的打算。\n几经波折，柯莱才拜入老师门下。为了提高柯莱的识字量，提纳里搜罗了各类书籍文献，希望柯莱能通过广泛阅读掌握生词新字。\n除去儿童用提瓦特识字大全和叫人头大却不得不读的学科论文，柯莱最常读的书是蒙德的童话绘本。\n原因无他——童书的字少配图多，即便不认识字也能看图猜个大概。\n不过，只读童书显然无法跟上教学的进程，于是，等到识字量稍涨，柯莱便开始物色新的课外读物。\n听偶尔路过道成林的旅人们说，稻妻有种名叫「轻小说」的书籍，内容比论文易懂，插画比童书略少，正是拿来过渡的好选择。\n更重要的是，据说「轻小说」情节往往令人手不释卷，许多读者一拿到书，不惜熬夜也要当天读完。\n这对每晚强振精神才能坚持苦读的柯莱而言，非常值得一试。\n某日巡林结束，柯莱捧着新一卷《鬼武道》兴高采烈地跑回宿舍，迫不及待地开始挑灯夜读——那一晚她也确实没睡着。\n「封印之力！」、「孤高复仇者！」、「离我远点才是上策！」、「众神的恩宠与我无缘！」…\n——柯莱把头闷在被子里翻来覆去一整夜，都没能从这些字句里缓过劲来。
- Let the poetry well up within you. Let it pool, and offer it up to the city of wind and idylls. ｜ 让诗从心中流淌出来，将它收集，献给这座风与牧歌的城邦。

- You and Kinich defeat the Mountain King together. The Mountain King charges toward the altar of the Sacred Flame, and the aura of the Abyss is cleansed and dissipates amidst the fire, along with the King's vitality. Despite his shock, Kinich rushes into the flame and attempts to rescue the Mountain King. Power flows forth from his Ancient Name, and the invisible fire walls off the Sacred Flame's power. Recognizing the familiar Ancient Name, the Mountain King recalls the request of Burkina, the previous owner of said Name, and decides to carry the pain of the past and continue forward. ｜ 你和基尼奇联手击败了山王，山王冲向圣火祭坛，在火焰的灼烧中，身上的深渊气息逐渐被净化，它的生命气息也随之消散。基尼奇震惊之余，冲入火海，想要救出山王。基尼奇的古名里流淌出一股力量，透明的火隔绝了圣火的燃烧。山王辨认出了熟悉的古名，回想起古名的前任主人——布基纳的嘱托，决定背负过去的痛苦，继续前行。

- All of this was so encouraging to hear. It made me feel that my dear old companion's sacrifice was not in vain. ｜ 这样的说法，让我备受鼓励，我的老友做出的牺牲，果然是有价值的。
- Before one makes any individual comparisons, broadly speaking, females are slightly edged out by males in raw physicality.\nDehya, likewise, was not born with immense might. Even so, the other mercenaries have a great many reasons to hold her in high regard.\nFirstly, though she is not the strongest in her profession, she has force enough all the same.\nShould one doubt this, they merely need to test the weight of her blade. To make such a greatsword dance and flow without sufficient strength would be impossible otherwise.\nSecondly, she has tremendous combat instincts. It is known that the greatsword, Dehya's weapon of choice, demands a trade-off between force and speed. Should such a weapon fail to achieve a decisive first strike against a sufficiently mobile foe, it will prove more burden than a boon for the wielder. In moments like these, Dehya uses her superior insight and technique to overcome the opposition.\nSometimes, she will cast her weapon aside, eschewing the edge of a sword for the weight behind her fists. She will even hurl her weapon at foes without warning to buy a fleeting opportunity. How any such moment plays out all depends on the actual conditions presented by each battle.\nAside being good in a fight, she also knows plenty about surviving in the desert.\nThe commissions that the Eremites most often take will have them serving as bodyguards against raiders without outside support, herding away dangerous creatures, and assisting their clients in avoiding dreaded weather conditions.\nSometimes, they even find assignments that have them acting as guides, helping caravans, adventurers, and researchers reach their desired destinations.\nDehya knows how to deal with startled scorpion swarms, how to circle around vultures to avoid getting entangled with those nimble annoyances, and how to negotiate and minimize danger when faced with robbers.\nClients like it when matters are handled thoroughly and practically. To earn true praise from their employers, mercenaries must offer more than just brute capacity for violence.\nIndeed, the ability to overcome one hundred or even a thousand foes has its limits, for when sandstorms scour the earth and sky, even the mightiest warrior will be buried beneath its shroud.\nA wise mercenary knows when to retreat, and how to preserve themselves even while meeting their objectives, for doing so exemplifies the true heights of strategy. ｜ 在不讨论个体差异的前提下，通常而言，女性的肉体力量稍逊于男性。\n迪希雅并非天生伟力的类型。即便如此，佣兵们依然十分认可她，其中必有原因。\n首先，她的力气不是佣兵群体中最强的，但也足够大了。\n要是对这一点有疑问的话，去拎一拎她的大剑吧。想将那么沉重的武器舞得灵活，没有一定的膂力根本做不到。\n其次，她还有着丰富的战斗智慧。众所周知，迪希雅选择大剑这种笨重的武器势必会牺牲一部分灵活性，战斗时如果一击不得手，而对方又足够机动，重型武器就会变为战士的劣势。这种时候，她必须靠着过人的观察能力和战斗技巧与对手周旋。\n有时她会抛开武器，用拳头战斗，有时她会冷不丁地掷出武器换一个转瞬即逝的机会。具体怎么做，全看战场实际情形。\n战斗之外，她还懂得许多沙漠生存技巧。\n沙漠佣兵们接到的最常见的委托，无外乎担任保镖防范劫掠、驱赶沙漠里的危险动物、协助雇主躲避恐怖天气灾害之类。\n有时，他们也会充作向导，帮商队、冒险家及学者们寻路。\n迪希雅知道如何处理受惊扰的成群毒蝎，怎样与鹫鸟周旋才能避免与那些灵活的家伙缠斗，遭遇劫掠时如何谈判才能将冲突最小化。\n依照实际需要利落解决问题才是雇主最在乎的事。一个佣兵要想在雇主间积累口碑，可不能只会打架。\n身处黄沙中，能敌百人、敌千人，意义也有限。铺天盖地的大沙暴吹起时，所有战士都将被掩埋在沙砾下面。\n真正聪明的佣兵知道何时战何时退。能在战斗中达成目的保全自己，才是上策。

- Don't worry, Surintendante Chevalmarin hasn't approached me about my overspending so far this month. Which means, I still have plenty of Mora left in my private reserve. ｜ 无需担心，海薇玛夫人这个月还没有拿出超支单，说明我的小金库运转良好。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Collei once again touched someone's hand during a certain year's Ludi Harpastum in Mondstadt.\nThe city was elaborately decorated with lights and lanterns. The streets were jam-packed with people. The sky was getting darker, and the stage was in full swing.\nA girl in flaming red just grabbed her hand, took her out of that cramped wooden box, and squeezed into the crowd.\nPeople gathered around, cheering and applauding the contestants who were playing hoops or with slingshots.\nCollei could not relate to them. No matter how well they could play these most childish games, what use were they in hunting game out in the wild?\nYet, the girl with her was extremely passionate about these little games. She would cheer and whoop at every victory, and hand out the prizes she won to the children.\nCollei was even more baffled. If not for the rewards, why would anyone participate in these activities? Was there really any fun in them?\nSo she sneaked to a corner and picked up a slingshot to try her hand at it — in the end, one of the more than ten shots she fired eventually hit the edge of the target.\n"Yay! I hit it!" Collei turned her head excitedly. "Hey! Did you see..."\nIt was only then that she realized that she had been there for quite a long time and the girl in red had already left.\nIn the days that followed, Collei had been practicing day in and day out. Gradually, she became more than familiar with the sounds of drawing a bowstring and throwing darts. She practiced for a long time, until she would seldom miss a shot out of ten.\nEvery time she pulled the bowstring back, Collei remembered the excitement of hitting the target for the first time on that night.\nAnd that when the girl grabbed her hand and ran towards the crowd, her palm was as warm as the sun. ｜ 柯莱再一次触碰他人的手，是在某年蒙德羽球节期间。\n城里张灯结彩，街头人声鼎沸。夜幕织向天陲，舞台气氛正酣。\n火红的少女自说自话地拉起她的手，离开狭小的木箱，挤入人群。\n人们围在一起，为套圈、弹弓之类简单幼稚的比赛喝彩叫好。\n柯莱一度感到无法理解。这些小游戏玩得再好，又能在城外猎到多少食物呢？\n可同行的少女却以极大热情投入其中，为每一次胜利欢呼雀跃，将到手的奖品分发给孩童们。\n柯莱不明白。假如不是为了奖励，为什么还要参加这些活动？难道，其中真会有什么乐趣吗？\n她偷偷溜到角落，拿起弹弓小试身手——结果，十多发里有一发碰到了靶子边缘。\n「中了！」柯莱兴冲冲地转过头，「喂！你快看…」\n这时她才发现自己沉迷其中已经过去了很长时间，红衣少女早已离开。\n后来的日子里，柯莱越发投入练习，逐渐听熟了引弦与掷镖的声音。她练了很长时间，直到十多发里罕有一发落空。\n每次拉动弓弦，柯莱总会想起那天夜里第一次击中目标的激动。\n还有那位少女拉起她跑向人群时，手心如暖阳般的温度。

- Haha, don't you worry about that! ｜ 这你就放一万个心吧！

- No, that can't be it... There must be something wrong with the way I'm trying to attract guests. ｜ 不可能啊，这怎么可能…不对，一定是我招揽客人的手法错了。
- The risk is growing, but it poses no threat to me. ｜ 风险渐涨，不过我没什么问题。
- New Entry ｜ 新怪物
- I didn't realize quite how strong the enemies that you have to fight are... ｜ 没想到你需要面对如此强大的敌人…
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Dori ｜ 多莉
- Ann, Rene... Shall we travel together? ｜ 安、雷内，我们一起去旅行，好吗？
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Alright, calm down. Let me be clear: I'm still not all that interested in Kshahrewar. I'm just here to see how the project is going. ｜ 慢着，话先说在前头，我对刹诃伐罗学院还是没什么兴趣，只是来看看合作课题的情况。
- Hope and patience are close companions. ｜ 希望与等待总是相伴相随。
- How are things going with the unreturned books? ｜ 未归还图书搜集得怎么样啦？
- Low HP: II ｜ 生命值低·其二
- The Scribe is only responsible for documenting their findings, but he'd be able to discern any anomalies with his keen eyes... ｜ 虽然书记官主要负责录入工作，但如果靠他那双敏锐的眼睛，一定可以发现其中的异样…
- Doushin ｜ 同心
- Hm, fair... Collei, what have you been reading lately? ｜ 柯莱，你最近有在读什么书吗？
- We thought our Aranara carvings would be a big hit too. Who would've thought... ｜ 本来以为这次的兰那罗木刻也会大受欢迎，谁知道…
- Actually, Momoyo, we've got something to ask of you... ｜ 那个，百代小姐，其实我们有一件事想求你…
- According to the evaluations of my peers, they are the type who can speak to you for an entire day without saying anything. I want to put that to the test. ｜ 我的同行是这么评价的：他们能与你说上一整天的话，但一个字也不说。我要挑战一下这个传说。
- "I will never forget that you took my Vision away. As long as I still breathe, I will keep coming for you!" ｜ 「老子不会忘记你夺我「神之眼」之恨的，只要还有一口气，就会再来找你！」
- Oh... ｜ 唔…
- Mizuki was right after all... Paimon wasn't expecting him to be so polite, though. ｜ 所以他真的是那个…这么礼貌，我有点意外。
- Hey, why are you starting to sound like Alhaitham? ｜ 喂，干嘛学他说话？
- Hello. ｜ 你们好。
- Sure enough, you're at the center of the action once again. You two truly are like the main characters in your own light novel. ｜ 果然，你们又一次出现在了热点的前沿，还真是轻小说主角般的人物呢。
- It should be around here... But why can't I find it? ｜ 应该还在的才对…可是怎么也找不到了…
- Diluc ｜ 迪卢克
- Eh? Uh... Hm. ｜ 啊？哦…嗯。
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢你了。
- We don't want to buy this stuff, Ma'am. We're just asking if someone else came to purchase them from you recently. ｜ 不是我们想要买这些，奶奶，我们是想问这几天有没有人来找你买过这些东西。
- Researcher's Notes ｜ 学者的笔记
- A Natlan lamp with a simple design, featuring a metal lampshade and a phlogiston-based light source. It has a special umbrella-shaped cover on top, making it easier for people to lift and carry by hand. This cover also serves as a waterproof and steam-resistant barrier to protect the lamp's carrier. Though the phlogiston inside would not be extinguished by rain, its high heat would vaporize large amounts of water upon contact, potentially burning the carrier's hand. ｜ 结构简单的纳塔提灯，采用了金属灯罩搭配燃素光源的设计，并在上方特地增加了一个雨伞状的灯罩以方便人们用手提拉抓取。这种灯罩的另一个作用，便是制造防水防蒸汽隔断，以保护灯具的使用者。虽然提灯中的燃素并不会因为雨水而熄灭，但高热的燃素在接触到大量液体时会将其蒸发，并可能灼伤到使用者持灯的双手。
- Before we left that place, I picked up a stone. I thought if I could take it out with me, I would place it in the temple to Pervases in memory of Bosacius. ｜ 离开空间前，我取了一块石头。若能成功带出来，便要以此石代浮舍，放入纪念铜雀的庙宇。
- Shipping's impossible work nowadays. There's too much competition, and the margins are too small, so I've decided to switch gears. ｜ 跑船太苦了，同行抢生意抢得厉害，赚不到什么钱，我最终决定不干了。
- Start the scored flight! ｜ 开启计分飞行！
- (What happened? Just what is going on?) ｜ （怎么回事，究竟发生了什么…）
- Hehe! A real amateur if I ever met one! Proud to have you as a customer. ｜ 嘿！您瞧您果然是个外行！就该是我们的客户！
- A quiet life... ｜ 清净的生活…

---
### Part 054

- Explore further and look for divine relics ｜ 向前探索，寻找魔神古物
- That is because your adventures this far have all been limited to the Mondstadt area. ｜ 因为到目前为止，你也只是在蒙德周围展开冒险呢。
- Begin Performance ｜ 开启演奏
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Paimon's pretty sure that's not how it works, but if it clears up any misunderstandings... ｜ 虽然道理不是这么一回事，不过能撇清误会就好…
- "We would like to invite the following professional staff to set up camp here to take samples, do research and learn how we might appropriately utilize Lumenstone:" ｜ 「为调查与充分利用『流明石』晶矿的开发潜能，特邀请以下专业人员在此搭建营地，进行取样研究实验：」
- Chisel-Light Mirror Removal Interval|{param10:F1}s ｜ 琢光镜消失间隔|{param10:F1}秒
- Another Person's Message ｜ 另一人的留言
- Rest assured, Collei will recover quickly as long as she has her medicine. ｜ 放心吧，柯莱吃过药之后，很快就会好起来的。
- I think what's most important for each person is not the past, but the present. Even though we must carry the burdens from the past, there are also things we wish to strive for. ｜ 我认为，每个人最重要的不是过去，而是现在；虽然背负着昨日的重担，但也有自己想要追寻的东西。
- Spirit Orb DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 宿灵球伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Are those who have the breeze and the dew for company the only ones who may enjoy the dawn's first light? ｜ 与清风冷露为伴者，才有资格将初生曙光独享？
- (The edges of the pages blur gradually. A profoundly unfamiliar yet familiar world enters your field of vision. Here...) ｜ （书页边缘渐渐变得模糊。无比陌生而又无比亲切的世界闯入了视野。在这里…）
- Talk to the night ravens often. You might receive some interesting news or find important clues. ｜ 多和夜鸦们交谈吧，或许能听说有趣的消息，找到某些重要线索…
- A tall and spacious large shed with prominent graffiti signs, symbolizing the "Courier's Longhouse." Unlike the wind-resistant residential designs of the "Scions of the Canopy," this shed's design almost entirely disregards the potential impact of wind on internal storage, focusing solely on providing ample coverage and excellent sun and rain protection. It is said that well-sealed packages within the shed are nearly impervious to weather damage, and the true purpose of the shed is to protect the administrator's working environment. The administrator, surrounded by various goods, is generally not affected by strong winds... ｜ 高大宽敞的大型棚屋，其上带有醒目的涂鸦招牌，「讯使长屋」正是这类棚屋的标志性用户。与「悬木人」那些注重抗风设计的住宅截然不同，这种棚屋在设计上几乎完全忽略了风对内部存储货物的潜在影响，只专注于提供足够的覆盖面积以及优秀的防晒、防雨服务。据说这是因为，棚屋内密封包装良好的快件几乎不会因天气原因受损，棚屋真正需要保护的是管理员的工作环境。而处于各种货物包围中的管理员，一般不会被大风所影响…
- So that issue we were having before was due to that baddie in the Night Kingdom, huh? The Statue of The Seven sure must've been having a hard time back then... Great job, Statue! ｜ 所以之前七天神像不正常，果然是因为夜神之国里有那个坏家伙！看来七天神像之前也很辛苦呢…你很努力了，七天神像！
- A popular martial arts novel in Liyue Harbor. In a world without elemental energy or alchemy, a tale unfolds of love and hate between friends and foes. This volume tells of Jin the Seventy-Second's duel with the chief of Tupi Village. ｜ 流行璃月港的武侠小说，讲述了一个没有元素力与炼金术的世界中发生的爱恨情仇故事。本册讲述了金七十二郎与屠毗庄主的对决。
- The wharf? I haven't been there lately. ｜ 码头啊，我最近可没去那附近。
- The writing here is practically a messy scrawl. Perhaps the author doesn't really write much, or perhaps something happened. ｜ 这一本的字迹潦草。或许写作者不怎么提笔，或许发生了什么。
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- A Treasure Map Left for Shitoki ｜ 留给岻伽的「藏宝图」
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- You meddling swine! Well, go on! Tell me, what will you sell it for? ｜ 可恶…说吧，你要怎么样才肯卖给我！
- Ehhhh!? ｜ 欸——
- You're here. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你们来了。
- I was so worried he might be ill that I went to find a vet in the middle of the night to ask his advice. ｜ 我还以为它生病了，吓得连夜去找医生帮忙。
- Do you ever feel the same way? Even a place like this can be called home once you've stayed long enough. ｜ 你也会有这样的感觉吗？即使是这样的地方，住得久了，也会有家的感觉。
- "If you're in this line because you love it, however, keep pushing on." ｜ 「如果你是因为热爱『运动』而想要从事这一行业。就继续坚持下去。」
- Ad astra abyssosque, Adventurer! With effort, you shall reach the stars and conquer the abyss! ｜ 努力吧冒险家，向着星辰与深渊！
- Within a period after obtaining:\n1. Increases your character's <color=#FFCC33FF>Movement SPD</color>\n2. Increases the <color=#FFCC33FF>Wilderness Balloon search radius</color>\n\nCharges slowly ｜ 获得后一段时间内：\n1.提高角色的<color=#FFCC33FF>移动速度</color>\n2.提高<color=#FFCC33FF>搜集「野踪气球」的范围</color>\n\n充能速度：慢
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- Rough Drawing ｜ 粗糙的符文涂鸦
- A vanguard troop from the snowy land in the far north has set up camp here amidst the whispers of ancient shrines. ｜ 在呢喃低语的古老神龛之间，远北雪国的先遣部队在这里扎下了营地。
- Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- So... Your superiors have kept you quite busy recently. Why? What are they trying to accomplish? ｜ 所以，上面让你们做这么多事，究竟有什么目的？
- Fair enough. I need to give this a little thought myself. ｜ 嗯…刚好我也可以再想想。
- He even thought that I would have no reason to leave Thutmose once Ufairah was gone. ｜ 他甚至以为我和他一样，没有了优菲，也就没有了离开图特摩斯的理由。
- Ooh! Sounds like the beginning of a big story, keep going! ｜ 哦！一听到这句话，立刻就有讲故事的氛围了呢，真不错。

- Wow... That one nursery rhyme kinda says all you need to know about Snezhnayan culture... ｜ 真是残酷得很有至冬国特色的童谣呢…
- Witness the fate of the Samurai. ｜ 见证武士的宿命。
- "Salary and benefits negotiable. Would like to have regular rest time!" ｜ 「薪酬、待遇可面谈，希望有稳定休息时间！」
- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。
- Cook ｜ 烹饪
- Changsheng ｜ 长生
- Prince ｜ 小王子
- Because of The Rule of Three! This is an ancient principle, so it must be right! ｜ 因为万事皆三嘛！这是很古老的道理，所以一定是对的！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Indoor Lamp: The Twilight Sea.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「室内挂灯-『昏黄海景』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Yeah! And anyway, doesn't your family's experience make this tournament all the more meaningful? The Wisdom Orb finally means that humans and Fungi can live in peace together... ｜ 确实，如果你有这样的过去，应该更能理解这场比赛的可取之处，毕竟「意智宝珠」能让人们和蕈兽和谐相处…
- The Story Begins in a Forest Without Rain ｜ 故事始于无雨的森林
- An ancient paper whose contents are completely unintelligible.\nPerhaps there's some way to decipher the contents. ｜ 全然无法理解其中内容的古老纸张。\n或许能有什么方法解读其中的内容吧。
- {0} has not yet finished the prerequisite quest(s). This player cannot participate in the challenge. ｜ 玩家{0}未完成前置任务，无法参与挑战
- Uhh... Still thinking things over. ｜ 我们、我们想再考虑考虑。
- Yeah, yeah, we got it. Just shut up and take our coupons! ｜ 好了别废话了，乖乖把特许券收着吧！
- *sigh*... What could it have been? ｜ 唉…那到底是什么呢？
- Hmm, I'm afraid that I'm not too sure myself. *cough* I keep a pretty good eye on what's happening in the city and as far as I can tell, he just idles the days away... ｜ 这个我也不清楚，咳咳…我平时还算比较注意城里发生的事，但荒泷一斗好像就只是在混日子而已…
- Are we absolutely sure we can publish this...? ｜ 这种作品真的能顺利出版吗…
- I saw Atea, Vichama, Chuychu, and all six heroes from five hundred years ago... Not to mention, I heard the messages you left for me in my ancient name. ｜ 比如阿伽娅，维查玛，葵可，六位五百年前的部族英雄等等…还有你们留在古名中的声音。
- What the heck? What was going on with that one? Was it trying to say something? ｜ 怎么回事，那个黑蛇骑士！难道是有话想说吗？
- Huh? Do you mean the Python King — the same one who used to rule all Ochkanatlan? ｜ 嗯？你该不会是说它就是以前统治奥奇卡纳塔的那个蛇王吧？
- Do you know of a nameless samurai? ｜ 关于「无名武士」…
- Oh, that's a toughie. Yes and no. ｜ 哈哈，该怎么说呢，是也不是。
- Land of Fertility: Runaway Saurians ｜ 丰饶之地的奔行

- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Oh, Ei didn't tell you? Hehe... Allow me to show you. ｜ 嗯？难道影之前没有告诉你吗…呵呵，那就请你拭目以待了。
- Urgh... There's nothing good in these chests! Can they even be called treasure chests at this point...? ｜ 呜呜…宝箱里面一点好东西也没有，还能被称作宝箱吗…
- ■■■, get away from there! Don't ruin my flowers! ｜ 离开那里，███，不要弄坏我的花！
- Go back and look for Gorou ｜ 返回寻找五郎
- It seems okay here... ｜ 这里看起来没什么问题...

- That's right. Leave it to me. ｜ 交给我吧。

- Quick, go give them to Aru. Once you can see all the afterimages in Enkanomiya, you should be able to discover still more secrets. ｜ 快去把这个拿给亚琉看看吧。能看到渊下宫所有残影之后，一定会发现更多秘密的。

- Gurabad's Ruin - Temple of Deshret ｜ 居尔城墟·赤王神殿
- The people of the Great Bazaar love Lesser Lord Kusanali. I'd love to hear her thoughts on my Dance of Sabzeruz... Oh, no, no, forget it... If she were in the audience, I'd get stage fright... ｜ 大巴扎的大家都很喜欢小吉祥草王大人，好想听听她对我跳的花神之舞的评价呀…啊！不、不，还是算了算了。她真的来了，我肯定会紧张得不得了。
- That felt... pretty good. ｜ 心情不错。
- Albedo: "This whole island is a chunk of Mondstadt mountain. A great force dislodged it from the mountain range and cast it into the sea. As it fell, it began to spin, and ultimately landed upside-down, hence the topography you see today."\nAlbedo: "Rather interesting. Another masterwork by the Anemo Archon, Barbatos, no doubt." ｜ 阿贝多：「这整座岛屿都是来自蒙德的山体碎片，某种强大力量将它从山脉上分割出来，抛到这片海域。移动过程中，山体发生了颠倒，才变成现在这个模样。」\n阿贝多：「真有意思。这也是风神巴巴托斯的杰作吧。」
- Ah, it's you. Have you finished that Xiao Lantern? ｜ 你来了，霄灯已经做好了吗？
- Scholar's Clock ｜ 学士的时钟
- Oh no... We've got to catch up to him! ｜ 不好，我们得尽快追上他！
- Shield DMG Absorption|{param2:F1P} Elemental Mastery+{param3:I} ｜ 护盾吸收量|{param2:F1P}元素精通+{param3:I}
- You want to enter the volcano as well, right... It's possible, and I know the way. I could even tell you... ｜ 你们想进入火山，嗯…可以啊，我知道进入火山的办法，也可以告诉你们…
- 6-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 六段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Tapping Razor's Elemental Skill will cause him to rend the opponents in front of him and gain an Electro Sigil. Holding his Elemental Skill will deal AoE DMG and consume the Sigil, converting it to Energy.\nHis Elemental Burst summons the Wolf Within. It strikes alongside Razor and increases his ATK SPD.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 雷泽可以点按元素战技撕裂敌人并获得雷之印，长按元素战技则可以造成范围伤害并消耗雷之印，转化为元素能量。\n他的元素爆发可以召唤协同雷泽一起攻击的雷狼，并提升攻击速度。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。
- *sigh* Paimon may not know whether Jebrael or Tirzad is correct, but we'll definitely get an answer if we continue, right? ｜ 唉…虽然到现在也不太明白哲伯莱勒和提尔扎德到底谁对谁错，不过，只要继续走下去，一定会有答案的吧？
- Marvelous! Then, once the two of you are ready, you may go to the filming locations I have already prepared. I will give you feedback on your finished products. ｜ 太好了！那么二位准备好之后，随时可以前往我挑好的拍摄地点尝试拍摄，我也会针对拍摄好的成片提出反馈。
- You can count on us! ｜ 嘿嘿，这点小事尽管交给我们！
- Let me ask you this instead: what else do you think these paints can be used for? ｜ 倒不如说，您觉得这些颜料还能用来做什么呢？
- Hard | Score Multiplier ×{0} ｜ 困难 积分倍率 x{0}
- That's right! Who're you calling a motley crew? The pirates of the Black Nacre are a good bunch. Villains like you don't stand a chance! ｜ 没错，说人家乌合之众也太过分了！「黑水晶」号的大家都是有情义的海盗，可不能被你们这些坏家伙打败！
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Wow... Spoken like a true knight. ｜ 真…真有「骑士」的气势呢，不愧是专业的。
- F—Fortune! So where can we see this Rite of Descension anyway? ｜ 发…发财！那么请问在哪里才能看到那个「请仙典仪」呢？

- Rewards claimed ｜ 奖励已领取
- What happened while you were unconscious? ｜ 你昏迷的时候，发生了什么？
- Is there something wrong with the Holy Lyre der Himmel? ｜ 难道…天空之琴有什么问题吗？
- After all, not everyone is so well-versed in martial arts that they may solve... difficult problems the way that you do. ｜ 毕竟，不是每个人都像您一样有这么强的武艺，能够处理一些…不太容易处理的事。
- At that time, I was still a little kid who didn't know anything about the mountains. It was nighttime, and some wild beasts were following me through the forest. It was super scary!\nFinally, I was chased to a clearing, and surrounded by those beasties. For a moment, I was convinced I was gonna get eaten, but suddenly, they all backed off into the woods, and then they were gone. ｜ 那时候，我还是个小孩子，对山里的事情还没那么清楚。那时候是晚上，在林子里有什么野兽在跟着我，超级可怕的！\n最后，我被追到了一片空地。野兽从林子里走出来，把我包围了。本来我以为，我就要被吃掉了！突然，所有怪物都往后退，退到树林里，不见了。
- I assume the two of you know how to dive, right? ｜ 两位应该会潜水吧？
- We should focus on our part. If our comrades in Liyue are making their move, we need to make preparations here, too. ｜ 总之我们专注自己的事就好！现在璃月那边已经开始行动了，咱们在这边也要准备好。
- The iron mask the knight used to conceal their identity. Many have speculated about the face behind the mask. ｜ 骑士用来遮掩自己面目的铁面具，关于面具下的容貌几何曾有无数猜想。
- An intricately-made cup. Its appearance betrays nothing of its age to an observer. ｜ 从外观无从断定经历了多少岁月的精致杯盏。
- We're not here to retrieve any records. ｜ 我们不是来回收实验记录的。
- No, Matriarch Babel isn't that kind of person... ｜ 不，芭别尔主母不会是这样的人…
- Cuallee? ｜ 库阿勒？
- So she's so determined to become a knight that she... Okay, that's kinda weird. ｜ 努力成为骑士…的方向，有些奇怪呢。
- Hmm... I wonder if I can hide in this box... ｜ 嗯…这口箱子，说不定能藏得进去…
- But Uncle Sanka said he was gonna send some of his friends over to help us... You sure he didn't mean you? ｜ 可山下叔叔说，他派了朋友过来帮忙…不是你们吗？
- Thoma seems to have been born with a good temper.\nRegardless of whether he's dealing with a dignitary or a street vendor, Thoma can easily find an opening to join the conversation and have a good time with them.\nThoma, who is good at socializing, has a wide range of contacts in Inazuma. When he first arrived in Inazuma, he relied on his insight and communication skills to make friends with people in various industries. Later, many people would take the initiative to get to know Thoma.\nThe more people you know, the more resources you can get. Thoma would learn a lot of first-hand information from them, or quietly strike "deals" that are beneficial to the Yashiro Commission.\nHowever, although Thoma has a vast network of contacts, he has never used it for personal gain, nor has he ever forced others to do things in the name of the Yashiro Commission.\nSociability, precise judgment, and just the right amount of tact. Perhaps this is the reason why Thoma can thrive as a "fixer" in Inazuma. ｜ 托马似乎天生就有一副好脾气。\n无论是达官贵人还是街头小贩，托马都能轻易找到加入对话的时机，并与他们相谈甚欢。\n擅长社交的托马在稻妻人脉很广。最初来稻妻时，他靠自身洞察力与交流水平结交各个行业的从业者，后来，许多人都会主动来认识托马。\n认识的人越多，能得到的资源也就越多。托马会从他们口中了解许多一手情报，或是不动声色地完成一些对社奉行有利的「交易」。\n不过，虽然托马掌握着庞大的人际关系网，却从未以此谋取私利，也从未以社奉行的名义强迫他人办事。\n广阔的交际，精准的判断，恰到好处的手段。或许，这就是托马能在稻妻混得风生水起的原因。
- Strange spores created by Mist Grass in enclosed spaces. They are the Cicins' favorite food. ｜ 雾虚草在密闭空间中会产生的奇妙孢子，是飞萤喜好的食物。
- Hit the designated number of targets ｜ 击中指定数量的标靶
- A lively, leaf-green paper frog model that may be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nThis model is reportedly based on Xudi himself, symbolizing the starting point of his modeling journey and representing his adventurous spirit. In spite of the challenges ahead, Xudi shall boldly "leap" around the world, creating more outstanding models wherever he goes! ｜ 活力十足的叶绿色纸蛙模型，可以摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据说，这一款模型是以许迪自己为参考原型的，象征着他那模型制作之旅的起点，更是他冒险精神的体现。因此，尽管道路充满挑战，许迪也将为了打造更多杰出的模型，勇敢地「跳」遍整个世界。
- <color=#f39001>{0}</color> additional DMG instance(s) will be dealt after an <color=#ef5534>Ignition Wave</color> is triggered ｜ <color=#ef5534>迸火冲击</color>触发后将额外造成<color=#f39001>{0}</color>次伤害
- Kelukulo. ｜ 咕噜咕噜。
- Obtained by winning Genius Invokation TCG matches. Every duel you won builds upon the paths to victory, such is the act of earning experience itself. To know how to overcome and subdue the adversary in any situation is the greatest strength that a player can possess. ｜ 通过获胜的「七圣召唤」对局获得。每一次得胜的对局，都将积累获得胜利的手段与方式，所谓的经验就是如此，在无论何种情况下都能知悉如何制胜的方法，就是作为一个牌手的强大之处。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- But that book turned out to be dry as dust. A bunch of names had been circled, but I still couldn't figure out what the puzzle was supposed to be despite reading the whole thing through carefully from start to finish. ｜ 但实际上，那本书一点都不好看，书里的人名还被画了许多圈，我从头到尾认真看完也不明白所谓的谜题是什么。
- Date ｜ 伊达
- If Nanna is your dad's Saurian... Why isn't he the one looking for them? ｜ 你爸爸的龙伙伴啊…那他自己不管吗？
- Wipe that stupid grin off your face. This isn't over yet! ｜ 你笑得也太开心了吧？还没结束呢！
- Well, as long as you can learn from your mistakes. The issue has been resolved, so you don't have to be so hard on yourself now! ｜ 唔，你能意识到错误就好，反正现在问题已经被解决了，你也不用太难过了！
- Oh? What a surprise! And even Xilonen is here, too... ｜ 欸？你们怎么来了？还有希诺宁…
- You come up with a plan to get everything back on track... ｜ 为了让一切回归正轨，你们制定出一套计划…

- Not that easy, huh? ｜ 没那么容易，对吧？

- This hot air balloon keeps on swaying this way and that. Heh, who knows, perhaps a gust of wind shall come and blow the whole thing down... ｜ 这个热气球晃晃荡荡的，嘿，说不定来上一阵风，整个笼子都得被掀下去…

Here, one can accept Bounties, undertake Supply Notices, and other relevant tasks to elevate one's reputation within the "Masters of the Night-Wind" tribe... ｜ 「烟谜主」的曜石图腾柱，传说这种圣物「能直接与部族的大灵连接，倾听人们的需求」。\n目前，这一尊曜石图腾柱由奇普负责看守和维护。在此处，能够接取「烟谜主」部族的讨伐悬赏、物需通告等相关事项，提升在该部族的声望…

- When you left home after that final argument with him, he seemed to age by a decade overnight. Even his hair went gray. ｜ 当他和你吵架，你负气离开家之后，他一晚上就像老了十几岁，白头发都长出来了。

- After I became head coach, I introduced a challenge for newcomers to the club — pick an exercise of your choice, and go head-to-head against me. Of course, it always ends the same way — after the newcomer collapses from exhaustion, I pick up their weights and continue for another ten to twenty sets of quality reps. My goal isn't so much to show them who's boss as to give them a taste of what serious training actually looks like. You get a lot of people joining the club who just want to ego-lift and show off, so it's my job to hammer home to them that fitness is hard work, not fun and games. ｜ 我成为总教练之后，加入俱乐部的新人都要先完成一项挑战——任选一个健身项目与我进行比试。当然，绝大部分挑战者筋疲力竭地倒下后，我还能捡起他们丢下的器材再做十几组标准动作。但这样的考验并不全是为了确立教练的威严，也是为了抚平年轻人内心的浮躁。很多新人学习健身的初衷就是为了炫耀，而我必须告诉他们，健身的本质是一种苦修。
- Judging from what's left on the scene, there must have been a fight. But after that, the factions seem to have gone their separate ways. Both the phlogiston and the elemental traces in the air support that. ｜ 从现场残留的情况来看，双方多半是动手了。但这之后，燃素也好，元素的气味也罢，都向两个不同方向散去。

- Are all disciples of Chenyu Vale destined to turn out this way? To live a short life, having given away our own for the sake of others? To fight relentlessly against the natural course of life and death, whatever the cost? ...Maybe our fate is sealed the moment we decide to study medicine. ｜ 难道这就是我们这一脉的宿命吗？为了救人的执念短寿而终，执着于忤逆生死的奇迹…不可自拔。
- I was just looking for a way to see Desert Foxes more often. They're so cute, I can't help wanting to see them more! If only there was some way to make them less skittish around me, so I could touch their tails and... ｜ 我刚才在研究，怎么才能经常见到沙狐呢？我觉得它们太可爱了，想多见见，最好想个办法让它们别怕我，给我摸摸尾巴…

I picked up a few tricks from watching him — enough to defeat him and walk away with my payment in full..."\nHint: Kinich's deck centers on using Techniques and is geared towards triggering Burning reactions. He can obtain many buffs by triggering Burning reactions and using Techniques. ｜ 「我接受过一项委托，『说服某位危险的战士』，结果找到他时，他正好在玩这种卡牌游戏，于是我现场学了几招，打败了他，拿到了全额佣金…」\n【提示】基尼奇的牌组以「特技」为核心，并且擅长触发「燃烧反应」，在触发「燃烧反应」和「特技」后会获得诸多强化。

These cure-alls certainly seem to serve better in combat than they ever did in chicanery. ｜ 足迹遍布大陆各处，甚至深入未知秘境的松散盗贼组织中的一员。\n据说部分盗宝团的药剂师，在加入盗宝团之前，曾经是在城镇间漫游，兜售自己调配的…「灵药」、「圣水」的江湖骗子。这些灵药、圣水显然在战斗中更能大放异彩。

But please make sure you don't harm them, and don't steal their shells. ｜ 喜欢游泳吗？梅洛彼得堡外面的水域，同样是黑漆漆、乱糟糟的，我猜你也喜欢吧。啊，眉间的肌肉收紧了，说明你有点为难…明白了，那我们去塞洛海原潜泳吧！好久没去看悠悠海獭玩耍了，我可以看一整天。但请注意不要伤害它们，也不要抢它们手上的小贝壳哦。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Night-Wind Architecture: Needs of Exchange."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「烟谜奇筑-『往来之需』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Oh, this uniform...! ｜ 这身衣服…难道？！
- "The first is Citlalin, baleful star of the North!"\n"The second is Itzpapa, malefic omen of the South!"\nWhenever someone mentions the two dolls that Citlali keeps by her side, which she refers to as her Tzitzimimeh, the Masters of the Night-Wind often respond with these words as a warning — the intention being to silence loose tongues, lest they bring down a terrible curse upon themselves. If the rumors are to be believed, these dolls house the conscious wills of some ilk of malevolent demon, subduable only by the wrath of Granny Itztli herself. As such, their names have become synonymous with Granny Itztli's own, invokable as some sort of incantation to stop a toddler's tantrum in its otherwise unstoppable tracks.\nHowever, anyone who has had the opportunity to observe these two dolls up close would find them far less intimidating than the stories might suggest. In manner and appearance, they come across more like cute little animals than fearsome demons. Though Citlali does indeed frequently hurl them at her enemies in combat, the fear instilled by this peculiar tactic pales in comparison to the terror she inspires with her own two fists.\nAnd though it is true that within these dolls is sealed the dreadful power of inauspicious stars, this has absolutely nothing to do with their consciousnesses. Citlali crafted the Tzitzimimeh using the bones of small animals that had died of natural causes. The lingering remnants of their spirits were reawakened by the dolls' bodies, which is what bestowed consciousness upon them. As such, this pair of clingy little critters bring with them no curses whatsoever — on the contrary, they bring emotional comfort in spades, akin to the kind one might find in a pet.\nFunnily enough, Citlali very rarely lets anyone know this. Though, given that she uses them as weapons, it's probably for the best that they seem a bit on the scarier side. ｜ 「其一名为茜特菈琳，来自北方的凶星！」\n「其二名为伊兹帕帕，来自南方的恶曜！」\n当有人谈起茜特菈莉身边那两只被她称为「星魔」的玩偶，烟谜主的族人们往往会发出这样的警告，旨在让嚼舌之人尽快闭嘴，以免引来凶恶的诅咒。在传闻中，它们体内寄宿着某种恶魔的意识，唯有黑曜石奶奶的怒火才能令其臣服。于是，这两只玩偶的名号也随着黑曜石奶奶一起，成为了某种可以让小孩停止哭闹的咒语。\n不过，有机会近距离观察这两只玩偶的人都会发现，它们的表现比起恶魔更像是某种憨态可掬的小动物。虽然茜特菈莉经常将它们砸向敌人，但这种攻击手段带给敌人的恐惧甚至比不上她本人的拳头。\n事实上，这两只玩偶体内确实封印着凶恶的星曜，但它们的意识却与此无关。茜特菈莉制作它们时用到了自然死亡的小动物遗骨，附着在遗骨上的残魂被玩偶的身体激活，也让它们拥有了意识。这两只粘人的小东西无法带来任何诅咒，反倒能提供不少类似于宠物的情绪价值。\n茜特菈莉极少向其他人解释这一点，毕竟作为武器还是更吓人一些才好。

- Well, not everything. There's always funding and sponsorships... ｜ 也不是处处都顺利，比如资金跟赞助…

- Is your brother always so serious? I've never seen him smile... ｜ 你哥哥一直这么严肃吗？我都没怎么见到他笑过…

- Ever since the first diluvian period, the Opera Epiclese has stood atop the consecrated Island of Erinnyes. Overlooking the city above the waters, it symbolizes the new era's commitment to the rule of law and the pursuit of justice.\nHowever, though the ideals guiding the nation have changed, some old traditions remain alive. To this day, newlyweds still toss coins into the Fountain of Lucine to wish for peaceful and happy lives. ｜ 自第一次涨水期以来，欧庇克莱歌剧院便伫立在被视作祝圣之地的伊黎耶岛高处，俯瞰着众水之上的大城，也昭示着新时代的律政与公义。\n不过，即便是在新的秩序中，一些古老的传统也依然得以留存。时至今日，新婚的恋人们依然会在露景泉前投下硬币，祈愿幸福美满的生活。

- A gamepiece based on Hilichurl Fighters.\nThe primitive wandering inhabitants of Teyvat's wildernesses, they are tribal warriors with a simple belief in the power of their physical prowess.\nCompared to the massive Mitachurls, they are far nimbler. In battle, their club-wielding style of fighting is more similar to ordinary soldiers, and they can sometimes even cooperate well with their companions, making them an excellent sample for researching teamfighting tactics. ｜ 以「打手丘丘人」为原型的兵棋。\n提瓦特荒野中游荡的原始住民，朴实地信奉着肌肉力量的部落战士。\n相较于体型庞大的丘丘暴徒，它们的动作较为灵巧，手持木棍战斗的方式更接近普通士兵，偶尔还会与同伴打出不错的配合，是研究队伍作战的基本样本。

- Water balloons can be seen everywhere during the summer festival, but none are as finely-wrought as this one. ｜ 夏祭时，盛水气球并不罕见。但如此精致的仅此一个。
- A Karasu Ramen Master who has suffered the loss of a full day's earnings due to dining-and-dashing customers.\nWill descend into a fury in the nightmare state and continuously chase the little kitsune, who will <color=#F39000>be knocked out</color> upon coming into contact with the Ramen Master.\nIn the sweet dream state, if you're careful enough, you may be able to hop onto his head and borrow his strength... ｜ 曾经被客人吃霸王餐而损失了一天收入的乌鸦拉面师傅。\n在噩梦状态下会陷入愤怒，不停追逐小狐狸。小狐狸触碰后将<color=#F39000>被击倒</color>。\n在美梦状态下，或许可以小心地跳到拉面师傅头上，适当借助他的力量…

- How high and far a kite can fly depends as much on the weather conditions as on the skill of the person holding the string. ｜ 风筝能否飞得高、飞得远，不仅依赖持线之人的技巧，还受制于当天的气候条件。
- So that's why you didn't want to report the letter. You'd made up your mind to come here from the beginning... You only left in such a hurry to try and throw us off your trail. ｜ 你不愿声张是因为你从一开始就打定主意要到这里来，走得匆忙只是想甩掉我们。
- Hoo... To think that someone could really accomplish this... This isn't a dream, is it? You're all real, aren't you? Not figments of my imagination? ｜ 呼…真的有人能做到…这不会是一场梦吧，你们都真实存在？不会是我的臆想吧…
- Oh, why don't you try the food those kids made me? Hehe! I think it's better than Wanmin Restaurant's fare! Here, take a bite! Just a bite! ｜ 对了，那两个孩子刚才做给我的美食，你也尝尝看吧？嘿嘿，我觉得比万民堂做得还美味呢！来，尝一口，尝一口嘛！

- Hehe, I'm almost done. Looks like I'm the faster one this time. ｜ 嘿嘿，我已经快要搭完了，看起来这次是我更快一点？

- Supposedly, these notes were left by a great researcher who yearned to "surpass mortality," and its contents detail his experiences exploring ruins, along with the knowledge he gained in the process... ｜ 据说是某位意图「超越凡人」的伟大学者留下的笔记，其中详细记录了他探索地下遗迹的过程以及遗迹中获得的种种知识…

- DMG dealt by Normal Attacks by characters is increased by <color=#f39000>{0}%</color>.\nWhen characters deal DMG using Normal Attacks <color=#f39000>{1}</color> times, you will obtain Afterimaged Might:\nCharacters' Normal Attack DMG is increased by <color=#f39000>{2}%</color>. When the active character deals DMG using Normal Attacks, they will restore <color=#f39000>{3}</color> Energy for all other party members. This effect can occur once every <color=#f39000>{4}</color>s. 1 Normal Attack that deals DMG will be counted as part of this effect every <color=#f39000>{5}</color>s.\nYou will encounter powerful opponents after obtaining Afterimaged Might. ｜ 角色的普通攻击造成的伤害提升<color=#f39000>{0}%</color>；\n角色通过普通攻击造成<color=#f39000>{1}</color>次伤害后，将获得「残像威能」：\n角色的普通攻击造成的伤害提升<color=#f39000>{2}%</color>；当前场上角色的普通攻击造成伤害时，将为队伍中除自己外的其他角色恢复<color=#f39000>{3}</color>点元素能量，该效果每<color=#f39000>{4}</color>秒至多触发1次。每<color=#f39000>{5}</color>秒至多记录1次角色普通攻击造成的伤害。\n获得「残像威能」后，将遭遇强敌。

---
### Part 055

- Strange, I never would have guessed that such a gifted chef worked here. This inn isn't particularly known for its food. ｜ 真想不到，一间不以饭菜为卖点的客栈，厨子手艺竟有这么好。
- Collection Area: I ｜ 回收区域·其一
- Defeat 30 assailants ｜ 击败30名来犯的敌人
- Go to the "Tail" ｜ 前往「尾」之所在
- "If you don't behave, the Special Patrol's going to take you away!"\nSuch is the start of many a scolding given by Fontainian parents to a troublemaking child.\nChildren who have grown up with such threats from their parents, understand very clearly that the Special Patrol will never take action because a child didn't brush their teeth, slept in, broke a window, or swiped a slice of cake. Still, though they have long since matured into adults, they cannot help but stand up a bit straighter when they see Captain Chevreuse, averting their gaze and instinctually wringing their hands, mortally afraid that they might have committed some offense worthy of arrest without having even been aware of the nature of their crime. Yet despite being crystal clear that these fine officers are fighting crime, and regardless of their reverence for such upstanding upholders of the law, it is truly difficult to suppress the urge to tense up...\nAs for this "fearsome, infamous reputation," the Special Patrol themselves are quite exasperated. A member once suggested to Chevreuse that allowing such an "infamous reputation" to circulate is damaging to the Special Patrol's image: "The Special Patrol is an official law enforcement office under the Maison Gardiennage, after all, and if our methods of enforcing the law are more forceful, and the process thereof more intense, it's only because the criminals we deal with are the most vile and violent of them all. So to use the Special Patrol's good name to frighten children really is a bit..."\n"Why not let Chevreuse give The Steambird an interview? Let our Captain stress that the Special Patrol is a law enforcement organization only focused on dealing with the worst offenders, and everything it does is to safeguard Fontaine's safety and stability, in pursuit of which it would never accost citizens without good cause..."\nYet Chevreuse vetoed this suggestion.\n"If such a reputation has really become so deeply embedded in the minds of the people, and it sticks with them for a lifetime, then there's a chance that when someone considers taking things a step too far, fear inspired by our 'infamous reputation' may pull them back from the edge."\n"...If so, then there'll be no need for us to actually take them away someday." ｜ 「再调皮的话，就要被特巡队抓走了！」\n一些枫丹家长训斥自己闯祸的孩子时，常常用这句话来做开头。\n如此被父母「吓唬」大的孩子们，尽管早已成年，也明知特巡队绝不可能因为孩子们不刷牙、睡懒觉、弄破窗户，或是偷吃蛋糕这类事出动，但在看见现任特巡队队长夏沃蕾时，他们还是会不由自主地站直身子，挪开目光，本能地握住双手，生怕自己犯了某种足以被拘捕，但自己却毫不知情的罪过。虽然明知这群好警官们是真的是在打击犯罪，也十分尊敬这群好人，但绷紧身体的冲动的确难以抑制…\n对于这样的「赫赫凶名」，特巡队内部也颇为无奈。曾经有人对夏沃蕾建议，如此「凶名」流传在外，有损特巡队形象。我队是执律庭下属的正式执法部门，之所以执法手段强势，执法过程激烈，只是因为面对的凶犯都是极恶之徒。用特巡队的名号吓唬孩子，实在是…\n为什么不请《蒸汽鸟报》来采访一次夏沃蕾？由这位队长亲自强调，特巡队只是针对凶犯的执法机构，行事皆是为了维护枫丹廷之稳定安全，绝不会无故为难市民…\n但夏沃蕾却否决了这项提议。\n「如果这种名声真能如此深入人心，让人牢记一生，那也许大家在谋划某些出格事务时，也会因为忌惮特巡队的『凶名』而退却吧。」\n「…这样的话，我也许就不用在将来的某天，真的将他们抓走了。」
- "Well, in That Case..." ｜ 「好吧，既然如此…」
- Aeval ｜ 爱贝尔
- CRIT Rate increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>. Gains Skypiercing Might upon using an Elemental Burst: Increases Movement SPD by <color=#99FFFFFF>10%</color>, increases ATK SPD by <color=#99FFFFFF>10%</color>, and Normal and Charged hits deal additional DMG equal to <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color> of ATK. Skypiercing Might lasts for 12s. ｜ 暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>；施放元素爆发时，获得破空之势：移动速度提升<color=#99FFFFFF>10%</color>，攻击速度提升<color=#99FFFFFF>10%</color>，普通攻击与重击命中时，额外造成<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>攻击力的伤害，持续12秒。
- You could not fathom the gifts they would bring... Fine wine made from the freshest red fruits, opulent chests full of treasure... And that was the bare minimum! ｜ 鲜红的果实被制成佳酿，财宝堆满华贵的宝匣…这还不过是我收到的万千进贡品中最寻常的两种。
- Although the Arkhium has transformed into an activated state, the explosion damaged all of the energy supply lines, so it's lost all of its energy supply... ｜ 即使那个始基矿已经转化为了活化态，但爆炸后所有的供能线路都损坏了，它已经失去了所有供能…
- I'm not a legal expert. I haven't the faintest idea. ｜ 我又不是律法咨询师，哪里懂那么多条条框框的呀。
- Mm, yes... Getting closer to nature is also part of training. ｜ 嗯…亲近自然也是修炼的一部分。
- After all, I had to work really hard to weasel my way into the auction site. Not to mention that if anyone found out that I was the leaker, I would be in big, big trouble. ｜ 毕竟我可是好不容易才躲进了交易现场，而且，一旦被人知道消息是我走漏的，我还可能会被人找麻烦喔。
- I think finding it's gonna be a bit of a long shot. I don't care about the pouch itself, it's just... Eek! ｜ 肯定很难找回来吧。钱袋丢了本身没什么，更恐怖的是…咿呀——！

- Heated Battle Mode: Reinforcements ｜ 热斗模式：全方位后援
- S—Scary... So because you wouldn't give it to him, now he just wants to take it!? ｜ 好、好可怕…人家不愿意把东西给他，他就直接过来抢吗！？
- Well... next time you find yourself a free moment, how about I show you some of my favorites? I can brew some tea, prepare some snacks... And we can take our time enjoying them. ｜ 那…等到你下回空闲时，我挑选几首不错的音乐，沏一壶好茶，准备些点心，一起慢慢欣赏吧？
- It's okay, Ilyas. You've done more than enough for me already... ｜ 已经可以了，伊利亚斯。你为我做的已经足够多了…

- No, it's too dangerous! ｜ 不行，太危险了！

- I promise not to ask too many unnecessary questions. ｜ 我保证不多问问题。
- Cross-examine Lyney ｜ 质问林尼
- I don't think she'd want too many people to know. They might go to Mt. Aocang and start bugging her about it. Granny needs to focus on her training, y'know? But, telling a friend or two is probably fine. ｜ 要是让太多人知道，他们可能会跑到这里打扰奶奶修行。只是讲给朋友听的话，没关系的。

- In my father's case, the culprit intended to kill both Jacques and Callas. As a result, they planned to act after hearing two gunshots. ｜ 在当年的案件中，幕后凶手要杀雅克和卡雷斯，所以需要在听到两声枪响后再动手。

- Hmm... If we insert this thingamabob into the slot, we can activate the big guy, right? ｜ 唔…把这个玩意插进插槽里，应该就可以启动这个大家伙了吧？

- Today, only the five most important survive. Only the smallest part of our Master's plan has been implemented, but even that is a form of success. ｜ 如今只有最重要的五处仍存。大师的计划仅有最低限度的实施，但这也是一种成功。

- If you say so... ｜ 既然你都这么说了…
- ...Huh? The plot here seems a little different from what the reviews said... ｜ …欸？台上这演的，好像和之前读过的评论不太一样…

- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- Once a Tatarigami sets its eyes on you, it will continue to stalk you in dark corners that you cannot see... ｜ 「祟神」一旦盯上了你，就会在你看不见的地方，一路跟随…
- Hey now, don't you take me for an ordinary cat! ｜ 喂，可别把我当成普通的猫啊！
- Ooh, ooh! We're good at flying, and adventuring too! Can we participate? ｜ 喔…喔！我们很擅长飞行…也很擅长冒险！我们想要参加选拔！
- Do you really not know? ｜ 不过你真不知道吗？
- The Duke rarely ever leaves the Fortress of Meropide, but that does not mean he is not privy to all that's happening inside and outside the fortress. He is "quiet," but not "unaware," so please bear that in mind. ｜ 公爵不常离开梅洛彼得堡，但这不代表他不清楚堡内外事务的细节。他是「默许」而非「不知情」，这一点还请注意。
- What can I do here? ｜ 我可以在这里做什么？

- It was a great fight. ｜ 打得很痛快。
- I'm most sorry, but my mind's getting less clear the older I get. Could I ask who you are again? Have we ever met? ｜ 唉，对不起呀，年纪大了头脑难免不清楚…请问你是谁呀…？我曾认识你吗？
- I was just standing on the cliff admiring the scenery, and one of them knocked me right out. By the time I woke up, I was trapped in here. ｜ 实不相瞒，我刚才只是站在山崖上看风景，一个不注意就被丘丘人敲晕了脑袋，醒来的时候就在这儿关着啦。
- I saw the Mistress of Flowers... ｜ 是「花的女主人」…
- Return to Wangsheng Funeral Parlor and find out what happened ｜ 返回往生堂，了解来龙去脉
- These Spikey Fish Warriors might have no spikes, but they're still prickly characters. When they discover Dodoco, they will <color=#f39000>sprint in Dodoco's direction</color>. ｜ 冠名角角实际却无角的斧枪鱼士兵，发现嘟嘟可后，会<color=#f39000>朝嘟嘟可的方向发起冲刺</color>。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Shanghua is a business expert who gets his information by trading, Wenyuan relies on word of mouth, and there is also Wupei, who's not here right now... ｜ 商华精通商务，喜欢以交易换取情报；文渊则多靠游说来获知消息。除了他们之外，还有目前不在场的武沛…
- However, they're not exactly gemstone enthusiasts, so the problem didn't affect them as much. ｜ 不过他们的族人对宝石不怎么热衷，所以影响更小。
- Nicely done, Kachina! ｜ 干得漂亮，卡齐娜！
- Zhang Shun is not doing well financially, he's looking for ways to earn more Mora... ｜ 张顺的手头很是拮据，他正在想赚钱的法子…
- We planned to turn them off remotely and retrieve them, then figure out what the problem was... But we never imagined the Institute would... y'know, explode... ｜ 我们本来打算远程关停并回收这些机关鱼，然后再看看出现了什么问题…但没想到，科学院居然…爆炸了…

- Our most urgent task at the moment is to use it to find components hidden deep underground. Once we've found enough components, the maintenance process can begin. ｜ 我们的当务之急就是借它来寻找埋藏于地下深处的元件，找到了足够数量的元件我就可以开始维修校准了。

- Paimon, you are the one that's both naive and complicated... ｜ 派蒙，真是又复杂又天真。

- You're speaking in riddles! ｜ 你说的有点太模糊了。
- Sonny ｜ 桑尼
- Due to his age and in consideration of his accomplishments, he has been confined to his quarters indefinitely, and will not be released on bail. ｜ 宥其年迈功高，暂行永久闭门思过，不得保释。
- Phew! We're finally out of that stinky place... ｜ 终于离开那个臭烘烘的地方了。
- You've collected lots of different stones, after all. Maybe you'll be able to find a use for each and every one of them! ｜ 芙佳这里有这么多各种各样的石头，说不定也都能找到各自的用处呢！
- For Meritorious Service ｜ 美德的报酬
- Sure. ｜ 好吧。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>In Inazuma, it's customary for parents to choose a lucky name for their child.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Those names symbolize everyone's expectations and wishes for the child, like prosperity, wealth, good health, and safety.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Because of these expectations, parents often pick extra long names, and cram all sorts of blessings into them.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>So hypothetically, if one day a little girl fell into a lake on her way back home, then her friends might rush to her house to tell everyone, "Something bad happened!"\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>"Oh, what happened?"\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Ozvaldo Hrafnavins, Prinzessin der Verurteilung Fischl von Luftschloss Narfidort, come quick! Centennial Genius Astrologist Mona Megistus has fallen into the water!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>...Mona falling into the water doesn't sound like an emergency situation though.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Precisely. The fast-swimming Mona would come back home around the same time her friends are done saying her name, haha. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>在稻妻传统里，家长常会给小孩子取一个吉祥的名字。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这名字自然是饱含了大家的期待，既希望财运亨通，又希望无病无灾。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>所以这孩子的家长，就给孩子取了一个很长很长的名字。里面那可真的是什么好处都有。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>结果有一天，孩子回家路上掉进了河里，她的同伴立刻就赶回家喊她的父母。「不好啦，不好啦。」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>「怎么啦？」\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「她掉在水里了！巴波·修立干·古立泰·彭彭克皮·彭彭科纳·菲谢尔·冯·露弗施洛斯·那菲多特·阿斯托洛吉斯·莫娜·梅姬斯图斯掉水里了！！」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>…莫娜掉水里的话，应该不用担心吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>正是如此。等她的小伙伴把话说完，名字长长、游泳快快的莫娜已经站在家门口了。
- After using Skyladder 1/2/3 times during one <color=#FFD780FF>White Clouds at Dawn</color> Cloud Transmogrification state, when a Driftcloud Wave unleashed during that instance hits an opponent, it will heal all nearby party members for 50%/80%/150% of Xianyun's ATK. This effect can be triggered once every 5s. ｜ 在一次<color=#FFD780FF>朝起鹤云</color>的鹤云幻化期间施展了1/2/3次步天梯后，该次鹤云幻化期间的闲云冲击波命中敌人时，将为队伍中附近的所有角色恢复生命值，回复量相当于闲云攻击力的50%/80%/150%。该效果每5秒至多触发一次。

- Sango must have taught you this. ｜ 一听就是珊瑚找的理由…
- About Katarina... ｜ 关于卡塔琳娜…

- That would be tantamount to handing this over to the Knights. ｜ 那也就意味着要全部交由骑士团来处理。

- Careful, don't injure yourself! ｜ 小心肌肉拉伤！
- We want to see the future star of the Spina. ｜ 想看到刺玫会未来的希望。
- He should have gone into the secret chamber by the time he sees this message. Paimon thinks it won't be of that much use here... ｜ 看到这条留言的时候，他已经到密室里了吧…留言不就没有作用了嘛…
- But since this fellow isn't looking too enthusiastic, I'd wager that it would be too tall a task for me... ｜ 但这小家伙似乎又提不起干劲了，就凭我找这些宝藏可是有点费劲…

- Haha, no need to worry. There's no such thing as a problem that can't be solved, after all! ｜ 哈哈，不必担心不必担心，只要是问题，就总有解决的办法嘛！

- ...At the time, I thought that we might be able to strike up some sort of long-term cooperative relationship should I complete the commission... ｜ …那时我光顾着想委托完成之后，说不定能发展成长期合作的关系什么的…
- A pair of elite Fatui special agents who can manipulate Cryo and Anemo in battle. In combat, they will use the Hunt Down skill to attach a Bond of Life to characters they hit. While Bond of Life is active, the character will take continuous DMG, and Hunt Down will deal more DMG to them. ｜ 愚人众当中精锐的特务组合，两人分别能够驱使「冰元素」与「风元素」进行战斗。在战斗中，会进行「猎杀」，向命中的角色施加生命之契，在生命之契存在时使其持续受到伤害，并提高猎杀对其造成的伤害。
- Kneel! ｜ 跪下！

- When an active character hits an opponent, a shockwave will be unleashed that deals AoE DMG to opponents equivalent to 25% of the character's Max HP. This effect can be triggered once by each party every 8s. The character that triggers this effect will lose 25% of their current HP. ｜ 当前场上角色攻击命中敌人时会释放冲击波，对敌人造成相当于该角色生命值上限25%的范围伤害。该效果每个队伍每8秒至多触发一次，触发时该角色会失去25%当前生命值。
- Wait, shouldn't Souka be shouting something like "Oh! I know what to add to my novel now!" at a time like this? ｜ 不过，这种时候，左右加小姐不应该很激动地喊着「我知道该怎么写了」吗？
- Then what was Captain Zoya's order again? Ah, that's right... Those who fail to match the password shall be executed on the spot. ｜ 所以佐娅大尉的命令是什么来着？啊，对了…对不上口令者，就地处决。
- I wouldn't mind if that would actually work. Unfortunately, once this "contamination" is present, it isn't something that a few Purification Devices can fix. ｜ 如果这样有用，我倒是不介意。可「污染」一旦产生，就不是几个装置能解决的了。

- Mushrooms with strange shapes that present as a deep scarlet. The fungal stipes of these mushrooms are much tougher than their slender appearance might suggest, being able to hold the weighty mushroom cap up quite well, only waving a little even amidst strong winds. It is for this reason that it has gained the appellation "Swayshroom." ｜ 形姿奇异的菇类，呈现出浓重的「曦红色」。菌柄有着与纤细外表不符的坚韧特性，能将并不轻巧的菌盖稳稳托举，即使受到强风吹拂，也只会轻微摇摆，因而得名「摇曳菇」。

- I like meaty dishes in general, but only if the meat is fresh. There's nothing like the flavor of freshly hunted meat cooked over the grill with a little salt to taste and a portion of sour fruits on the side. You should come hunting with me some time, I'll cook for you. ｜ 用肉类做的菜肴都不错，但肉一定要新鲜。刚猎下的肉用盐简单调味后烤制，旁边搭配上微酸的水果，味道十分不错。下次有机会的话，随我去打猎，我做给你尝尝。

- "Childe" Tartaglia, Eleventh of the Fatui Harbingers.\nHe draws power from the ominous Delusion he possesses and fights using martial arts that he learned in a land of darkness.\n\nHe is a pure warrior with an insatiable lust for battle.\nEach bloody conflict, each life-and-death struggle is a delightful trial to him.\nPeople say that the young Childe is famed throughout the land for his battle prowess.\nBut he has never taken big talk of this kind to heart.\n\nAfter all...\n<i>"You shall ever be the eye of the storm,</i>\n<i>"And the clashing of steel shall ever accompany you.</i>\n<i>"The pitch-black memory of stepping into uttermost darkness,</i>\n<i>"Shall, at last, become the strength by which you will overturn this world."</i> ｜ 愚人众执行官第十一席，「公子」达达利亚。\n自不祥的「邪眼」之中汲取力量，以至暗之地习得的武艺战斗。\n\n拥有无穷争斗欲望的纯粹战士。\n每次浴血的纷争、每场生死攸关的挑战，于他而言皆是快意试炼。\n人皆言年轻的「公子」战绩远近闻名。\n但他本人却对这种大话从来不以为然。\n\n毕竟…\n<i>「你的命运将成为纷争的风暴之眼，</i>\n<i>「铁剑交错的声响是常伴你的奏乐。</i>\n<i>「踏入至暗之处的漆黑记忆，</i>\n<i>「终将成为你颠覆世界的力量吧。」</i>

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 consecutive strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nDrains Stamina over time to perform continuous spinning attacks against all nearby opponents.\nAt the end of the sequence, performs a more powerful slash. \n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多四段的连续挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n持续消耗体力，旋转大剑攻击周围的敌人。\n停止旋转时，会进行一次格外有力的挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- The life contained within the waters is formless, and formless life is born of water and gains water's shape.\nAncient Fontainian poets and philosophers believed (or hoped) that countless lives had converged in the waters before the start of time and would converge in the waters again after the end of time. Form, language, and physical contact had been and would be irrelevant, and birth and death, non-existent.\nThe world of water is an extension of all that is alive.\nThis is the world's primordial and ultimate form, a golden era that had been missed and has yet descended. ｜ 水中所蕴含着的生命是无形的，而无形的生命也寄于水中，借由水之形诞生。\n枫丹古代的诗人与哲学家相信（或是希望），在时间开始之前的过去与时间结束后的未来，无数的生命在水中相遇，不再需要形体、语言与接触。一切不再诞生，也不再死亡。\n而水的世界则是一切生命的肢体延伸。\n这是世界最原始亦即最终极的形态，也是已经错过或是尚未到来的黄金时代。

The results of attacking them with ordinary bows are far from ideal, and the mobility of more powerful ballistae and cannons is quite limited. Perhaps a highly mobile firing platform with significant firepower is required to deal with them... ｜ 以「冰飘浮灵」为原型的兵棋。\n高浓度的冰元素孕育而生的魔物，能够飘浮在空中。\n作为体型相对紧凑，抗击打能力又不错的飞行魔物，飘浮灵一直被各方部队视为「防空能力」的试金石。以普通弓弩打击它们的成效往往不甚理想，而威力较大的弓弩和火炮的机动性又相当有限，或许需要一种能灵巧移动的重型火力平台来对付它们…

- In the wilds of Fontaine, you may occasionally encounter these overly-lively — perhaps due to outside influences — contaminated bacterial mats. The contamination clots and contamination cores within can be <color=#FFE14BFF>cleansed</color> by the abilities of the Xenochromatic Ball Octopus and other <color=#FFE14BFF>Xenochromatic Fontemer Aberrants</color>. ｜ 在枫丹野外有时会遇到这种由于生命力过于旺盛——或是其他原因导致的——污染菌毯。其中的污染凝块与污染核心，能够通过异色球球章鱼等<color=#FFE14BFF>异色原海异种</color>的能力将其<color=#FFE14BFF>消除</color>。
- Keqing! When did you get here? ｜ 刻晴！你什么时候来的？
- The Jinni Liloupar, who has slumbered for hundreds and thousands of years, enters into a pact with you. ｜ 沉睡千百年的镇灵利露帕尔与你订立了契约。
- Gygax from Mondstadt seems to be trying to drum up some interest in his game. ｜ 蒙德城的吉盖克斯似乎正在招揽人去试玩某种游戏…
- A gigantic and glamorous ship embodies discovery, opportunity, ambition, and conquest. It symbolizes Spina di Rosula's bright and limitless future. ｜ 一艘巨大而华丽的船，象征着远航，机遇，征服，野心，「刺玫会」的未来无比光明。
- You can cry all you want. I don't have any more food! All I have left is half a bottle of water, and I can't possibly give you that. ｜ 叫也没有用，没有就是没有！我身上只剩下半壶水，不可能给你们的。
- Reciting poetry ｜ 念诗
- Rain... If only it could cleanse the corrupt souls of this world. ｜ 雨吗，可惜洗刷不了那些污秽的心。
- Paimon didn't think you'd be so pumped up. But you can probably take on anyone we find down there, so... ｜ 哇，没想到你这么有精神，虽然我也觉得不管下面有什么都不会是你的对手啦。
- Defeat all opponents within %2% second(s) ｜ 在%2%秒内击败所有怪物
- This recipe may seem a bit crude, but is entirely hinged on the precise balancing of flavors and seasonings by the chef. Everything must be balanced just right. ｜ 看似粗犷的手法背后，是厨师对口味与调料比例的精准理解。多一分则多，少一分则少。
- Occupation? You mean, being a traveler? ｜ 职业定位？是指旅行吗？
- What clues do you have now? ｜ 你现在找到什么线索了吗？
- Anecdota Septentrionalis (I) ｜ 北境秘史·卷一
- Don't worry. We weren't trying to hunt you. You are an honored guest here. For so long as we remember our guests' faces, we shall never do them harm on our land. ｜ 放心，不是猎你们的，你们是塔尼特的贵客。只要记住了客人的脸，我们就绝不会在自己的地盘上加害。
- Earnest Negotiation ｜ 诚恳交涉
- Ragged Notebook ｜ 残破的笔记
- You have found the encrypted message. Perhaps Jebrael is able to decipher the hidden information. ｜ 找到了用密语写就的短信，或许哲伯莱勒能够解读其中的信息。
- Must be because I've been reading too much lately, triggering flashbacks to all the nerve-wracking research I had to do at the Akademiya... ｜ 一定是因为最近看书太多，过去在教令院搞研究时的紧张回忆又涌上心头了…
- Something like, "Are you blind? I can't squeeze into that!" ｜ 「进不去，怎么想都进不去嘛！」
- Oh, and she also borrowed Qiqi... meaning Bubu Pharmacy is very short-handed right now. I don't suppose any of you are looking for part-time work, by any chance? ｜ 她还从我这里借走了七七，不卜庐现在非常缺人，几位要不要留下来做份兼职？
- But it's working... Paimon's curious now! ｜ 但我真的有点好奇了…

- Golden Blood-Tide ｜ 黄金的血潮

- That went over Paimon's head a little... ｜ 咦，派蒙又听不懂了…

- See the world on my behalf... ｜ 代我看看这个世界…

- Anyway, that's how he rejected my proposal and asked me to come up with another solution with the condition that it doesn't cause any trouble for him. Can you believe that guy...? ｜ 总之他就这样回绝了我之前的提案，让我在不给他惹麻烦的前提下另寻办法，你说哪儿有这种事…
- ...In the end, he was still thinking of me as a little child. ｜ …真是的，到最后也把我当小孩子看。

- Hmm, that makes sense. So, what do you make of it? ｜ 有道理。那你是怎么想的呢？
- Well, I've got some of the Association's stock right here. Have a look and see if any of them meet your needs. ｜ 恰好我这里有一些协会的存货，你瞧瞧有没有合适的。
- Oh, I can sense your passion beneath your stoic tone, don't you worry! Let's do our best to create ever greater alchemical potions! ｜ 喔喔喔，从你平静的语气里，我听出了抑制不住的热情！为了开发出最强的炼金药剂，我们都要再加把劲！
- #Thank you, {NICKNAME}, but Paimon's criticism is quite valid. I do have a tendency to neglect matters outside of work, and that's something I should improve on. ｜ #谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。不过派蒙批评得在理，我在工作以外的方面的确容易疏忽，应该改进才是。
- Sick Old Lady ｜ 病重的老太太
- What commission? Refresh my memory. ｜ 委托？没什么印象。
- There's no point in teaching you a different kind of lesson right this moment, though. I still need time to finish some prep... ｜ 但前辈我今天不跟你计较，还有准备工作没做完呢。
- The... The Special Security and Surveillance Patrol? You mean that organization where everyone carries a musket? ｜ 特…特巡队队长？就是传说中那个用铳枪的特巡队吗？
- A small timekeeping gadget. On moonless nights, it was the only way its former owner could know the time. ｜ 展示当前时间的小道具，在没有月亮的黑夜里是唯一的时间参照。

- I'm sure you must have some things to discuss with her, too. I wish you all the best. ｜ 想必你们也有些事情想要找她确认吧？祝你们顺利。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Details</color>\n1. In Heated Battle Mode: Tactical Formation duels, instead of using the cards you have collected, you and your opponent will use Character Cards selected on the spot and randomly generated Action Cards to battle!\n2. Before the start of each Heated Battle Mode: Tactical Formation duel, both players will choose 3 decks from among 10 incomplete decks, combining them into a single complete deck before dueling their opponent.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Detailed Rules</color>\n1. Starting with Player 1, before the duel begins, both players will choose decks from 10 preset decks, using a 1/2/2/1 sequence to choose their decks.\n2. Each preset deck can only be chosen once. Once selected by one player, neither player will not be able to select the same deck again.\n3. Each deck is composed of 1 Character Card and 10 Action Cards. Once 3 preset decks have been selected, they will be shuffled together into a single complete deck.\n4. Of the 10 Action Cards in each preset deck, 4 cards are decided by the Character Card, and the remaining 6 are random. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n1、在「热斗模式：列阵斗巧」的对局中，不使用收藏的卡牌，而是与你的对手临场选择使用的角色牌，并使用随机生成的行动牌组进行对战！\n2、每场「热斗模式：列阵斗巧」对局开始前，对局双方将从10套不完整的预组套牌中各自选择3套，将其洗混后构成完整的牌组，来与对手进行对战。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【详细规则】</color>\n1、对局开始前，从先手牌手开始，双方分别从10套预组套牌中，以1/2/2/1的顺序选择预组套牌。\n2、每套预组套牌只能被双方牌手选择1次。已被选择过的预组套牌，双方都无法再次选择。\n3、每套预组套牌由1张角色牌和10张行动牌构成；将3套预组套牌洗混，即可组成一套可用于对战的牌组。\n4、每套预组套牌的10张行动牌中，有4张行动牌由预组套牌中的角色牌决定，而剩余的6张行动牌则是随机决定。
- Increases all party members' Healing Bonus by 20% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色治疗加成提升20%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for setting up an Ever-Popular Eatery.\nSome Liyue restaurants boast top-quality dishes that will feed any hungry mouth, and patrons visit them in droves every night. These eateries often set up outdoor tables in an effort to retain every customer possible.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「生意红火的食肆」的放置方法。\n一些璃月餐馆的菜品风味上佳，有口皆碑，每到饭点，都有大批客人惠顾。因此店家往往在室外摆放餐位，力求能留住所有来客。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。
- Yes, although it took us a good deal of effort. ｜ 嗯，虽然费了一些周折。
- A rich, meaty dish. Piled in just the right way to be both aesthetically pleasing and delicious all the way through. I wonder if we can pile it a little higher... ｜ 用料丰厚的肉料理。食材堆成了赏心悦目的形状，得当的比例让每一层的搭配都好吃不腻。啊，真想它堆得再高一点呀。
- Oh, I can tell you what that's all about! Apparently, in their youth, some people used to imagine themselves as someone "burdened by fate," "fighting against the world," et cetera. ｜ 啊，这个吗，我有听说过！说是一些人在还小的时候，经常会有「背负不幸」、「对抗世界」之类的想法…
- Huh, looks like Bull-Chucker and Grandmaster Hanakado are still raring to go... Well, let's leave them to it! They can battle beetles till the beetle-battling's done! ｜ 唔，放牛的和「花角玉将」还是热血沸腾呢，就让他们继续斗虫吧，斗到他们完全满足！
- These stalls look to have been quite carefully arranged. ｜ 这些摊位布置得相当用心呢。
- Hmm... What is it? Is there something you'd like to ask? ｜ 嗯…怎么了，有什么想要问的事吗？
- This is the Wangshu Inn Bulletin Board, providing notices of all recent happenings big and small. If guests have any suggestions, requests, or other thoughts, please feel free to post them here as well. ｜ 这里是望舒客栈的公告板，近况无论大小，皆悉心为客人公示。客人若有意见、需求或感触，亦请在此留言。

- Of course, it is only natural for humans to struggle to understand the actions of a god. However, you will need more than that to convict me of a crime... ｜ 先说好，凡人无法理解神明的做法很正常，而这一点可并不能构成给神明定罪的理由…

- Very few people talk to me at work, in any case, since cargo inspection doesn't really involve the crew. ｜ 很少有人在工作时间跟我搭话，毕竟货物安检工作又不需要船员参与。

- Happy Lantern Rite. ｜ 海灯节快乐。
- I must return to the Akademiya and find a way to send these pictures back to Asagiri. ｜ 我得再回教令院一趟，看看怎么把这些画片寄回去给朝雾小姐。

- But even timid Arashakun had a Nara friend for a companion. That Nara friend was no mighty Nara Varuna, but was still a very good Nara! ｜ 但是，即使是胆小的兰沙恭，也有一个愿意陪伴兰沙恭的那菈朋友，虽然那菈朋友不是伟大的那菈法留纳，但也是很好的那菈！

- This is an original skill that I invented. It's different from the Iwakura and Kitain Arts — or even the Favonius Bladework from overseas — which all require weapons for combat, in the sense that the essence of my technique is exercising one's heart to hone one's combat skills. ｜ 总之，这是老身独创的技术。与岩藏流、喜多院流，还有外国的「西风剑术」这些用武器战斗的流派不同，我的技术的精髓在于磨练「心流」，再利用「心流」磨练战斗技巧的流派。

Primordial Jade Regalia will still take effect even if the equipping character is not on the field. ｜ 施放元素爆发或创造护盾后的3秒内，将产生「定土玉圭」效果：每2.5秒恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>6</color>点元素能量，并基于装备者的生命值上限，每1000点使其对应元素类型的元素伤害加成提高<color=#99FFFFFF>0.9%</color>，至多提高<color=#99FFFFFF>36%</color>。装备该武器的角色处于队伍后台时，依然能产生「定土玉圭」效果。

- Bah, that's what you always say. It's not like you have some big secret to hide or something! ｜ 啧，每次问你都这样，又没什么天大的秘密，有什么可藏着掖着的呀。
- This sophisticated instrument is used in Chenyu Vale for the weighing of tea leaves. Its structure is simple enough, but it has incredible precision, to the point where the weight of even just a few tea leaves can be measured.\nThey say that the high unit price of tea leaves makes merchants who come and go extremely sensitive to the weight of goods. To dispel such concerns, Chunming Teaworks will deliberately weigh the weight of each batch of tea leaves before and after drying and roasting, recording it on storage labels for easy verification. Aside from the experienced tea craftsmen who have been roasting tea for many years, not many can derive much information from such records. Still, the detailed data is symbolic of a rigorous attitude and an important process that cannot be neglected, as it leaves customers who purchase tea leaves doubly reassured. ｜ 可见于沉玉谷内的精密器具，多用于茶叶的称量。结构简单，不过精度相当可观，就连寥寥几片茶叶的重量都可以度量。\n据说，由于茶叶这种商品的单位重量价格颇高，来往客商们均对货物的重量极为敏感。为了打消客商们的顾虑，春茗茶坊会特意称量每批茶叶烘干以及炒制前后的重量，并将其记录在入库的标签上方便查验。虽然除去多年炒茶的老茶匠外，没有多少人能从这些记录中得到多少信息，但记录详实的数据是一种严谨的态度，更是不能怠慢的重要流程，能让购买茶叶的客人们加倍安心。

- Rahman's plan is to have me work with the Caravan Ribat guards in my capacity as a matra. We'll arrest the mercenaries and escort them into Sumeru City. ｜ 拉赫曼的方案是，让我以风纪官身份联合喀万驿卫兵一起抓捕他们，押送到须弥城内。

- You have already witnessed my previous views on eternity. ｜ 我过去对「永恒」的看法，你们已经见证了。
- I bear the name, "Kion{RUBY#[D]Leader}gozi" — the "leader" of our people. After countless generations, this name came to you, and you used the power it accumulated over the years to defeat everything in your path. ｜ 「基扬{RUBY#[D]领袖}戈兹」，意为领袖。这曾是我的古名，经历了一代又一代传承，最终来到你身上。凭借这积累的力量，你战胜一切。

- Aah! Whose voice is that!? ...Detective, was that you? Your voice acting's actually pretty good. ｜ 呜啊，是谁的声音？是你吗探长，你声音可塑性其实还挺强的啊。

- ...I see. This proves two things. Firstly, my hypothesis is accurate. ｜ …我明白了。这说明了两件事。第一，我的推想没有错。
- We want to experience both types of food together. ｜ 无论是哪种菜系，我们都要一起体验。

- You're already so strong for never giving up. ｜ 没有放弃就真的很了不起。

### Part 056

- Today we shall speak of a young hero of the Guhua Clan, a scholar and a swordsman. ｜ 今日咱们讲的便是出自古华派的一位知名少侠，剑客书生。
- The Kanjou Commission strictly enforces the Sakoku Decree, even Ritou is sealed off from the outside world. But I'm afraid this policy is only making matters worse for Inazuma. ｜ 勘定奉行严格执行锁国之令，连离岛都严遵封闭管理，对稻妻来说只能算是饮鸩止渴。
- #C'mon, {NICKNAME} let's go talk somewhere else. ｜ #走吧，{NICKNAME}，我们换个地方说话。
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- Clients cannot send invites in the host's world ｜ 客机不能在主机世界发起邀请
- <color=#FFE14BFF>Imaginarium: Nimbus Grasper</color>\n<color=#FFE14BFF>Buff Stations</color> will be present in this Domain, and they will provide various buffs. There will also be various <color=#FFE14BFF>Summon Stations</color> that will allow you to invite characters. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>拟想·共揽诸云记</color>\n秘境中存在<color=#FFE14BFF>助益锚点</color>，会提供各类助益。同时还存在可以邀请角色的<color=#FFE14BFF>邀请锚点</color>。
- A type of waterfowl that dwells in open water bodies such as lakes and rivers. A pointed crimson-hued beak and magnificently colored plumage are its distinguishing characteristics.\nRedbill Pelicans are born to fish, and their innate talent for doing so remains unchanged even when they are in a place like The Realm Within with its abundant supply of food. Their greatest joy is to silently observe the movements of fish within the Pool of Sapphire Grace. But fret not— these avians with keen eyesight will never even entertain the notion of attacking unless Tubby allows it. ｜ 栖息在江河湖泊等开阔水体的禽类，朱红色的尖喙与美丽的彩羽是其特征。\n鹈鹕是天生捕鱼的高手，在食物丰沛的壶中洞天也不会改变。它们最大的娱乐就是默默观察「灵沼云池」内游鱼们的动向。不过无须担心，除非阿圆允许，不然这些目光锐利的禽类不会有任何的攻击意图。
- Pervases died in the Archon War thousands of years ago. He was younger than us, and Bosacius was very sad when he passed. ｜ 铜雀死于千年前的魔神战争，他比我们都年轻，他战死时，浮舍很难过。
- Paimon too? Oh my, it's alright. It's my duty, and you've helped me so much already. ｜ 怎么连派蒙也…欸呀，没关系，这都是我应该做的，更何况，过程中，你们也帮助了我许多。
- Reward for completing all achievements under "A Realm Beyond: Series I" ｜ 达成「世外洞天·第一辑」下所有成就时获取。
- I'm looking for... for... I've forgotten. Each time I think I'm about to remember it, it disappears from my mind. ｜ 在找…找…我忘记了。每次快想起来的时候，都会忘记。
- Pattern: Brown Segment ｜ 花纹·褐之段
- Well, freeloading comes more naturally to you than most... ｜ 把蹭吃蹭喝说得这么自然…
- Well, as long as you've already created that particular toy model, of course. ｜ 只要是你试出来的玩具造型，随便兑换哪个都行。
- Not that you had to run — we grabbed you and booked it... Still, you gave us quite the fright, fainting the way you did after the battle! Are you still feeling unwell? ｜ 你是没有跑啦，是我们一路抱着你出来的…不过，刚才在战斗后突然晕倒，吓了我们一跳，现在还觉得难受吗？
- Mist-Cloaked Paths ｜ 浮岚隐迹
- Okay, just you wait, I'm going to fix this right now. I'll dig all the books out, and return them to the proper shelves! ｜ 不行，你们等着。我得想办法把那些书找出来放回外面的架子！
- An ancient golden cup that is both marvelously and luxuriously wrought. Murmurings can be heard within its empty innards. ｜ 一尊古老的金杯，形制奇妙华丽，空空如也的腹内回响着呢喃之声。
- Alright, fine... Come on, Bongo-Head, there's no time to mope. ｜ 唔，好吧…「咚咚小圆帽」，我们也没工夫难过了。

- Diona's attitude towards me is... how should I put it? Rather rigid. I've yet to find the opportunity to speak with her properly. I'm not sure if it's an issue with my family line or— Oh? It's not? She simply despises alcohol? Huh... I never thought I'd come across another bartender like myself in Mondstadt. ｜ 迪奥娜对我的态度很是生硬，我也一直没找到合适的机会交流。如果是涉及到家族恩怨的话…嗯？不是？只是单纯地讨厌酒？没想到在这蒙德，也会有讨厌酒的酒保啊。
- So, they are in the right order? ｜ 顺序没有错？

- Now, which book to read today? Aha, how about this — Chongyun, pick a book, any book, and read it out loud to me, will you? That way, I can give my mind a rest. ｜ 今天从哪本开始看好呢…有了！重云，你随便挑一本书读给我听好不好？这样就不需要我来动脑子了。
- It's not strictly necessary. Not for me, anyway. ｜ 不必须，至少我不用。
- Back then, this method was rather ineffective. They lacked the skills to navigate the intricate structure of the Ley Lines. ｜ 在遥远的过去，这种做法算不上有效，因为相较于地脉精妙的结构，他们的技巧实在粗糙。
- We hope that at least the people who reside near the waterfront can move away before it's too late, so we've started distributing Magic Pockets to them. ｜ 我们至少希望住在海边的住户可以提前搬走，所以我们开始给他们发放「魔术口袋」。
- Whenever I eat a Tataco, I like to put an extra tortilla underneath to catch all the ingredients that fall out. That way, you basically get two Tatacos in one. ｜ 吃塔塔可时，在下面放一张空饼皮。只要吃得足够多，掉下来的食材就能变成一个新的塔塔可了。
- Yup, I do. ｜ 嗯，记得。
- Movo Tiga ｜ 「莫沃·提嘎」
