- *sigh* I heard, during previous Lantern Rites, there were huge firework shows or tons of Xiao Lanterns. ｜ 唉，我听说往年的海灯节，都会放一场大大的烟花，或者是放飞很多很多霄灯。
- Welcome. Are you here to purchase some perfume? We've just got some new stock. ｜ 你好，请问是来买香水的吗？我们正好进了一批新货喔。
- Huh, you're right... which is already pretty astonishing. To think that the two of us along with a whole expanse of sky can be packed inside a tiny little teapot. ｜ 是啊，多么不可思议啊。天空和我们都被装在了茶壶里。
- Haha... Either way, it's good that you were willing to come. ｜ 哈哈…不管怎么说，前辈你愿意来就是好事。
- Blizzard Strayer ｜ 冰风迷途的勇士
- Really? Paimon doesn't think so. ｜ 这算什么大场面啦！
- Is she out on patrol? She must've left in a hurry, look at that notebook on the table... ｜ 是出去巡林了吗？看来走得很急啊，桌上的笔记本都没收好…
- Revive on cooldown ｜ 复苏冷却中
- Here is your payment. Please take it. Now, I must really get back to tasting this Egg Roll... ｜ 这些报酬给你，请收下吧，我要继续细细品味这道鸟蛋烧了…
- Normal Attack: Toss 'N' Turn Spear ｜ 普通攻击·颠扑连环枪
- Its scorching light must have shackled and blinded the Prinzessin's Auge der Verurteilung and twisted the scales of fate! ｜ 定是其辉灼的光芒桎梏了那位皇女的断罪之眼，才使得命运的天平产生了偏谬！
- Obtain the wooden training dummy ｜ 取得训练用木桩
- But you'll need Nahida's power if you want to save that Fungus. ｜ 想要救那只蕈兽，需要纳西妲的力量。
- It's not the amount of sleep but the quality of sleep that's keeping you from growing. ｜ 嗯，我觉得应该是睡眠质量不够好，让你的身高没什么变化。
- "I met a really awesome big-sister in the Bamboo Forest. She gave me a few shiny rocks that were even cooler-looking than mine!" ｜ 「我还在竹林里遇见了一个很帅气的大姐姐。她给了我几块亮闪闪的石头，比我自己找到的好看多了！」
- Looks like a ship with lots of people on it... meeting lots of huge waves... ｜ 看起来，像是一艘船遇上了海浪…然后还有好多人…
- What was that escape method again...? ｜ 逃跑的话，该用…
- But... You worked so hard on all these outfits... ｜ 但…这些可都是你辛辛苦苦做出来的…
- Official Business! ｜ 法度执行！
- ...Wait a second, what are you doing here in Liyue, Teucer? How have I not heard anything about this? ｜ …等等，不对，托克！你是怎么来璃月的，我怎么没接到任何消息…
- A cool-flavored throat lozenge. Said to be the Flower-Feather Clan's secret weapon for soothing their throats and protecting their vocal cords — so eat one and go sing your heart out! Just make sure you don't go overboard, as too much sugar can leave your throat feeling hoarse. ｜ 风味清凉的润喉糖。据说是花羽会部族润喉护嗓的秘密武器，吃下它去纵声欢唱吧！不过小心不要贪多哦，否则过量的糖分也可能会让喉咙沙哑。

- Summons water droplets resembling musical notes that form a Melody Loop, dealing <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color> to surrounding opponents and applying the <color=#80C0FFFF>Wet</color> status to them.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Melody Loop</color>\n·On hit, Barbara's Normal Attacks heal your own party members and nearby teammates for a certain amount of HP, which scales with Barbara's Max HP.\n·On hit, Barbara's Charged Attack generates 4 times the amount of healing.\n·Periodically regenerates your own active character's HP.\n·Applies the <color=#80C0FFFF>Wet</color> status to the character and to opponents who come in contact with them.\n\n<i>Barbara's music is the magic that heals her companions.</i> ｜ 唤出歌声般跃动的水珠，形成歌声之环，对周围的敌人造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>，并施加<color=#80C0FFFF>潮湿</color>状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>歌声之环</color>\n·芭芭拉的普通攻击命中时，为队伍中自己的角色，以及附近的友方角色恢复生命值，回复量受益于芭芭拉的生命值上限；\n·重击命中时，能产生4倍回复量；\n·每隔一段时间，为当前场上自己的角色恢复生命值；\n·对角色与触及的敌人施加<color=#80C0FFFF>潮湿</color>状态。\n\n<i>芭芭拉的音乐就是治疗大家的魔法。</i>

- The revered leader of this land, Natlan's Pyro Archon possesses unparalleled power and an aura to match.\nThe fight against the Abyss has been a long, ancient journey, where the echoes of memory and the warmth of love illuminate her path, fueling her resolve with an unwavering light. The road to victory is forged by countless heroes, and she considers herself merely a vessel of their collective strength.\nToday, Mavuika remains steadfast in her beliefs, guiding Natlan toward a new dawn. ｜ 纳塔的火之神，也是这片土地上备受敬重的领袖。拥有巅峰级的力量和与之匹配的威严气度。\n对抗深渊是一场漫长的旅途，而记忆与爱则是她前行的动力。胜利之路由无数英雄共同铸就，而她自认为只是其中的代行者。\n如今，玛薇卡依然坚守她的信念，带领纳塔走向全新的未来。

- Apparently, a group of Wingless over at {0} have been stirring up trouble... Well actually, perhaps that might be a slight exaggeration. Most of the time, they just stand around grumbling, wailing, and generally causing a ruckus with their Saurian companions. But recently, rumor has it that they've been sneaking around buying weapons, so it seems like a timely invention might be in order. It would be very much appreciated if someone could go check up on them and "snuff out" their "fiery zeal" before things start getting out of hand. ｜ 听说在{0}，有一群失翼者企图闹事…啊，抱歉，闹事可能是比较严重的指控。其实大多数时候就是在那里发牢骚，长啸，和他们的龙一起胡闹。不过最近听说他们偷偷摸摸买了一些武器，这就得小心提防了，希望能有人去看看情况，「浇灭」一下他们无处发泄的「热情」。

- "The writer says that he's going to write a novel about mushrooms."\n"To be more specific, he wants to depict the daily life of a group of talking fungi..."\n"Honestly, I can't imagine what that would be like at all."\n"Haha, they wouldn't be releasing spores everywhere, would they?"\n"Um... Ahem, I didn't say anything, and you didn't hear a word from me just now!" ｜ 「这位老师说…他要写一部和蘑菇有关的小说。」\n「具体来说，就是描写一群能说话的蘑菇们日常的生活起居…」\n「说实话，完全无法想象…蘑菇的日常会是什么啊。」\n「哈哈哈，总不可能是到处喷射孢子…」\n「咳！我，我什么都没说喔！什么都没说！」

- "I must say that of all my clients this time, this one's probably the best in terms of appreciating life—"\n"Before the final battle in his work, his protagonists resolved a periodic crisis and decided to conserve their strength before the climax, enjoying a period of leisurely rest in a countryside mansion."\n"The mansion is Fontainian in design, and possesses everything you could possibly want in abundance, especially food... Even I got hungry reading it."\n"I hear that there is just such a scene in the southern area of Elynas. Could I trouble you to help me find some inspiration there?" ｜ 「要说这次的委托人中，最有生活品味的作者，我觉得当属这位——」\n「他的主角团在作品的最终决战前，解决了阶段性的危机，养精蓄锐，在乡间宅邸度过了一段悠闲欢快的时光。」\n「宅邸是枫丹风格的，日常的衣食住行则包罗万象，尤其是料理…把我都看饿了。」\n「据说厄里那斯的南部，就有这一卷小说封面所需的风景，麻烦你去采风了…」
- Fatui Skirmisher ｜ 愚人众先遣队
- I find that the, um... beauty of bright sunlight is best appreciated from the indoors through a window. ｜ 这种天气最适合在室内窗边，嗯，欣赏阳光。
- It's all fun and games until the real Fatui show up, huh... ｜ 没想到居然引来了真的愚人众…

- (Hope I can deliver them in time.) ｜ （希望能按时交付啊。）
- Hehe, oh I see! Well, how wonderfully comedic, to have your own counterattack only to come back and wound you! ｜ 呵呵…多么有戏剧性的一幕。本该用于反击的子弹，却对自己造成了致命伤…

- New Smelting Technique Unlocked ｜ 新的熔炼技巧已解锁
- As long as I don't tell him, he won't be able to tell. He even thinks that the newcomers' party was the first time we met, but it was a long time before that. ｜ 只要我不说破，他肯定看不出来。他还以为带新人聚餐那天是我们第一次见面，但其实很久前我就见过他了。
- I'm a public servant for the Inazuma Shogunate. I was sent to Sumeru for my meritorious service. ｜ 我是稻妻幕府的公务人员，因为立了功被派遣到了须弥。
- When attacked, restores a certain amount of HP to self. ｜ 受到攻击时，将为自身恢复一定的生命值。
- Gambler's Dice Cup ｜ 赌徒的骰盅
- Working good, Oleg... ｜ 情况良好，奥列格…
- A dream, huh... ｜ 梦啊…
- Stupid Nara got it wrong. ｜ 糊涂那菈，记得不对。
- It is no difficult matter, saving Mihir. Perhaps I might even call it trivial. But we Pari each have our mission, and we also have different... ideals. ｜ 解救米希尔对我来说可不是什么难事，应该说，不费吹灰之力。只是吾辈花灵各自使命不同，理念…理念也不同。
- I'm sorry! It's just... It's a completely new environment, and my body's taking some time to adapt. ｜ 对不起！可能是突然来到一个全新的环境，身体还不太适应。
- Outside the dream world, there are 12 nurseries that condense Vasmrti. With them, the Vanarana nursery will be full of Viparyas. ｜ 在梦境之外，有十二座苗圃，会凝结出桓斯弥利底。有了它们，桓那兰那的苗圃就能生满毗波耶。
- Of course! That's the cruel reality facing every competitor in a place like the Pankration Ring. ｜ 那是当然，拳力斗技场就是这么残酷的地方啊。
- I didn't think you guys would believe in this kind of thing. ｜ 没想到你们也相信这个。
- Why do you want to take a photo? ｜ 为什么还要留影？
- The Sumeru Roses we planted and the Golden Roses in Affan's nursery have both been growing nicely. Thank you so very much. ｜ 我们种下的须弥蔷薇，还有阿凡老先生苗圃里的金蔷薇，都长得很好，这都得谢谢你。
- A powerful warrior from the canyon, whose bravery has been acknowledged and for which they may wear the Saurian Crown.\nA warrior who can strike with the power of a rockfall. Even among the Children of Echoes, who live and breathe rock and crystal, Saurian-Crowned Warriors are masters who understand rock and stone better than any. It is said they can even divine the purity and grain of the interior of raw ore merely by looking at the rough exterior. ｜ 来自峡谷之中，勇武受到认可，得以获授龙冠的强大武士。\n能够借助岩崩之力进行击打的武者。即使是在与山岩晶体亲近的「回声之子」中，龙冠武士也是领悟山岩之力更为透彻的高手。据说他们甚至能够透过原矿表面粗糙的风化皮，分析其内部的成色和纹理。
- Oh boy, Liloupar's at it again with the scary analogies... ｜ 呜哇…又来了！利露帕尔的又怪又吓人的比喻！
- Good thing I was adequately prepared, or I'd have lost. ｜ 还好准备充足，不然就要败在你手下了。
- Part of the profits I made from Ms. Farzah's formula will be used to promote your formula for free, and the rest of the profits... will be all yours. ｜ 用法尔扎小姐的配方来赚钱，赚到的钱里分出一部分，一部分用于免费推广您的配方，另一部分…您可以拿去犒劳自己。
- Whoo! It's all lit up like Sheeshroom! Let's go find the others. ｜ 好耶！和大蘑头一样亮起来了！再去看看其他蘑菇吧！
- Naturally. ｜ 有啊。
- Alright, I'm going to ask around. ｜ 嗯，我再打听看看吧。

- Someone's planning to kidnap Sachin? Goodness... Though I suppose it's not all that surprising. ｜ 预谋绑架萨齐因…居然有人在策划这种事。不过仔细想想，倒也并不奇怪。
- We shall now turn to the Oratrice Mecanique d'Analyse Cardinale to render the final verdict on the charges. ｜ 现在，交由「谕示裁定枢机」进行最后的定夺。

- Could you tell me a bit about The Chasm? ｜ 关于层岩巨渊…
- I'm thinking that there shouldn't be a coin pouch here. ｜ 我在想，这里不应该有钱袋。

- What for? You'll have to wait and see. ｜ 有什么用？到时候你就知道了。
- Alright, farewell and profuse thanks to you both. I shall have to host you at the Kamisato Estate when my sister is next available. ｜ 嗯，非常感谢二位，再见了。下次等家妹空闲，由我做东，邀请你们来做客吧。
- Heh... Hehehe... It's not as crazy as you make it sound. ｜ 呵…呵呵呵…也没你说的那么疯吧。

- "Though I cling to that which has given me the strength to hold on, the weight of letting go is ever-foreboding."\nMy apologies, it should be a happy occasion, and yet it is such a sad phrase that comes to mind. Our time together has been so pleasant that I am fearful of losing what I have gained. I'm sorry, I must compose myself. ｜ 「尝有所思，斯世如磐；孰料浮世事，留驻难。」\n…抱歉，明明是值得高兴的时候，我却想起了那么悲伤的诗歌。和你相处的时间过于畅怀，竟然让我害怕再次失去。真是…失态了呀。
- Both written letters and hand-offs using floating barrels are methods of communication that can be intercepted. ｜ 沟通是通过信件，交接是通过浮桶，都是存在时间差的间接接触。
- You've been writing that paper for so long already. What's the point of rushing it now? Can't you see you're disturbing Mr. Obata? ｜ 你那论文写了那么久，难道还差这么一点时间吗？你看，这不就打扰到小畑先生了吗？

- Hmph, need you even ask? Young people these days really do need to get out more. ｜ 哼，连这个也要问，现在的年轻人真是少见多怪呀。
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nLater, the Lord of Verdure taught people the mystery of the forging of black iron. The innocent mortals thus grasped the knowledge of using fire to forge blades.\nThe Lord of Verdure took pleasure in their knowledge — Lethal as fire and blades were to her, they made ordinary people powerful. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n后来，草木的主人教会了人们锻造黑铁的奥秘。就这样，天真的凡人学会了使用火与利刃的知识。\n草木的主人为之欢欣，纵使火与金属会伤害她，但亦会使凡人强大。
- Increases Shield Strength by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. Scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color> for 8s. Max 5 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. While protected by a shield, this ATK increase effect is increased by 100%. ｜ 护盾强效提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>。攻击命中后的8秒内，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color>。该效果至多可叠加5层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。此外，处于护盾庇护下时，该效果的攻击力提升效果提高100%。
- Rain. One way to wash off the grime. ｜ 雨，可以洗净脏污。
- Plume of Luxury ｜ 华馆之羽
- Not rushing home today? ｜ 今天不用着急回家吗？
- Good thing you were here, otherwise I would have no idea what would have happened to me. ｜ 还好有你在，不然我都不知道怎么收场了。
- Next ｜ 下一条
- Now, only the final enemy awaits vanquishing. Continue forward. Never, ever, stop moving forward. ｜ 接下来，只剩下最后应当消灭的敌人了。继续前进吧。要一直、一直前进下去。
- Today can be a trial run. Where we go from here will depend on how well we manage to cooperate today. ｜ 总之，今天的事是一次尝试，让我们试着合作，再以此为根基去判断以后的走向吧。
- Hmm... Okay, fair enough. But don't take too long! And after the fair, how about we all have a meal at Wanmin Restaurant? My treat, of course. ｜ 啊？好吧，那也只好这样了…但你要快点来哦，然后我们一起去万民堂吃饭。今天我来下厨，怎么样？
- Ah, if it isn't Kaedehara Kazuha! What brings you here today? ｜ 这不是枫原万叶嘛，怎么了？
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nLegend says that when the first usurper came to the primordial sea, the first sovereign gave him a goblet of water.\nLater, he became the unquestioned god-king, and used this goblet of water to refine the mysterious drops of dew, establishing a splendid and powerful empire.\nBut that is now an ancient story, whose main characters now sleep in the phosphorescence of the schools of the deepwater fish. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n传说在最初的僭主来到原始之海时，水国的先主曾赠予他一杯水。\n后来，他成为了不可质疑的神王，以这杯水提炼神奇的露珠，从而建立了辉煌强盛的帝国。\n那是久远的故事了，其主角如今正沉睡在深海鱼群的磷光之中。
- Huh, I could have sworn I've seen this kind of cup before... ｜ 这杯子的样式…
- Complete {0} to unlock {1} event ｜ 完成「{0}」，以开启「{1}」活动
- Farewell, Traveler. I wish you safe travels. ｜ 那么我就先告辞了，旅行者，祝你接下来的旅途一路顺风。
- Take ｜ 取走
- Don't forget to strafe, Blitzara! ｜ 记得多多侧闪哦，「百雷遮罗」！
- —They'd say, as if we didn't have enough people coming in from outside. ｜ ——好像嫌办公场所的外来人员还不够多似的。
- !!! ｜ ！！
- Letters in the Sands Half-Buried ｜ 「半埋沙中的信笺」
- I am... Ann. I must rescue Princess Lyris... ｜ 我是…安，我要救出莉利丝公主…

- Thank you, sir... ｜ 谢谢叔叔…
- And that Athos, who is he? ｜ 还有那个阿托斯，他又是谁？

- Can Khvarena even prostrate themselves? ｜ 灵光有尾巴可摇吗？

- Yes... Although, rather than a soul, it would be more accurate to say that I'm a "story" created by the people of Natlan. ｜ 没错，但准确来说，我并不是灵魂，只是一段由众多纳塔人构成的「故事」。

- Say no more, or my hair might spontaneously combust... Come on, just show us the course already. ｜ 说得我头发都烧起来了…很难不心动啊，快带我们开开眼。
- Yes, I do. In fact, even before that banquet, Boss already knew of the connection between Sinthe and the serial disappearances case. ｜ 是的。在那场宴会开始前，其实老板已经知道了「乐斯」与「少女连环失踪案」之间的联系。
- So you see, It's not just me! I guess everyone shouts from the top of a mountain at some point in their life. ｜ 所以你看，人在一生中，多多少少总要在山顶大叫几次的。
- We've been playing for ages, I'm getting hungry now... ｜ 玩了这么久，肚子都饿了…
- Sure... Uh, wait a minute. You just said something super scary so casually... ｜ 嗯…嗯？等等，你刚才是不是用特别轻松的语气说了什么特别可怕的事情？！
- Everyone... Please don't be so down and gloomy. Remember what she told us? If we were to feel troubled, the patient would become anxious as well... ｜ 大家…别这么沉重…祖莉亚夫人说过，要是我们也忧心忡忡，病人会被传染的。
- A clockwork device preserved to a very high standard. One can only wonder what mysterious power deserves such fine treatment. ｜ 被用很高规格保存起来的发条。不知道拥有什么神奇的力量值得如此高的待遇。
- The bounty target (Winged Dendroshroom) will occasionally unleash Dendro vortexes that will deal Dendro DMG to characters they hit. ｜ 讨伐目标「有翼草本真蕈」会间歇性释放草之漩涡，对命中的角色造成草元素伤害
- ...Me? Well, I don't exactly mind it, although it does feel a bit... weird when people stare as they come and go. ｜ …我？我倒是无所谓，只是偶尔会被来来往往的人盯着看，心里会有一些…嗯…奇怪的感觉…

- How come a man sells spice like this? ｜ 怎么还有这么推销调料的人…

- #When the moon hangs highest, Azariq tells a rather coarse joke about a crocodile and a Sumpter Beast, which loses him his blanket-sharing privileges.\n{M#Jeht tells you about many trivial but funny things...\nShe seems to have lived well amongst the Tanit since your last parting.}{F#Jeht tells you about many trivial but funny things...\nA light scent of spices wafts from her, and it seems to you that all the stories she has to tell since your last parting seem tinged with this sadness.} ｜ #月上中天的时刻，阿萨里格讲了一个关于鳄鱼和驮兽的粗俗笑话，让他失去了与你们分享毛毯的资格。\n{M#婕德又为你讲述了许多好笑的琐事…\n自从上次离别后，她在塔尼特的生活一定很充实。}{F#婕德又为你讲述了许多好笑的琐事…\n她的身上散发着淡淡的香料气息，似乎上次离别后的所有故事，都氤氲着这样忧伤的风味。}

- This piece of pottery is a deep brass hue throughout, marked by decorative cyan paint. It is said that this color is like "the ocean horizon upon which the sinking sunset gleams," hence the "Eventide" name it has. In truth, most desert dwellers have never seen the scenery depicted by this type of pottery.\nMade in the rainforest areas, they are more expensive, and are often used to store fine wine. Of course, it works perfectly fine as a beautiful tabletop adornment. ｜ 通体呈现出深沉的黄铜色彩，饰有青蓝色漆面的陶器。听说其色泽如同「夕阳即将沉没在水天线时的大海」，因而有了「晚潮」之名。事实上，许多沙漠子民都未曾见过这种陶器之名所描绘的情景…\n原产于雨林地区的这种陶器较为昂贵，通常被人们用于贮存美酒。当然，纯粹用作桌面摆件也极为美观。

- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 6):\nThe scene revolves around members of the Tabletop Troupe taking part in an activity together. Guided by their Game Master, Clorinde, they encounter a <color=#e5870a>merchant</color>, a <color=#e5870a>Sternshield Crab</color> blocking their path, and a <color=#e5870a>Cryo Regisvine</color> guarding some treasure, in <color=#e5870a>that order</color>. Navia, who is playing an Adventurer, will attempt to use <color=#e5870a>"Persuasion"</color> in each encounter. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第6镜）：\n展现桌上剧团成员们一同进行活动时的场景。在克洛琳德饰演的主持人的引导下，众人<color=#e5870a>依次</color>与<color=#e5870a>商人</color>，挡路的<color=#e5870a>坚盾重甲蟹</color>和守护宝藏的<color=#e5870a>急冻树</color>遭遇。而在每一次遭遇中，娜维娅饰演的冒险家均会尝试对对方使用<color=#e5870a>「说服」</color>。

- The way things are going, I'd say it won't take long before the problem's been thoroughly dealt with. ｜ 按这个速度，理论上，再过不久，本次生物入侵的问题就会被彻底解决。
- This ornament, hung in a very visible spot at the storefront, is decorated with two rows of cute, small colored flags — an exquisitely-made gift from Barbara.\n"Barbara hopes that these little ornaments will contribute to the festive cheer, and they sure have been effective! Even the birds that often wreak havoc on the roof seem to have been infected by this atmosphere, becoming quite docile indeed."\n"Paimon appears to have gotten some inspiration from these flags regarding the birds that have come to rest on our roof."\n"Paimon has started to... reason with the birds (especially the few that had teased her before), requesting that they line up like waiters to give customers the impression that they are being given a grand welcome."\n"The birds did not acknowledge Paimon's request, flying away instead. It seems that her bird-speech could use a bit more work." ｜ 悬挂在店铺醒目位置的装饰品，两排造型可爱的小彩旗，是芭芭拉的精心制作的礼物。\n「芭芭拉希望这些小饰品增添节日的气氛，效果很明显！就连之前在顶棚上捣乱的小鸟都受到了感染，变得乖巧听话了。」\n「派蒙看着这些小彩旗，想起了小鸟们停在屋檐上的样子，好像有了什么灵感。」\n「派蒙开始和小鸟们讲道理了，希望调皮的小鸟也来帮忙，至少摆出一排侍者的样子，给客人们一种受到了隆重招待的感觉…尤其是之前戏弄过派蒙的那几只！」\n「小鸟们没有理会派蒙，又飞走了。看来派蒙的鸟语造诣还有待提升啊…」

- ...Let's go somewhere a bit further away! ｜ …去更远一点的地方好了！

- Linger not here, for this is the remembrance of eternal glory. It is the index of countless pools, the blueprint of the oases, and yet it would become a place of ill-omen, where swords met in anger. - That wasn't supposed to be a compliment! ｜ 我没在夸你啦。

- Hah, must be nice having a saurian companion who can talk... ｜ 有一只会说话的龙伙伴真好啊，让人羡慕。

- *sigh* I honestly don't know what to say to her now... ｜ 唉，我也不知道怎么劝好她…
- But to be honest, I haven't had the time to go to Yanshang Teahouse in a long while Not since I got assigned here, anyway. ｜ 不过自从来了层岩巨渊以后天天在这里值班，已经很久没有沾过岩上茶室的边了…
- But I... I saw it all, with my own eyes! And then I had to watch it all die, little by little! ｜ 我亲眼见证过！再一点一点地看它们全部消失！
- You remembered what Paimon told you! Oh, you're gonna make Paimon cry! Thank you, Pahsiv! ｜ 真让人感动，你居然还记得我说过的话，谢谢你！
- If Paimon was trapped here, Paimon would definitely want to go back home and be with everyone else... ｜ 毕竟如果是我的话，比起待在这种地方，还是更想回到花海和大家待在一起…
- Well, it certainly looks all spick and span now, huh? Let's go back and look for Neko. ｜ 这样子应该就算是打扫干净了吧，我们回去找寝子吧。

- If we don't give her good advice and find something for her to do, she'll run off from the tribe herself, and then who knows what kinda crazy hijinks she'll get into? ｜ 要是不给这孩子一个准话，让她有点事情做，她说不定会一个人跑去部族外瞎鼓捣…

- Paimon's starting to feel a little tired from all our adventuring. Is it because we're always on the road? ｜ 总觉得最近的冒险有点疲惫了，难道是因为一直在旅行吗？
- Oh? More customers from abroad? Hehe, my cuties sure are popular. You really do have friends all over Teyvat... ｜ 哦？又有别国来的客人了？小可爱的朋友还真是遍布提瓦特呢…
- Because of "compassion"... ｜ 因为「怜悯」…
- If my brief internment of surface-folk souls is a disaster bereft of rhyme and reason, then what would you call the millennia-long suffering of our kind? ｜ 若说我将地上之人的灵魂暂时囚禁于此乃是无妄之灾，那我们的同族数千年以来所承受的那些苦难又算是什么？
- Enjoy? What's there to enjoy here...? ｜ 「欣赏」？这有什么好看的…

- A Vision... Could be proof of strength, or a medal for having survived... who knows? There're two sides to every coin. I won't limit my Vision with ceremonies and definitions. It witnesses me, and I witness it, that's all. ｜ 「神之眼」可以是实力的证明，也可以是幸存的勋章…谁知道呢？真正的好东西总是具有两面性。我不会定义「神之眼」。我和它只是互相见证的关系罢了。

- And when I had finally gotten far enough away to look back at the scene of the crime... They had put all the clothes in a pile, looking to make a fire with which to barbecue some meat... ｜ 我好不容易才逃出来，远远往回望了一眼…它们把抢到的服饰堆成一摞，打算拿来生火烤肉…
- Don't you want to go back to your real home, Lanoire? Look, you can see it from here. We just have to go over there, and we'll have reached the end of our adventure. ｜ 莉诺尔不想回自己真正的家吗？你瞧，终点就在眼前了，只要走到那里，探险就结束啦。

- The significance of oases lies in the embrace of the desert. The oasis dwellers have never been oblivious to this. Thus did the ancestors in Gurabad build the hermitage for the Lord of Desert.\nThrough the sandstorm-shrouded past and present, this hermitage has become an asylum for countless desert dwellers, among whom are some bandits as well... ｜ 绿洲正因沙漠的环抱而拥有自身存在的意义。绿洲的住民从未遗忘这点…因此，居尔城的先民在这里建造了用于纪念沙漠之主的隐修所。\n在沙暴肆虐的昨日与今日，这座隐修所早已成为了无数沙漠住民躲避黄沙的避难处。在此避难的无疑也不乏恶徒…

- After talking things through with a friend, he introduced me to an exorcist named Chongyun. They say that he's a specialist in these bump-in-the-night matters. ｜ 我和朋友说了之后，他帮我介绍了一位名叫重云的方士，据说是处理这种莫名其妙情况的专家。

- So it really is a key. ｜ 果然是钥匙嘛。
- DMG dealt by Elemental Skill and Elemental Burst is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>. When an Elemental Skill hits an opponent, its CRIT Rate will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>3.5%</color>. When an Elemental Burst hits an opponent, its CRIT Rate will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>3.5%</color>. Both of these effects last 10s separately, have 4 max stacks, and can be triggered once every 0.1s. ｜ 元素战技与元素爆发造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>。元素战技命中敌人时，元素战技的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>3.5%</color>；元素爆发命中敌人时，元素爆发的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>3.5%</color>。上述两种效果各自持续10秒，至多叠加4次，每0.1秒至多触发一次。
- I've thought about that, too. ｜ 这一点我也想到过。
- Ooooh, close but no cigar! The outlander samurai, once pursued by the Maison Gardiennage for days, is stronger still! ｜ 可惜呀，只差一点了！执律庭追捕多天的异国武士还是略胜一筹！
- You must give great thought to every detail, from the layout of the plot to the rhythm of the lines. ｜ 情节的铺设，行文的节奏，可谓样样都是学问。

- Meow... "Just as a seasoned warrior can foresee the path of his opponent's sword, so too can I, as a TCG master, predict my opponent's every play. It would be improper to pit a newcomer to the art of the card against one such as myself, and I must therefore politely decline." ｜ 喵…「就如同高超的武者能够洞悉敌人的意图，这种牌局实在是与身为顶尖牌手的我不太相配，恕我拒绝。」
- Huh. Paimon didn't know that Yumkasaurs could do that. And here we were thinking the Alpacas were about to get attacked! Guess it was all just a misunderstanding, huh? ｜ 没想到匿叶龙还能替人看管绵驮兽。之前远远地看见它们，还以为绵驮兽要被袭击了，原来是我误会它了！
- ...Do not tell her that I was here. ｜ …别和她说我来过。
- Back to Asase Shrine... ｜ 回了浅濑神社…
- I do hope nothing else is missing. ｜ 希望这次不缺什么了。

- The nation of Fontaine is the nation of Hydro as well as the nation of trials and justice. Instead of being the literal element, the water in the scene symbolizes judgment and justice. ｜ 这里是正义与审判的国度，枫丹，同时也是水的国度。画中的水，其实就意味着「正义与审判」。

- Hah! See, now you're asking the right questions. ｜ 你算是问到点子上了！
- Anything of note? Hmm... ｜ 值得留意的…
- You mean you'll take this commission? That's fantastic! I knew heroes had hearts of gold. Of course you wouldn't turn your backs on someone at death's very door! ｜ 这么说两位愿意接下这个委托了？那可太好了！哎，我就知道，大英雄宅心仁厚，当然是不会见死不救的！
- As such, I hope you can answer my questions honestly. ｜ 所以，希望你们能诚实地回答我的提问。
- Because they said they would need my help from there on out. They also said that if I refused, they'd just come to you, Granny, and they'd already figured out a way to make you do their bidding. ｜ 因为他们说，接下来需要我的协助。如果我不同意，他们就会找到奶奶你，而且他们还说有办法对付你。
- It looks like my card skills were superior to you this round. ｜ 这一局，我的牌技略略高出你一点。
- Alright, this is it. Get a good night's sleep, okay? I'll see you tomorrow. ｜ 就是这里啦。你们早点休息，我们明天再见。
- What? I can't hunt any of the animals here? Okay, fine. Then I'm gonna head out and find some fresh meat. ｜ 什么？这里的动物都不能猎？行吧，我先出去一趟，带点新鲜的肉回来…
- It is pointless to argue further, descendant of the Kaedehara Clan. If you wish to save this man, then offer me your body in exchange. ｜ 争吵下去没有意义，枫原家的后代。想要救这个家伙，就用你的身体来换。
- It looks like our destiny has been decided. My life shall be devoted to vengeance. There shall be no rest till one of us is dead. ｜ 看来冥冥中已经注定，我将花上我这一生向你复仇，至死方休。

- Ooh, okay... Do you know where we can find him? ｜ 这样啊。那你知道要去哪儿找他吗？

- The Doctor has eyes on something truly incredible this time... ｜ 「博士」大人真是，看上了不得了的东西呢。哈哈哈哈…
- Go now. For Natlan — and for all who lost their lives to the Abyss. ｜ 去吧，为了纳塔，也为了曾经因深渊逝去的，整个提瓦特的人类。
- Ah, good idea. I'll take Mr. Walter's bow, then. From one archer magician to another! ｜ 哦，好主意。那我选「沃尔特」先生的武器吧，他似乎也是一位弓箭手。哈哈，真是奇妙的缘分。
- Not many people realize this, but the true value of this Pearl Galley lies in its guests! ｜ 很多人都没意识到，其实这「珠钿舫」最有价值的是船上的客人啊！

- They might not feel as nice as you're imagining, though. They honestly just feel like anything you'd find on a regular cat or dog. ｜ 不过实际摸上去可能没有你想象的手感那么好啦，其实就跟摸普通的猫猫狗狗是差不多的感觉。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>All these Sumeru scholars seem to wear Akasha Terminals so they can get information from the Akasha system.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>It's like they're carrying an interactive encyclopedia with them wherever they go. Paimon's kinda jealous.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well, I'm not jealous. I have an even better encyclopedia that automatically follows me around, gives me the A-to-Z on everything in Teyvat, and the best part is, it can even talk!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? Was that a compliment? Aw, you're making Paimon blush... Paimon definitely doesn't know as much as an encyclopedia! A-to-Y at most.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well, you know... maybe if you ate a little less, you'd have room for Z, too.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey!!! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>须弥的学者们好像都会戴着虚空终端，从虚空中获得知识。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>感觉像是随身带着一本活着的百科全书一样，有点羡慕。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>一点也不羡慕，我也随身带着一本更高级的百科全书，不仅会自动跟随，还会说话。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？是在夸我吗？哎呀，有点不好意思。其实我也没有知道很多啦，最多就是九十九科全书。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果这本九十九科全书不吃东西就更好了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂——
- We've been waiting for ages now, and finally, Yoimiya said that today's the day! ｜ 我们等了好久，终于宵宫姐姐说，今天是个好机会，所以我们就出来找「大貉妖」了！

- Everyone has people and events from their past that they look back on fondly. I guess we only grow when we realize that those things aren't coming back. ｜ 每个人都有思念的人和事，当意识到那些东西不会回来后，人才能有所成长吧。
- There's nothing to complain about in terms of variety. Unfortunately, the target audience of the training is the majority. That is to say, ordinary soldiers. ｜ 科目的广度几乎无可挑剔，可惜深度针对的是大部分普通将士。
- Once this catastrophe is over, life is sure to spring forth anew. But even if I survived until then, I'd probably be a hopelessly befuddled old so-and-so by then... Hahaha, so never mind, eh. ｜ 浩劫之后，必有新生。再说，就算老夫能幸存到那时，也只是个不解风情的老瞎子吧…哈哈，还是算了。

- During the Archon War, piles of corpses covered the wilderness. People were plunged into misery and suffering. Disease was spreading all over the land. Death devastated the world of the living. ｜ 魔神战争时期，尸横遍野，生灵涂炭，传染病四处蔓延，「死亡」疯狂侵吞我们生者的世界。

- "For reasons that we shall not immediately discuss, the leaves of plants that are packed with moisture can be used to cool you down in an emergency. However, be sternly reminded that you cannot ingest the juices of such a plant."\nThe latest edition of the matra manual contains this particular note concerning this species of desert shrub.\nMany a matra crossing the desert has been spared much grief by this description. That said, they have also grown curious as to who the General Mahamatra must have consulted to improve their manuals so — how does this person have such a keen understanding of all the plants that they might encounter? ｜ 「叶片中富含水分的植物，暂且不讨论原理，若是急需降温，可以用它的叶片冷敷，但请切记，不要饮用这种植物的汁液。」\n在风纪官们的最新版行动条令中，对于这种沙漠中的灌木，有着如上说明。\n多亏这条说明，涉足沙漠的风纪官们避开了不少苦头。他们难免也感到好奇，大风纪官在上任之初完善的这本行动条令，究竟请到了何方神圣作为顾问？为何对于每一样行动中可能遇见的植物，都有如此全面的了解？
- Thank you so much. I'll make some preparations first, and then I'll report for work. ｜ 谢谢你，我准备准备就过去报道啦。
- "I, Tatsunosuke, hereby announce that the military strategy dojo will be permanently shut down starting today." ｜ 「老夫龙之助宣布，兵法道场自今日起永久关闭。」
- ...Y'know what? Forget it, let's go back to the camp now! ｜ 那就不要管什么蘑菇肉了，我们先一起回营地吧！
- Gorou: Serious ｜ 五郎·认真
- Take care, and please do come again! ｜ 客人慢走，下次再来哦！
- Traveling Doctor's Medicine Pot ｜ 游医的药壶

- Hey sweetie, I've heard your elemental sensitivity is very strong... Why not see what you can do? ｜ 小可爱，听说你也有很强的元素感知力…不妨你来试试？
- Thank you for your aid. Please, take this small gift as a token of my esteem. ｜ 辛苦您了，这几份小小礼物，聊表心意，还请收下。
- Barbara-sama! ｜ 芭芭拉小姐。
- You don't say? ｜ 还用你说？
- A cup carved out of ice that is as chilly and biting as winter. Its former master would drink an unfreezable liquor from it. ｜ 用寒冰雕制成的杯盏，如冬天一般坚利。曾经的主人从中啜饮过不冻之酒。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Here in Natlan, they seem to use woven scrolls where most nations would use books. It feels so different reading off of them.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Yeah. They say it started with the Masters of the Night-Wind, when the Shamans began recording their tribal history and legends on woven material. As the practice became more widely adopted, the number and variety of stories grew.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Ooh, Paimon should make a record of all our adventures as well! That way, if you ever start a tribe called the Travelers, you'll have your very own historical record!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Plus, it could make a really cool cape. And an extra blanket when you're camping in the wild...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> That would make for one "weathered" chronicle. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>纳塔的传说和故事大多是编织在织物上面的，跟其他国家的书读起来体验很不一样呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯，据说最早是起源于「烟谜主」，萨满会用织物来记录部族的历史和传说。后来织物被用于编写各种各样的故事，题材也越来越丰富了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿，我也把我们一路的故事写下来吧，要是你有一天组建了名为「旅行者」的部族，就有现成的历史读物了！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>而且，平时能围在身上当披风，露营的时候还能躺在上面睡觉…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>真是「饱经风霜」的冒险传记呢。

- "These plants can be used as incense, and their aroma is both very light and lacking in any beneficial properties. In fact, they might cause people to become drowsy. As such, be sure that no one with a sensitive nose is nearby — though on the other hand, it is recommended that those who cannot smell its aroma at all should be asked to visit Bimarstan as soon as possible."\nThe latest edition of the matra manual has this to say concerning this species of desert shrub.\nAmidst the mostly serious and practical descriptions, one may find the odd note that is just plain strange, or that might even be mistaken for mild ridicule. The matra often wonder amongst themselves if these contents were adjusted by the General Mahamatra out of concern that he might be too nervous when attending to his business otherwise... ｜ 「可被当作熏香材料的植物，香气极淡，气味没有任何有益功效，反而可能使人昏昏欲睡，请在使用前确认，身边有鼻子不灵的同僚，或者建议闻不到香气的同僚尽早前往『健康之家』。」\n在风纪官们的最新版行动条令中，对于这种沙漠中的灌木，有着如上说明。\n可是在众多严肃、凛然且极具功能性的说明中，总会夹杂着几条莫名放松，口吻近似于调侃的文字。风纪官们都在揣测，莫不是大风纪官担心自己出勤时太紧张，所以加入了这些调剂的内容？
- You're trying to help them? Heh, that'll be a tall order. ｜ 帮他们？唔，估计很难帮上忙了。

- A modestly adorned semi-open structure, bearing a sign with instrument motifs, shares the same design as "Djembe Studios."\nThe store owner, Anchieta, believes that impulsive purchases should be avoided when choosing musical instruments. Hence, he chose a simple, unadorned decor style to create a stress-free shopping environment. In front of such an unassuming store, customers are less burdened by the psychological strain of trial or returns, and are more likely to find the perfect instrument for themselves. ｜ 外观朴素的半开放式建筑，其上悬挂着乐器纹样的招牌，与「金贝乐棚」所用的店面形制相同。\n据说，在店主安切塔看来，在选择乐器的过程中，最应避免的是冲动消费。出于这个原因，他特意选择了简洁朴素的装饰风格，旨在创造一个无压力的购物环境。毕竟在这样一个不那么华丽的店铺门前，顾客们无需承受过多试用或退货的心理负担，更有可能找到最适合自己的乐器。

- Back when I was fighting that sneaky kitsune, I once saw it on the eastern seashore. It looks like a Thunder Sakura with a torii gate, right? ｜ 以前跟那个臭狐狸斗法的时候，吾辈曾在东方海边见到过。是棵雷樱树的模样，加上鸟居对吧？
- Righto! So, let's take this lamp on over to that Whispering Isle and see what the deal is! ｜ 好嘞…那我们就拿着这盏灯，去那座「絮语岛」上看看吧。

- An ancient Natlan dish. The meticulous roasting locks the juices tightly within the ingredients, while a subtle smokiness lingers like faint golden threads sewn on rare woven scrolls, elevating the flavor to new heights. A single bite will make anyone uncontrollably cheer in delight. ｜ 古老的纳塔菜肴。精心的火烤使得汁水被牢牢锁在食材之中，细微的烟熏香气如同稀有织物上若隐若现的金线，让风味更上一层楼。任何人吃上一口都会情不自禁地发出欢呼声。
- Ohh... okay then. ｜ 啊…原来是这样。

- Alright, the game table is right over there in the garden. The orders I've placed at Good Hunter will also be delivered there. ｜ 嗯，「嘟嘟可轰轰奇遇记」的游戏桌就放在花园那边，我在「猎鹿人」下的订单，也会送到那里。

- Huni's saying nasty things about the Mountain King! It's not right, he's our hero! ｜ 胡妮她侮辱山王大人！那可是我们的英雄！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Intricately Carved Calligraphy Table.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「木纹雅致的书法桌案」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- You can't change the past. ｜ 过去无法改变。
- Now, in this Evernight, gaze upon the borders of Byakuyakoku. ｜ 请你在常夜之中，远望白夜国的边疆吧。
- And if you were to stop drinking it completely... you'll experience flashes of paranoia and anxiety, while lacking energy to do anything. It's an extremely dangerous substance. ｜ 而一旦停药，整天都会很疲惫，莫名其妙产生焦虑感，可以说后患无穷。
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>40–60</color> stamina. ｜ 恢复<color=#3399CCFF>40-60</color>点体力。
- *growl* *gurgle*... ｜ 咕咕，咕咕…
- Anyway, you shouldn't go running off on your own! ｜ 一个人的话还是不要到处乱跑会比较好吧。
- You are... different from all the others. Are you human? ｜ 你们，和之前的所有人都不一样。你们是人类吗？
- Instructor's Feather Accessory ｜ 教官的羽饰
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- #Played by {NICKNAME} ｜ #{NICKNAME}饰

- It's another Ei! ｜ 有另一个影！
- Animula Choragi Chapter ｜ 司颂之章
- Keep your voice down! ｜ 小声点！
- Have you made any progress then? ｜ 那你有什么进展吗？
- For every 3 HP of healing your characters receive, this card accumulates 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Sea-Dyed Foam</color>. (Maximum of 2, <color=#D3BC8EFF>Current healing received: ${[GCG_TOKEN_SHIELD]}</color>)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When this character deals DMG:</color> Consume all <color=#FFFFFFFF>Sea-Dyed Foam</color>. DMG is increased by 1 for each one consumed. ｜ 我方角色每受到3点治疗，此牌就累积1个<color=#FFFFFFFF>「海染泡沫」</color>。（最多累积2个，<color=#D3BC8EFF>当前已受到${[GCG_TOKEN_SHIELD]}点治疗</color>）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色造成伤害时：</color>消耗所有<color=#FFFFFFFF>「海染泡沫」</color>，每消耗1个都使造成的伤害+1。
- That might be problematic. ｜ 这朵花也许有问题…
- The picture should be taken between 11:00 – 13:00 ｜ 留影时间为11-13点
- So, it seems you believe me after all. ｜ 看来，你是相信我了。
- Abyss Herald ｜ 深渊使徒
- Raw meat sometimes makes my stomach hurt. Your cooked meat, smells good... AND... tastes good. ｜ 生的肉，有时候，拉肚子。你做的肉，很香，好吃。
- Try anything rash and we'll all get busted! ｜ 你要是真的过去动手，我们都要被抓进去了！
- Have a good one. And don't forget to bring the treasure back here when you find it — we split it three ways, as agreed. ｜ 您走好，拿到宝藏之后，记得拿回来我们一起分啊。

- The best time to attack is when a Mitachurl stops to ignite its axe. ｜ 丘丘暴徒试图点燃斧头时，就是攻击的最好时机。
- Alright, alright. You can decide on your greeting gift yourselves. Let me tell you how to get to the Jade Chamber first. ｜ 好了好了，要送什么见面礼你们慢慢想，我先把去群玉阁的方法告诉你们。

- Your prior achievements are impressive... But a great adventurer constantly seeks to improve. ｜ 你之前的成绩还不错嘛…不过伟大的冒险家，就是要学会自己突破自己。

- How Arana knows, not important. But Arana wants to help Narana, this very important. ｜ 兰拉娜为什么知道，不重要。但是，兰拉娜要帮助那菈拉娜，很重要。

- Actually, I was thinking of visiting the relatives of some convicted criminals. Some of them are elderly folks, some of them are just kids. ｜ 我是想去探望一些犯人的家属。有老人，也有小孩。
- I agree. Now, if I was swimming it would be easy, no matter how far, but these steep mountain slopes... ｜ 我也觉得。游泳什么的，即便路途遥远也还算方便，这样陡峭的山就…

- It contains the investigations and observations into the cultural customs of the hilichurls by the "Poet Laureate of Hilichurlian," Jacob Musk, a Mondstadt ecologist. This volume features the social structure and characteristics of the hilichurls. ｜ 蒙德生态学者，「丘丘语桂冠诗人」雅各布·马斯克关于丘丘人社会习俗的考察，本卷介绍了丘丘人的社会形式与特征。
- Klee: "Hehe, the fish from here must taste amazing! Klee really wants to try one..."\nBarbara: "Alright, let's go catch some fish together! But we need to be quiet, okay? We mustn't let my big sister find out."\nKlee: "Really? You like eating fish too?"\nBarbara: "Haha, I sure do, but I like catching them even more! When we were kids, my sister and I used to go catching fish together sometimes. She might look super-serious now, but let me tell you, when she was a kid, she was so much fun. She even had a pet tortoise! Hehe, can you imagine?" ｜ 可莉：「这里的鱼，抓来烤着吃一定很棒吧…可莉想吃鱼…」\n芭芭拉：「那芭芭拉陪你去抓鱼吧！不过小声一点，别让姐姐发现我们去抓鱼哦。」\n可莉：「真的吗？芭芭拉姐姐也喜欢吃鱼吗？」\n芭芭拉：「哈哈哈，比起吃，还是抓鱼玩的乐趣比较大呢。小时候我和姐姐也去抓过…别看姐姐平时那样，小时候也是个很有童心的人哦。以前她还养过小乌龟，没想到吧！」

- Hey now, Paimon hasn't agreed to that yet! ｜ 喂，我可还没有同意呢！

- I'm an ace angler! ｜ 我可是钓鱼大师！
- Please excuse me for a moment. I think I'll leave the gift in her abode. ｜ 你们先聊，我去将礼物放入洞天。
- It's also a unique take on Jueyun Chili Chicken. Although the dish as a whole is served cold, the chili peppers have been stir-fried and so they're still just a little warm on the inside. You get a nice crunch as you bite in, then you get the spiciness and warmth all coming in together, and then just a hint of that wonderful pepperiness to top it all off... It's quite simply extraordinary! ｜ 这道香嫩椒椒鸡非常独特。菜虽是凉拌，里头的辣椒却翻炒过，内有余温。嚼在口里是辣中带热，热中带脆，还带些许胡椒味，妙极啊！
- Mm! Smart Yellow Fur! Mamesuke grateful! ｜ 呶！黄毛聪明！豆助谢谢！

- Banu, listen... ｜ 芭努你听我说…
- *coughing* Paimon accidentally swallowed some water... So scary! Huh, what is this place? ｜ 咳咳…不小心呛了一口水，吓死我了…这里是？
- I'd like to hear your actual thoughts, of course. ｜ 当然是真实想法。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Pyro ｜ 火
- Oh, speaking of the recruitment, we found a bunch of people! We should be good to go! ｜ 啊，说起招募参与者…其实我们已经募集得差不多了哦。这趟就是来跟你们汇报的！
- Let's give it one more go, Blade Ninken. We've gotta use more flexible techniques! ｜ 振作起来，「帽子黑影·刀子忍犬」，接下来要用更灵活的战法了！
- My brother had a big fight with our father over that, and he went to strike out on his own. I, on the other hand, was convinced to stay — and is that not a betrayal? ｜ 大哥和父亲大吵了一架，出去自立门户了，但我被说服了，没有跟随大哥，这是背叛吧？
- Uh, no, not at all! Grow up, people! ｜ 唔…完全没有！你们几岁了呀！
- Well Done, Stierlitz! ｜ 「好样的，施季里茨！」

- I mean, even take-out deliveries aren't beneath me... ｜ 没关系，我也送过外卖…
- Not exactly, what I mean is that I don't like working with people who cannot let go of trivial grievances, especially of the kind you saw just now. They start with good intentions, but end up making a big fuss... ｜ 应该说，我有点怕那些为鸡毛蒜皮小事纠缠不休的人。尤其像刚才那种，本来是好心，最终却闹得天翻地覆…
- And it also gives off a gentle, constant light, owing to having lived in utter darkness. ｜ 因为是曾生活在漆黑环境中的生物，所以永远会泛着磷色的微光…

- Hmph... Your tenacity is so infuriating! We're deep in the red for this one! All right, boys, get ready to fight! ｜ 啊啊…这呆瓜软硬不吃，真让人火大！我们这一趟亏大了、亏大了、亏大了！气死我了！兄弟们，给我准备战斗！
- But then a group of hilichurls came out of nowhere and occupied my resting place. So I had no choice but to brave the elements out here! ｜ 但是不知道从哪里来了一群丘丘人占领了我的歇息之处，我只能在外面吹冷风啦！
- What? Why's Mizuki crying? Unless... Oh, maybe we got pulled into one of her bizarre dreams again? ｜ 欸？瑞希姐姐竟然在哭？我们该不会又被拉进什么古怪的梦境里了吧？
- Allow me to finish this. ｜ 我来了结。

- Huh. Paimon didn't expect you to put in this much effort. Where did you find this Onikabuto, anyway? ｜ 放牛的，没想到你还挺用功的，从哪找来了这么一只鬼兜虫啊？
- Haha, if it weren't for my duties as a hostess, I'd be on my merry way there. ｜ 嘿嘿，要不是我在这里招待客人，我已经去玩个痛快了。
- Yikes! He's asking other customers... We're done for! ｜ 啊，糟了！居然问其他客人…这下要露馅了！

For this reason, the abundance of fish here has been preserved for many a long year, awaiting champions who have mastered both sword and rod... ｜ 位于奥奇卡纳塔北岸的钓点，鱼类资源可观，但对于多数鱼师而言，前往此地钓鱼的风险较高，因此，丰富的鱼类资源正为鱼竿与剑的双重强者长久留存…

- The grand prize is a full collection of each light novel published by Yae Publishing House! ｜ 特等奖将会获得八重堂出版的全部轻小说一套！
- Can I trouble you again to help me find her? I can only trust the two of you with this... ｜ 能否再次拜托一下两位恩人，帮我去找下妹妹，只有你们照看她我才放心。
- Oh, about the competition... Usually, you have to pay for the food if you don't finish. ｜ 对了，按照规则，如果「豪宴热斗」的参赛者没能完成挑战，是需要正常支付饭钱的。
- Have you heard Barbara sing before? Her angelic voice contains a magical healing energy. A different kind of magical energy from the one in my potions, of course. I wonder which one you prefer? ｜ 芭芭拉的歌，你听过么？哼哼，听说她的旋律里有种治愈的魔力在流动喔。和我的魔药相比，不知道哪边更合你的胃口呢？
- How's your Ancient Name been? Run into any issues? ｜ 你的「古名」情况如何，没有出问题吧？

- He planned to get the data from public opinion? ｜ 他打算从舆论中获得数据？
- (But that's not the full story...) ｜ （不过总有种被诱导了的感觉…）

- If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have had the honor to heal the forest by destroying Marana's Avatar, or become the king of the Vasara Trees by collecting all these precious memories. ｜ 如果不是你们，我就也不会有此殊荣，能一同消灭无留陀的化身、治愈森林，也无法积累如此多的记忆，成为莎兰树中的王者。
- Hehe, history becomes legend, legend becomes tale — that's how traditions live on. Forgetting is also part of the story. ｜ 呵呵，历史化为传说，传说变为故事，所谓传承究其本质也不过是这样，遗忘原本也是故事的一部分。

- I have to practice my gliding skills even while I try to get a high score. That way, I should be able to glide my way to usually impassable areas to collect research samples... ｜ 我要在努力玩到高分的同时练习飞行技术。这样，就能滑翔到平时上不去的地方，采集研究样本了…

- Haha, Mona, I actually think you've got a sweet voice that's well-suited for singing! If you're interested, I can teach you a few things about vocals once we get back to camp. ｜ 哈哈哈，莫娜声音这么好听，很适合唱歌。要是你不嫌弃，等回营地我教你怎么运气发声。
- There's no need to tell us all of your thoughts right here and now! Sucrose said she'll put a mailbox next to the crafting bench, so you can just write down your thoughts when they come to you, and drop them there. ｜ 不用现在就想完的，砂糖说过她会在蒙德炼金台旁边做个信箱，你们方便的时候把想法写下来投到那里面就好啦。

- Not to mention, I've helped the Millelith catch Treasure Hoarders before! There were two of them trying to escape — I soon sorted them out. ｜ 除了比赛的荣誉，我还帮千岩军抓过盗宝团，有两个逍遥法外的家伙，都是被我收拾的。
- We meet again! ｜ 又见面了。
- During our hunt, Allan reported to me that he'd sighted ores nearby that resembled Crystal Ores... ｜ 我记得狩猎时，艾伦跟我报告说，在附近看到了类似水晶矿的矿石…

- So in order to provide fresh fish to everyone at a reasonable price, I decided to lower my prices to just breaking even... ｜ 为了能让大家吃上便宜又新鲜的鱼，所以到最后我也只能以进货价出售了。
- We will stand united and face the years ahead together. ｜ 我们会紧密地团结在一起，共同度过今后的岁月。
- Welcome to the aquabus system! This station serves three lines. Passengers destined for Romaritime Harbor should take the Clementine Line. ｜ 欢迎乘坐巡轨船，本站一共有三条航线经过。前往海露港方向的乘客请乘坐克莱门汀线；
- Where are you going? ｜ 你们要去哪里？
- You mean, you're not even slightly interested in getting your hands on this forbidden stuff? ｜ 艾尔海森，你不会想得到那些被称为「禁忌」的东西吗？
- Story Quest Access Item ｜ 传说任务解锁道具
- Hmm, now that Paimon thinks about it, letting an Onikabuto go up against monsters certainly could give you results you can't get from ordinary beetle battles! ｜ 嗯，现在看来，让鬼兜虫和魔物战斗，确实能打出普通斗虫无法达到的效果！
- Lord of Wind over Firmament's Cup ｜ 高天的风之主杯

- ...Maybe it is. You've probably seen a great many more things than I have, so I guess you might be more generous to them. But as for me, I'll always keep an eye at the back of my head, just for them. ｜ 也许吧…你作为前辈比我更加见多识广，对盗宝团那些家伙也能更宽容。但我总还要留些心眼盯着他们。

- Score {param2} points ｜ 得分达到{param2}
- Increase Brilliant Blessings levels to accumulate <color=#FFE14BFF>Blessing Levels</color>. Characters will also gain additional <color=#FFE14BFF>attribute increases</color> in the Imaginarium Theater depending on the Blessing Level. ｜ 提升「辉彩祝福」的等级，可以累计<color=#FFE14BFF>「祝福等级」</color>，根据「祝福等级」的大小，角色还将在「幻想真境剧诗」中获得额外的<color=#FFE14BFF>属性增益</color>。
- Rinzou's Letter ｜ 林藏的信
- Then let's keep this momentum going. ｜ 那就趁着这个劲头，继续努力吧。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- So... you must be able to make your own one of these, right? ｜ 那烟绯也能创造一个自己的家园吗。
- It might startle my fellow "family members" if I speak too much using this strange voice. ｜ 看我用莫名其妙的声音进行长篇大论，我的「家人」会害怕的。
- In a single challenge, bring the Aeonblight Drake down by attacking the cores on its wings ｜ 一次挑战中，通过攻击双翼上的核心，使兆载永劫龙兽坠落
- An oddly-shaped weapon made with superior Snezhnayan technology that once belonged to a senior agent. Proper training is required for using this strange weapon. ｜ 利用至冬国优越的技术制造的异形兵器，曾经属于某位资深特工。一般人不经训练，根本无法使用这种奇怪的武具。
- Realm Currency Accumulation Rate: {0} ｜ 洞天宝钱搜聚速度：{0}
- So you do know something else, Melus. ｜ 你果然还知道些什么吧，迈勒斯。
- By the way, your Matriarch seems pretty fearsome... ｜ 话说刚才，你们的主母好可怕的样子…
- Oh, I ran into some kidnappers just now, but thankfully, Dehya came to my rescue. I started to feel unwell after that, so I sat down here. ｜ 哦，我刚才遇上了些歹徒，好在迪希雅帮我解了围。后来身体有点不舒服，就坐过来了。
- No way, Paimon vetoes that idea. Besides, there's only one Paimon, and you already caught her! ｜ 不许钓，而且世上哪有那么多的我能给你钓上来啦！
- There's a thought; Yong'an is always on duty here, and he loves cats and dogs. So does Manager Xiao. I wonder if they'd be happy to help... ｜ …唔，对哦，一直在这值班的永安…还有船厂的枭总管都挺喜欢猫猫狗狗的…说不定可以拜托他们…
- Look enraged. ｜ 做出愤慨的表情。
- Blocked? ｜ 此路不通？
- Okay, a hint: I'm hiding <color=#00E1FFFF>by the cliff</color>. Look carefully! ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，我就藏在<color=#00E1FFFF>悬崖边</color>喔，嘿嘿，仔细留意一下吧。
- Tamoto DMG|{param1:P} ATK+{param2:P} DEF ｜ 袖伤害|{param1:P}攻击力+{param2:P}防御力
- "Well played. I'm feeling pretty pumped!" ｜ 「打得好，我兴奋起来了！」
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Indwell a Tepetlisaurus, then talk to the little saurian ｜ 魂附嵴锋龙与小龙交流
- How could he ever even dream of acting against the Shogun? ｜ 试问家主又怎么可能做出于将军不利之事？
- I'm sure I've forgotten something... Not to worry, I'll simply send someone to fetch it. As soon as I remember what it was. ｜ 好像忘带什么东西了…算了，等想起来的时候再差人送来好了。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:P}+{param7:P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:P}+{param7:P}
- Field Entering/Exiting DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 出入领域伤害|{param2:P}
- Oh, by the way Chongyun, we wanted to ask you about something... ｜ 对了，重云，我们有事想问你…
- There's nothing left in there but ashes. No human could ever survive that kind of inferno. ｜ 但里面除了灰什么都没有，那么大的火，人早就烤化了。
- Where are the rest? Where are they hiding? ｜ 哪去了，它们藏到哪去了？
- To be blunt, I obviously don't want any soldiers under my command to leave. ｜ 平心而论，我当然不想让麾下的士兵离开。
- Lynette and Freminet are recuperating at the Hotel Bouffes d'ete. Go see them for a bit. ｜ 琳妮特与菲米尼在布法蒂公馆养伤，过去探望一下他们吧。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 consecutive shots with a bow.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nPerforms a more precise <color=#FFD780FF>Aimed Shot</color> with increased DMG.\nWhile aiming, the power of Dendro will accumulate on the arrowhead before the arrow is fired. Has different effects based on how long the energy has been charged:\n·Charge Level 1: Fires off an arrow carrying the power of flora that deals <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color>.\n·Charge Level 2: Fires off a Wreath Arrow that deals <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color>. Upon hit, the Wreath Arrow will create 4 Clusterbloom Arrows that will track nearby opponents automatically and deal <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nFires off a shower of arrows in mid-air before falling and striking the ground, dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多四段的连续弓箭射击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n进行伤害更高、更为精准的<color=#FFD780FF>瞄准射击</color>。\n瞄准时，草木的力量会在箭矢上持续积聚，并随攻击发射出去。根据蓄力时间长短，能造成不同的效果：\n·一段蓄力：射出附有草元素的箭矢，造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>；\n·二段蓄力：发射花筥箭，造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>。命中后，将产生4枚会自行追踪附近敌人的藏蕴花矢，能够造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中射出箭雨，并迅速下坠冲击地面，在落地时造成范围伤害。
- Zhiqiong ｜ 志琼
- Remelting Tablet ｜ 重熔片剂
- Huh? Where's Hora? Don't tell me he's run off again...! ｜ 咦？霍莱去哪了？不，不会是又跑了吧！
- Barbara ｜ 芭芭拉
- You're more like a detective. ｜ 像侦探一样。
- Stage IV: Peak Study ｜ 第四阶层·峰值研究
- I don't quite get it... ｜ 我不是很懂…
- Paimon makes an astute observation. Much as every tea must be appreciated on its own terms, is it not a waste of the chef's goodwill to sample a dish without hearing its tale? ｜ 确实，就像不同的茶有不同的品法，不听介绍就品尝，岂不是浪费了厨师的一片心意？
- Manage Voice-Over Files ｜ 语音包管理
- Tiara of Flame ｜ 祭火礼冠
- She left after receiving a message in the middle of night... Looking back on it, perhaps it's related to your own investigation. ｜ 她在后半夜收到了什么消息，匆匆离开后就没再回来…现在想来，或许也跟你们正在调查的事有关吧。
- Voice of the Water ｜ 水的声音
- What did I miss... ｜ 哪里看漏了…
- Character Ascension Material ｜ 角色突破素材
- Mposo ｜ 恩波索
- How would I know? Not like I'm stupid enough to do that. ｜ 我怎么知道，我可不会去尝试这种事情。
- Food ｜ 食物
- A wrap filled with roasted meat. Meat shaved off the vertical skewer is wrapped in a flatbread together with vegetables and sauces. Plate it up, and a simple yet delicious Sumeru street food is ready. ｜ 以烤肉为馅的卷饼。从直立烤肉架上切下兽肉，和蔬菜、酱汁一并夹入薄饼中。一道地道又可口的须弥街头美食就这样简简单单地完成了。
- Alright, if you've got questions about processes or documents, I don't want to hear them. Can't fix 'em, anyway. Go look for Monglane instead. She's the one in charge of that. ｜ 好啦，什么程序文件之类的问题别跟我说，我解决不了。去找莫莱妮吧，她才是负责这些的人。
- As for the "ideal entry point..." Well, there can only be one, yes? Come, I'll mark it out on your map. ｜ 还有「最佳入侵地点」…当然也只有一个啦。唔，我来标注在你的地图上。
- Specialized refinement material for "Toukabou Shigure."\nA powdery substance meant to bind bamboo to an umbrella.\nEven as the seasons change and the past dissolves, memory and thoughts will always remain, slumbering beneath an umbrella to rest in the shroud of a dream. ｜ 「东花坊时雨」专用的精炼道具。\n用以粘接竹簳与伞面的粉剂。\n纵然时节流转、昔日之雨散落成烟，总会有回忆重接思念，宛若置伞、伴梦同眠。
- Ugh. Anyway, that vase is still lying there broken on the ground. Should Paimon go get someone to clean it up? ｜ 倒是那个瓶子，还碎在地上呢。我去找人来收拾一下吧？
- As a result, the Chasm was rendered into its current state. The people of Shenglu Hall constantly ask when it will be reopened, but the Qixing will not allow it, leaving them to fret... ｜ 结果呢，层岩巨渊就成了现在这样了。盛露厅的大人们天天打听什么时候重开，可七星就是不许，也只能干着急…
- You decide to announce the Zhiyi has passed the selection to make him lower his guard. Now all that's left to do is wait... ｜ 决定宣布知易考察通过，以此来让他麻痹大意。在那之前只能等待…
- Crocodiles are easy to care for, and they can be harvested for lots of skins and meat. Unfortunately, f—fields are a d—different story... ｜ 鳄鱼好养，而且能收获很多皮和肉。但耕、耕地可就太、太难了…
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param9:P}/{param10:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param9:P}/{param10:P}
- I remember one of them, from before the time of the Knights of Favonius, talked about a team sent by the aristocrats to investigate the mountain. ｜ 一本年鉴上有记载，在骑士团的时代前，蒙德曾经有一支贵族向雪山派出了考察队。
- Consumable ｜ 消耗品
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Do you think Yoimiya's dad's poor hearing is related to fireworks?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>He's been making and testing fireworks for many years now, and being exposed to the sound of gunpowder explosions on a daily basis... Paimon can see how that might've worn down his ears...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yikes! Since Yoimiya is inheriting her family business, does that mean she'll have trouble hearing other people in the future, just like her dad?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon won't let that happen! Let's think of some way to help her!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Do you have any suggestions, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Uh... Um...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon could follow Yoimiya around and cover her ears whenever needed...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Then you'd need to leave me.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>...Without Paimon, you'd lose your guide. Paimon wouldn't leave you like that!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But... What should we do for Yoimiya...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Actually, she can simply wear earplugs while working with fireworks.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Oh yeah! Paimon didn't think of that solution! You're so smart!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Heh... That was the first thing that came to my mind, but I wanted to give you an opportunity for a mental workout.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Eh? So you knew this whole time, but didn't tell Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>How could you! You bully! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你说，宵宫老爹的听力不好，是不是跟烟花有关啊？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>由于常年制作、试放烟花，每日被火药炸响的声音包围，导致听力变弱…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇！那宵宫继承家业，最后会不会也变得像她老爹那样，听不清人讲话…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不可以不可以，为了避免这种事情发生，要赶快想想办法！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙有什么建议吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔…嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果我飞在宵宫后边，一直用手捂住她的耳朵…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那派蒙就不能跟着我了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>…没有我的话，你就没有向导了。要我离开你是不可能的！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可是宵宫…该怎么办才好…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>其实，在制作烟火的时候带上耳塞就可以了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对哦，还有这种方法！你真聪明！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嘿…看派蒙这么困扰，我反而有些开心呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？其实你早就想好了办法，却不告诉派蒙吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>怎么这样，你这坏家伙！
- Chevreuse ｜ 夏沃蕾
- (Take a sneak peek.) ｜ （偷看一眼。）
- ...Hmm? Well, would you look at the time... ｜ …嗯？不知不觉都聊这么久了。
- That's right. Master asked me to come a few days ahead of time so that things aren't rushed at the last minute. On that note, please do keep everything strictly confidential for now. No public announcements. ｜ 唉，确实，是大少爷提前差我来的，以防临时手忙脚乱。所以，请仪倌先不要在外提及此事。
- "Fellow conspirator," you say? That's quite the sense of humor you've got there. I suppose you, too, must be an outlander living in Ritou. ｜ 「同谋」？哈哈哈，你可真幽默。看起来，你们也是生活在离岛的外国人吧。
- To put it simply, Makoto wasn't concerned about outcomes. ｜ 简单来说，真不在乎结果。
- Notice to Travelers ｜ 旅客须知
- I don't know why you're stealing mechanical parts, but they don't belong to you. ｜ 虽然不知道你为什么要抢夺机械零件，但它们不属于你。
- Increases all party members' ATK by <color=#3399CCFF>66–95</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高<color=#3399CCFF>66-95</color>点，持续300秒。
- Fortune Stick: Everblazing ｜ 灵签·瞳瞳如火
- It's settled then. When it's just about time, I'll bring you to them. ｜ 嗯，就是这么回事。等时候差不多了，我就会带着你去找他们。
- Discharge DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 放电伤害|{param1:F1P}
- (Could there have been a third person involved? Is that really a possibility?) ｜ （果然还是有第三个人吗？真的是这样吗…）
- To be perfectly honest, I don't understand your country's complicated court system, or the reason why I'm being charged with something I've never even heard of. ｜ 说实话，我搞不懂你们复杂的审判程序，又为什么非要给我安一个莫名其妙的罪名。
- Do you have any concerns, Mualani? ｜ 有什么不方便的地方吗？
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>Character cannot use Skills.</color> (Lasts until the end of this Round) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>角色无法使用技能。</color>（持续到回合结束）
- Lemme see... Which bottle should I open first? ｜ 让我看看…先开哪瓶酒呢…
- One day, when I was in the forest, I met a handsome, dashing adeptus — it was as if he had popped right out of a story book! ｜ 有一天我在林子里，遇上了一个帅气的仙人哥哥，长得和故事书里面一模一样！
- Serious Showdown ｜ 认真胜负
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- Touch ｜ 触碰
- I remember that, in your notes, many contraptions have managed to fulfill complex functions despite using simple parts. Maybe we can do something similar with these early learning toys... ｜ 我记得珐露珊前辈留下的笔记里，有很多机关用简单的构件，却实现了复杂的功能吧？能不能应用到早教玩具上呢…
- Should've expected that from you! So next time, we'll also take the road-less-traveled! ｜ 不愧是你，那我们也多走弯路吧！
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Complete "Checks & Cats" and unlock all endings. ｜ 完成「猫与随机数」，解锁全部结局。
- My kids call me a warrior, but look at me. I'm an old bird who doesn't fly anymore — I've no strength for it. ｜ 我的孩子们称呼我为勇士，但看看我吧，我现在已经不飞了，老鸟是没有力气再飞的。
- Chest locked ｜ 宝箱被锁住
- And you, you'd more or less qualify to be a magister's apprentice. ｜ 而你，却是资质几乎可以胜任魔导师的好孩子喔。
- You're mad... How dare you slander me, your Matriarch! You've forgotten your mother's name! Silence — I bid you be silent now, before it is too late! ｜ 你发疯了…竟敢污蔑部族的主母！你忘记了母亲的名字！闭嘴吧，现在闭嘴还来得及！
- Her Excellency is looking much better today, I can breathe a sigh of relief... Nothing is more important than everyone being safe and sound. ｜ 珊瑚宫大人的气色比之前好了不少，我也可以放心了…大家平平安安的，比什么都重要。
- In the old language of Inazuma, "Nazuchi" means "to be caressed by the loving hands of the divine."\nHowever, this shallow shoal has seen far too many battles and slaughters in its time. ｜ 稻妻古语称，「名椎」二字乃是「被神灵之手慈祥抚摸」的含义。\n但自千余年来，这片浅滩却见证了太多大战厮杀。
- The Abyss Mage is looking for a chance to escape... ｜ 深渊法师在找寻着逃跑的机会…
- When a party member triggers a Dendro-related Elemental Reaction, the Elemental Mastery of all party members is increased by 150 for 8s. This effect can be triggered at most once every 1s. ｜ 队伍中触发草元素相关反应时，队伍中所有角色元素精通提升150点。该效果持续8秒，每1秒至多触发一次。
- Talk to Nasejuna ｜ 与那先朱那对话
- You're Aramuhukunda... ｜ 是兰穆护昆达…
- A flower pressed inside the Adventure Handbook. It seems to have preserved someone's lost memories... ｜ 夹在冒险手册里的花朵，其中似乎凝结着某人遗失的记忆…
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Go to where Khayyam is ｜ 前往海亚姆所在地点
- After all, it's not Paimonly to worry too much. ｜ 毕竟派蒙是没什么烦恼的。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param7:F1P}+{param8:P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param7:F1P}+{param8:P}
- Electro Crystal: <color=#e09800>Aragonite Augmented</color> ｜ 雷晶·<color=#e09800>极限霰石</color>
- Just going by shape, it looks more like a plate for food. ｜ 长成这个样子，看起来就像是个用来吃饭的碟子一样呢。
- So who was the one who lost the gun in the first place? ｜ 丢枪的那人是谁呀？
- I cannot believe this! Those monsters must've run off with it. Traveler... how's about you see if you can't find me a nice bit of <color=#00E1FFFF>rope</color> around here...? ｜ 可恶，肯定是被那群怪物丢到不知道哪去了。旅行者，帮我去周围找找<color=#00E1FFFF>绳索</color>吧。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Ah... a keen eye! ｜ 哦~哦！眼光真不错！
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Wait till the next morning (8:00 – 10:00) ｜ 等待到第二天上午（8:00-10:00）
- Even when the preview event and the business negotiations are over, Souka and I will stay in Fontaine for a while, traveling with the Fungi. ｜ 就算预热活动和商业洽谈结束了，我和左右加也会在枫丹停留很久，带着蕈兽伙伴们好好旅游。
- But now that that Choiseul has moved his office into the Institute... He might try to stop me from returning... ｜ 不过，现在那个舒瓦瑟尔居然跑到科学院里办公了…他说不定会阻止我回科学院…
- ... ｜ ……
- Master Trainer, Masters of the Night-Wind ｜ 「烟谜主」训练大师
- Well? Did you get a good look at all the games? ｜ 如何？都了解得差不多了吗？
- A key related to a certain mysterious plant. It seems to be able to open some door somewhere... ｜ 与某种奇妙植物有着关联的钥匙，似乎可以用来打开某道门扉…
- Medium ｜ 中
- But that was what it had become after Remuria sank... no more than a dream. I would rather be called a traitor than let Boethius trample on our ideals. ｜ 但在雷穆利亚沉没后，那也已经成为幻梦了…但即便被称为背叛者，我也不能眼睁睁看着他践踏我们过去的理想。
- But... I've already been cursed, and if I go back alone, I'll certainly be seen by the ghosts... then I'll be turned to stone and trapped forever... ｜ 可是，我已经中了魔咒，独自回到古堡的话，肯定会被其他幽魂盯上，慢慢石化，最后永远被固定住…
- DMG Bonus on Hit Taken|{param4:P} ｜ 受击时伤害提升|{param4:P}
- I still can't accept it... ｜ 还是没办法接受…
- You're not going to lay down? ｜ 真的不趴下吗？
- Floral Arrangement: "Art of Contrast" ｜ 瓶栽插花-「反衬艺术」
- With an alchemist of his level, you wouldn't sense a thing. ｜ 像他这种级别的炼金术士，想要动点手脚，你当然察觉不到。
- Mailing System ｜ 邮送系统
- Family Letter ｜ 一封家信
- We do... but only for testing. Matriarch Babel invited some outsiders to c—c—come and provide us with Anahitian Blessing, and she got all these old books from the city... ｜ 只是…试验田。芭别尔主母她请了些外人来、来、来为我们输送「丰沃之惠」，又从城里搞来许多旧书…
- Focusing Crystals ｜ 结晶赋能
- Time to check our locator... Whoa! It looks like Kaveh and Faruzan are heading toward the same place! ｜ 让我看看提示器…咦！卡维和珐露珊好像正在朝同一个地方走！
- You have very high expectations for yourself, but you've faced a lot of rejection in the past and haven't achieved much in your life. ｜ 对自身期许很高，但过往曾频繁受到否定，也并没有很出色的成就。
- Hello there! Are you the guy looking for a new actress? ｜ 你好，请问你是在找音乐剧的演员吗？
- 5-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Yay, let's get started! ｜ 嘿嘿，快点开始吧！
- What's wrong with these people!? They won't even talk to us! ｜ 一个两个都没空理我们，真是的！
- Of course. I love obedient puppies, especially the ones that let you rub their belly and look at you with their little sparkling eyes. ｜ 听话的小狗我当然喜欢，特别是那种会露出肚皮给你抚摸，用湿漉漉的眼睛看着你的小狗。
- Not bad. Thanks for your concern! ｜ 还不错，谢谢关心！
- I'll allow it. We do have a ready-made dueling ring at our disposal, after all. ｜ 我准许了，正好这里也有现成的决斗场地。
- The Ministry of Civil Affairs organizes most of the training courses. Anyone with a passable knowledge of sailing could coast by them. These subjects aren't too difficult. ｜ 总务司会安排绝大多数的训练科目，足以应对一般情况下的航行，这些科目也不算太难。
- My client. VIP, very important person. Very important to me, anyway, because he pays my wages. ｜ 就是我拿了钱，要护着的「肉」。
- Now that sure got Shenglu Hall riled up... though that's a story for another day. ｜ 结果呢，盛露厅可不高兴了…哈哈，那就是另一个话题咯。
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- No, not at all... Look, I am the Hydro Archon of Fontaine, Focalors. The God of Justice, who is loved and adored by many... ｜ 没有没有…你看，我可是枫丹的水神大人，魔神名芙卡洛斯，受众人喜爱与敬仰的正义之神…
- Spirit Orb DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 宿灵球伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Viridescent Arrow Feather ｜ 猎人青翠的箭羽
- Ahem... Now, listen carefully. This is the outline of cat language that I've been working on for a long time. ｜ 咳，咳咳…那就请你们听好了，这是我总结了很长时间才总结出的「猫的定型语」。
- Sounds like a schoolyard squabble... ｜ 好低级的战斗啊…
- The atmosphere would be electric — I can feel it in my bones already! ｜ 哇…光是想想这种热闹非凡的场景…就已经开始兴奋了！
- If it's alright with you, just bring a few copies of the game or some flyers with you. That way, you can recommend Bing-Bang Finchball to people you meet during your travels... ｜ 要是方便的话，请带上几份游戏的本体，或者是宣传画，在之后的旅行过程中向其他人推荐「哐哐当当雀雀球」…
- Convoluted Corridor at the Top of the Tall Tower ｜ 高塔尽头的回旋长廊
- Fish ｜ 鱼
- This character will immediately use the Skill <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S33036]</color> the second time they act after the preparation starts. ｜ 本角色将在开始准备后的第二次行动时，直接使用技能：<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S33036]</color>。
- Maybe those northerners from the snowy lands gave it to him in a trade... Who knows what he would've wanted this for, though... ｜ 可能是那些远北的雪国人跟他交易的…谁知道他要这东西有什么用…
- What? Not only do I have to meet her... but I have to shake her hand and take a photo with her, too!? ｜ 什么？不仅要见到那个女人，还…还要握手留影？
- General of Watatsumi ｜ 海祇大将
- Funny, the word "snatcher" didn't come to mind when I saw him... He struck me as more of a... potential client. ｜ 那人的脸上倒是没写「怪盗」两字，气质嘛…倒挺像潜在客户。
- Bunny ｜ 兔叽
- ... *yawn* ｜ 呼啊…
- Call me the Great Editor, good sir! ｜ 请称呼我为大剪辑师。
- A Saurian with thick, strong flippers and a long tail that can swim in water and liquid phlogiston.\nIn the relaxed, laid-back atmosphere that prevails along the shore, young Koholasaurs may seem kinda dumb, but they are actually intelligent, gentle, and full of curiosity for the world around them, and their presence never fails to bring joy and laughter to the People of the Springs. The elegant curves of their bodies make them worthy subjects for closer observation... ｜ 具有粗壮的鳍肢与长尾，能够在水域与液态燃素中游动的龙。\n在悠然的假日时光中，看似呆头呆脑，实则聪颖温柔，对许多事物无比好奇的幼鳍游龙，总能给温泉中的「流泉之众」部族成员带来诸多惊喜。它们的身体有着优雅的弧线，值得仔细观察…
- W—We are running out of time! Please watch Nika for a while! ｜ 我，我们在赶时间！尼卡就拜托你啦！
- I'm not ready yet. ｜ 没准备好。
- Unfriend ｜ 移除好友
- Wait for midnight (00:00 – 05:00) ｜ 等待至半夜（0~5时）
- #{PLATFORM#[Ps4]button: Hold to open the Shortcut Wheel, then select the Inventory#[Ps5]button: Hold to open the Shortcut Wheel, then select the Inventory#[Default]button: Hold to open the Shortcut Wheel, then select the Inventory} ｜ #{PLATFORM#[Ps4]键（长按）：开启快捷轮盘，以打开背包#[Ps5]键（长按）：开启快捷轮盘，以打开背包#[Default]键（长按）：开启快捷轮盘，以打开背包}
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- I would love a slice of <color=#00E1FFFF>Invigorating Pizza</color> right about now... ｜ 怀念<color=#00E1FFFF>提神醒脑披萨</color>的味道…
- I can go over the tasks assigned to the Spina di Rosula, since they were rather straightforward and easy. ｜ 我们刺玫会的任务最简单，要准备的也不多，就让我先说吧。
- As Though Kissed by Dew ｜ 如逢露水
- Resolve Bonus|{param2:F2P} Initial/{param3:F2P} ATK DMG Per Stack ｜ 愿力加成|每层{param2:F2P}/{param3:F2P}攻击力
- That sounds like illegal overtime... ｜ 这是非法加班吗…
- Stadium Key Site ｜ 竞技场前的要地
- Ah, you know me so well, Nadia. Now, hurry up and go. ｜ 还是纳蒂亚懂我。所以你们快走吧。
- Let me treat you to a feast as thanks! ｜ 作为答谢，我请前辈去吃顿大餐吧！
- Impossible! I am no Pari of rank ignorance. The duties I have... have not been neglected. Indeed, I have also performed the necessary feats to be worthy of my accolades. ｜ 怎么会！我可不是那么天真的花灵。勇者的职责…并没有怠慢，那些值得称颂的伟业我也是有…
- I'm always your "matey..." ｜ 不想玩了…
- Substitute teacher... Ah yes, now I remember. It was during winter, wasn't it? ｜ 代课…啊，想起来了，是有一年的冬天对吧？
- On hit, Normal or Charged Attacks increase ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> for 6s. Max 4 stacks. Can occur once every 0.5s. ｜ 普通攻击和重击命中时，攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>，持续6秒，最多叠加4层。该效果每0.5秒只能触发一次。
- For example, slowing down the Choo-Choo Cart right in front of a scene element, and then shooting off right when it's about to move past it. ｜ 比如让「呼呼飞车」在物件正面稍微减速，快要擦肩而过的时候，就加速通过。
- What rules? ｜ 什么条条例例？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Millelith ｜ 千岩军
- Oh no... were we too late? ｜ 怎、怎么会…我们来晚了？
- About Elemental energy and the Abyss... ｜ 关于元素力和深渊…
- Auto-Lock 4-Star Weapons ｜ 自动保护锁定四星武器
- The locator's going off again... ｜ 提示器又响了…
- Hold CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 长按冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Arataki "The Strongest" Itto ｜ 荒泷本大爷最强一斗
- And since you'll see him before I do, could you also give him this letter for me? He promised to keep me in the loop about a second exploration team headed for the mountains, but I still haven't heard back about it. ｜ 然后，顺便帮我把这封信带给他，他答应我帮忙留意第二支要进山的探险队，结果到现在也没有消息。
- This world sure is cruel, forcing generation upon generation of human heroes to become cannon fodder in the fight against darkness. But, under Mavuika's leadership, they achieved a truly god-like feat... Hehe, starting with "her," I suppose the Natlanese have always been like that. Ah, right! I heard Mavuika likes to drink! Are you thinking what I'm thinking...? ｜ 需要一个又一个的人类成为柴薪去对抗漆黑的威胁，这个世界还真是不讲情面。但在玛薇卡的带领下，他们创造了堪比魔神的成就…嘿嘿，从「她」开始，纳塔人似乎一直就是这样呢。对了，我听说玛薇卡很喜欢喝酒对吧？要不然…
- Your Excellency, I'll take my leave. ｜ 那珊瑚宫大人，我就先行告退了。
- Let Sorush awaken the residual Pari in the Fravashi Tree ｜ 让斯露莎唤醒「灵谷木」中的残灵
- 6-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 六段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Scenes from Life in Meropide: An Actor's Training ｜ 梅洛彼得生活场景·演员的修养
- Keep tapping the button to stop the Abyssal energy from corroding Vichama ｜ 连续点击按钮，阻止深渊力量侵蚀维查玛
- This time, I found a particularly hard-to-find spot and hid the Temari. Want to take on the challenge? ｜ 这次我找了个特别难找的位置，把手鞠藏好了。要来挑战吗？
- Ha. Well, everyone has their way of procrastinating, I guess. ｜ 哈，只是不想发胖而已吧。
- I... I didn't forget, Firecracker. I'm just... not sure if what I remember is correct. ｜ 我…我没忘，爆竹。我只是…不确定自己记得对不对。
- I saw them. ｜ 我看见了。
- In past ceremonies, we've only purged around half of the Abyssal power. This was to strike a balance — to keep him alive, but also keep him asleep. ｜ 往年的仪式只会驱散近半的深渊力量，这是一个使它既不会死亡又不会醒来的平衡线。
- Dockyard Laborer ｜ 船厂工人
- After having just arrived in Natlan, you are teleported to a strange space... ｜ 初至纳塔，便被传送到了一个奇怪的空间…
- Hello, traveler. I'm surprised you still remember my name. ｜ 你好，旅行者，没想到你还记得我的名字。
- So that's why you wanted me to come along? To help you slack off? ｜ 你不会是想让我帮你偷懒吧？
- Liyue Exploration Progress: <color=#FFCC33>40%</color> ｜ 璃月探索度达到<color=#FFCC33>40%</color>
- I never thought this troublesome seal would be dispelled so quickly! ｜ 没想到这么快，这个烦人的封印就被解开了！
- Wh—What are you doing here? ｜ 干、干什么？
- Come back after a while. It's good to have someone to chat with. ｜ 过一段时间再回来吧，能有个人聊聊天…也不错。
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- Leisurely Gathering ｜ 闲时小聚
- Did you really think it would be wise to pick a fight with the Kaedehara Clan? ｜ …就凭你们，也想来找枫原家的麻烦？
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- An energy core that allows the Specters to float. It contains a small amount of elemental energy.\nMost of the rest has already dispersed. ｜ 能让飘浮灵浮游的能量核，其中含有些微的元素。\n大部分的能量似乎已经逸散了。
- About Jueyun Karst ｜ 关于绝云间…
- ... ｜ ……
- Endora's Education ｜ 嫣朵拉的学习
- I mean, we couldn't jump straight down. Maybe we were just distracted by the swaying of the crane. ｜ 毕竟我们又不能直接跳下来…摇摇晃晃的起重机太让人分心了。
- Opponents Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败怪物：#1#/%1%
- She made it using her very own mechanical arts, you know! ｜ 你知道吗？月桂是通过机关术运作的！
- I'm guessing you're here for the same reason, Emilie? We were just about to get into it, so you three might as well join in. ｜ 我们刚才正要说这事呢。艾梅莉埃，你们应该也是来打听奥古斯都花的吧，那我就正好一起说了。
- A cup commonly used for fortune-telling. It can also hold water, of course. ｜ 民间流传的算命仪式使用的杯子，也可以装水。
- Explosion DMG|{param6:P} ｜ 爆炸伤害|{param6:P}
- ... ｜ ……
- Well, it's really far away, for one thing. And for another... I was just getting the hang of this carving. If I'd left at this point, the journey might have deprived me of that "feeling," see. ｜ 一方面是太远了，另一方面…我雕刻的手感正好，要是去鸣神岛的话…这一来一回的，手感说不定就没了。
- Titu ｜ 蒂图
- And no matter what I said, you never thought it was nonsense or interrupted me. ｜ 不管我说些什么，你们都不会觉得我是在说「闲话」，打断我说话。
- It's not a question of numbers. The guards simply have no idea how to deal with them. ｜ 与其说是兵力不足，不如说是卫兵们都不知道要如何与魔物对抗吧…
- Yes, they will suffice. The other flowers in Mondstadt do not scatter in to the distance very well, in any case. ｜ 有蒲公英就足够了。而且…蒙德的其他花卉，也很难「播撒」到远方呢。
- Hey, hey, you're petting me way too much! ｜ 喂，摸得太过头了吧！
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Listen, Callas is long dead. No matter what happened in the past, I want to be able to start things anew. ｜ 听着，卡雷斯已经死了，无论刺玫会曾经做过什么，我都希望能有一个新的开始。
- Nor do I think it is any great shame. There is no lack of fine actors or inspirational stories, either on or off the stage. ｜ 这没什么遗憾的，无论台上台下，永远不会缺少闪光的演员与故事。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Meet up with Arama ｜ 与兰罗摩会合
- Trillion Trinket Trawl ｜ 百万奇饰大搜罗
- Zosimos is responsible for managing everything that happens on the stage. Similar to how Idyia is responsible for managing the whole realm... ｜ 如果说伊迪娅小姐管理着整个蜃境，佐西摩斯先生管理的就是舞台上的一切。

---
### Part 058

- Mary-Ann. Or, as you might call her, Mary-Ann Guillotin. ｜ 玛丽安。或者，叫她玛丽安·吉约丹。
- Ragged Notebook ｜ 残破的笔记
- Drifter's Destiny ｜ 荒波椛叶
- It looks like something was here, but someone else took it. ｜ 并不是，看起来是已经被人拿走了。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Huh? Why? It's not like we're trying to buy yours off you... ｜ 欸？为什么啊？又不是要收走你的人偶…
- Leave. You shouldn't be here. ｜ 赶紧离开，这里可不是你该来的地方。
- Once that happens, he'll have to follow my orders — and by that, I mean he'll help us make the Almighty Arataki Extraordinary and Exhilarating Extreme Beetle Brawl the biggest, baddest event ever! ｜ 到时候，「花角玉将」也会听候本大爷的调遣，一起把「荒泷极意堂堂斗虫大试合」办得红红火火！
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}
- This box is... a bit... ｜ 只用这个盒子…
- Talk to Honglang ｜ 与宏朗对话
- Complete "Until Vana Is Healed." ｜ 完成「直到『桓那』痊愈」。
- Th—Then... Alright. I'll consider what my brother has to say... but I just... I just don't want to be separated from him. ｜ #那…那我听{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和派蒙姐姐的。我会考虑哥哥说的事情的…我只是…我只是不想跟哥哥分开。
- Uh, n—no need! Y'know, what with that "teeth and tongue" stuff and all... ｜ 呃…不、不要了吧，刚才又是牙齿又是舌头的…
- Recipient's Title 3 ｜ 收柬者称谓·之三
- Domain Reliquary: Tier I ｜ 深秘圣物匣·一等
- Something mysterious about this photographic apparatus... ｜ 奇怪的「留影机」…
- What is it, Rana? ｜ 拉娜，怎么啦？
- A shareholder of Aisa Bathhouse, a baku, and a clinical psychologist. Dedicated to the dispersal of nightmares, and to bringing people peace of mind. ｜ 「秋沙钱汤」的股东，梦貘一族的心理诊疗师，致力于驱散噩梦，为人们带来安宁的心境。
- ...What? ｜ …什么？你说什么？
- Energy Cost|{param10:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param10:I}
- Opening Treasure Chest: II ｜ 打开宝箱·其二
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- "...Boys and girls! This is your Vice Dire... Your Captain...!" ｜ 「…小子们、姑娘们！这里是你们的副院…你们的船长…！」
- Some time ago, when I was doing grocery shopping back in the city, I happened to have a conversation with a merchant from Fontaine. ｜ 前段时间，当我回城里采买物资的时候，偶然和一个枫丹来的客商聊了两句。
- The score has been modified ｜ 曲谱有修改
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Level 4 Shattering Pressure DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 四阶高压粉碎伤害|{param11:F1P}
- Please, everyone in Natlan has witnessed your strength. I doubt there's a challenge out there that could trip you up. ｜ 你的实力整个纳塔都有目共睹，无论是什么样的关卡，应该都难不住你。
- It doesn't matter now anyway. Once I get my hands on that thing and send it out, all of this will be settled. ｜ 但现在无所谓了。只要我把那个东西拿到手，再送出去，这一切都可以一笔勾销…
- Collection Room ｜ 收藏室
- "Wherever she calls home... is surely a place of freedom and warmth." ｜ 「想了解她的故乡，养育她的土地一定很自由，很温暖。」
- HP +20% ｜ 生命值提升20%。
- We had previously planned to install the Wenutslayer Cannon in nearby areas where Wenut have been spotted. ｜ 我们之前计划在附近有沙虫出没过的地方，安设「对沙虫用杀虫炮」。
- Complete the third poem in "The Moon and Stars Inscribe" during the "Hues of the Violet Garden" event ｜ 在「堇庭华彩」活动中，完成「月章星句」第三首诗歌的创作
- Go to Mondstadt ｜ 前往蒙德城
- Spot {param2} Weaknesses in one go in the current stage ｜ 本关单次最多捕获破绽数达到{param2}
- Complete the challenge without being hit by opponents more than 30 times ｜ 完成挑战时，被敌人命中不超过30次
- Ooh, what have we here? It looks like dust, but... with elemental traces on. ｜ 咦，这是什么？看着像是「灰尘」…但是却有元素的痕迹。
- The card bears the General Mahamatra's ardent fondness, which reminds one of the scorching sun hanging above the desert. ｜ 卡牌中蕴藏的，是大风纪官如沙漠烈日般炙热的喜爱之情。
- ...Only a figure of speech? Really? No wonder... I could never figure out how they could afford so much wine on an adventurer's income... ｜ 只是传说？嗯…原来是这样吗…怪不得，我一直想不通他们买酒的钱是哪里来的…

- \nThree seals have been cast upon Marana (four if the barrier of vines in the Fane of Ashvattha is also considered one).\n3 Inscriptions of Remembrance are needed to remove the first seal. They are listed below:\n1. May the new dreams never experience Marana's corruption, and may the old stories be forgotten alongside it. ｜ \n无留陀封锁在三重封印之后（算上觉王之殿的藤蔓屏障，应该是四重封印）。\n要解开第一重封印需要收集三段记忆的铭文。这里记录一下。\n一、但愿新的梦想永远不被无留陀侵蚀。但愿旧的故事与无留陀一同被忘却。

- A bit of the Great Wolf King of the North's power drawn from its soul.\nThis land was once a realm of freezing-cold blizzards and ice storms filled with razor-sharp ice shards, all at the command of Boreas. In his final moments, he finally realized the chilling north wind could only extinguish life, not nurture it. Therefore, Boreas let his powers freely flow into the land to protect it and its inhabitants. ｜ 从北风的伟大王狼之灵处，取来的些许力量。\n这片大地上曾经北风呼啸，呼气凝霜。但它在最终终于明白，酷烈的北风只能熄灭生命，不能滋养生命。在生命的末尾，它让自己的力量流入这片大地，永远守护大地与大地的住民。

- The Historia Naturalis Liyue has an entry about a waterborne plant called the Horsetail. It claims that "The Horsetail is a medicinal herb that stands alone on the banks of Dihua Marsh. Its color is that of the clouds at sunset." Apparently, if you grind it into a powder and mix it into your ink, it makes your writing water-resistant. But it's a shame, I've been to Dihua Marsh at least a hundred times, and each time I end up with baskets and baskets of the common purple variety, but not a single one of the kind that the book describes. ｜ 《璃月风物志》写到某种水生马尾，称它「独坐荻花洲岸，色如霞，可入药。」将其研磨成粉掺入墨汁之中，能使字迹不怕水浸。嗯…可惜啊，我去过荻花洲不下百次，常见的紫色马尾一摘就是几箩筐，却始终找不到书里记载的那种。
