- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- After "Father" replaced the previous director, Freminet's thoughts began to turn to finding his mother once again.\nAt first, Freminet assumed that she would rile up a still greater storm of brutality, for he knew that her methods were brutal, and he expected new orders to be given just as pitilessly as they had been in the past. But he soon discovered that "Father's" way of doing things was utterly different.\nWith "Father," the home was a place of refuge for all the family's children, and as such required a collective effort to maintain. It was up to each of them to complete their tasks in the way that best suited them. Even if they failed, they wouldn't be subjected to the searingly painful punishments they had been previously.\nThis taste of freedom finally gave Freminet the chance to breathe deeply, and he started searching for his mother's whereabouts in his free time.\nBut a long time passed and he still wasn't any closer to finding her.\nPerhaps I really was abandoned, Freminet thought, trying to convince himself to accept reality as he strained to summon the already vague memory of his mother's face.\nBut just as he was thinking of giving up, "Father" threw him a pendant.\n"I found this at the base of operations of those scum. Keep it." said "Father."\nFreminet looked back at her, perplexed, which in turn seemed to confuse her.\n"What it is? I'm talking about those usurious scoundrels. It belonged to your mother..." She frowned, seeming to suddenly realize something. "What were you told about her?"\nFreminet told her what the previous director had said to him, about how he had been abandoned. As he did so, she said nothing, but her eyes began to burn with wrath.\nAfter Freminet was finished, "Father" fell silent for a rare moment. "Do you want to know what really happened?" She asked, fixing him with a piercing stare.\nFreminet nodded almost unconsciously. But once he had heard what she had to say, he wasn't sure which story he'd rather believe.\n"Father" told Freminet that his mother hadn't abandoned him, but on the contrary, had acted to protect him...\nThat year, the debt that his family owed finally reached the point where they would no longer be able to repay it. Those greedy moneylenders had not only forced Freminet's mother to hand over the house that they lived in, but had also demanded that she hand over Freminet as well. But she was his mother — how could she let this happen? In the end, she had no choice but to entrust Freminet to "that orphanage" — somewhere they could never get at him — and then face them alone.\n"This was all I found. As for your mother..." As she looked at the young boy in front of her, still gripping the pendant tightly in his hands, "Father" trailed off and left the ensuing silence to speak for her.\nFreminet's head hung low, but knowing his personality, "Father" slipped out of the room without another word. The boy was left standing there, shaking as he gazed down at the pendant in his hands. It had long since rusted and could no longer produce sounds, and the clockwork components seemed to have been stained dark brown by dried blood. She must have been holding it at the very end, he thought. In his despair, Freminet continued to stare at the pendant, desperately looking for even a thread of his mother's warmth.\nThat evening, Freminet dived down to the bottom of the ocean and let it all out. He couldn't remember the last time he had cried like this. Other than the Romaritime Flowers that wept alongside him, not a soul heard the sound of his sobbing, for the ocean smothered it utterly.\nFrom that day on, his grip on his greatsword tightened. He made an oath to himself that he would never again let another member of his family meet with misfortune. ｜ 在前任院长被「父亲」取代之后，菲米尼重拾了寻找母亲的念头。\n起初，他以为「父亲」既然拥有雷霆般的手段，必然会就此掀起更为残酷的风暴，用同样无情的话语向他们下达新的命令。但他很快发现，「父亲」的行事作风与前任院长有着天渊之别。\n「家」是孩子们共同的港湾，需要齐心协力地维护；完成「任务」的方式可以自行选择，就算失败，也不会受到以前那般灼痛的责罚…\n自由的空气让菲米尼得以大口喘息，他利用空余的时间寻找起了母亲的下落。\n但过了很长一段时间，母亲依旧了无音讯。\n或许我真是被抛弃的吧。菲米尼回忆着记忆中已变得模糊的母亲的脸庞，说服自己接受现实。\n而就在他准备放弃的时候，「父亲」突然丢给了他一个挂坠。\n「在那伙渣滓的据点里找到的，你留着吧。」「父亲」说。\n菲米尼一脸迷茫地看着她，这反倒让对方疑惑起来。\n「怎么了？就是那伙放债的人渣，这是你母亲的…」她眉头一皱，似乎察觉到了什么：「你母亲的事，之前是怎么跟你说的？」\n菲米尼将前任院长口中自己被抛弃的故事说了出来。这期间，对方什么话都没有说，眼中却燃起了暗暗的怒火。\n「…想知道真相吗？」听完菲米尼的讲述，她罕见地沉默了片刻，这才用锐利的眼神盯着菲米尼问道。\n菲米尼几乎是下意识地点了头。但事后，他却不知道，自己究竟更愿意相信哪一个故事——\n「父亲」对他说，菲米尼的母亲并没有抛弃他。相反，是为了保护他…\n那年，菲米尼家里欠下的债务终于到了无法偿还的地步。那伙贪心的放债人不仅收缴了他和母亲的房子，还准备要菲米尼去抵债。然而，作为一个母亲，她怎么可能亲眼目睹这样的事情发生？最终，她只剩下了一个选择——将菲米尼托付给「那家孤儿院」，这个放债人无法触及的地方，然后自己去承受一切。\n「我只找到了这个，至于你的母亲…」望着眼前紧握挂坠的少年，「父亲」将没有说完的语句留给沉默代自己补全。\n菲米尼从刚才开始就再没有抬起过头，但「父亲」了解这个孩子的性格，于是默默离开了房间，留下菲米尼浑身颤抖地盯视着手中的挂坠。它早已锈迹斑斑，发不出任何声音，就连发条也被干涸的血渍染成了深褐色。她最后，一定也是握着它的吧。菲米尼绝望地在挂坠中寻找着母亲哪怕一丝的温度…\n那一晚，菲米尼在海底大哭了一场，他已经很久没有这样哭过了。偌大的哭声被海水掩埋，除了同样为他垂泪的海露花，没有被任何人听到。\n这之后，他将手中的巨剑握得更紧了。他在心中默默发誓，绝不会再让自己的「家人」，发生任何不幸。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技

I don't have any particular preferences when it comes to the food I eat on a daily basis. I have dedicated staff to arrange my daily meal plan, and whatever they serve, I eat. ｜ 新奇的事物能给枯燥的日常生活带来新鲜感。最近花见坂那边新出的什锦奶茶就很不错，你也该试试。不过…日常饭菜上我没有什么偏好。每日用餐有专门的下属制定计划。对方端来什么，我就吃什么。

Details on these buffs may be found on the "Star of Destiny" event page. ｜ 挑战过程中，不定期会出现<color=#FFE14BFF>丰饶星芒</color>与<color=#FFE14BFF>骁勇星芒</color>，为周围的角色提供增益效果。<color=#FFE14BFF>靠近拥有星芒的角色</color>，并利用这些效果推动进程，对挑战而言至关重要。对应的具体效果可以在「命定之星」活动界面中查看。

- "When water's natural purity is preserved, disease cannot fester. But when sullied at its source, it gives rise to all manner of plagues and pestilences. Therefore, let the one who pollutes a water source through negligence be shown leniency, but let any that would willfully pollute a water source be shown no mercy whatsoever." ｜ 「水澈无瑕，瘴毒避之。擅浊其源，大疫出之。无心之失，尚可宽之。滥觞浊淖，严惩毋恕。」

- Humanity's best friend!\nThese dogs have dark gold fur, and of Fontaine's hunting hounds their blood is the purest. Loyal, possessed of acute noses, and agile, these aid humans in chasing game and criminals alike.\nIt is even said that they do well in the water, though few have ever witnessed them swimming — most nowadays take this saying to be a curious invention of The Steambird. ｜ 人类最好的朋友！\n毛皮呈暗金色的犬类，是血统最为纯正的枫丹猎犬，忠于主人，嗅觉灵敏，身手敏捷，能帮助人们追踪猎物与罪犯。\n传说，它们还有着不错的水性，不过很少有人目击到它们游泳，大多人只当这个说法是源自《蒸汽鸟报》的趣闻。

- The fire is dangerous! Whether it's in a lush forest or a hot desert, be wary of the source of fire! But the last time I walked {0}, I noticed a strange heat wave. The chief culprit was a red guy, who researchers seem to call an... "Abyss Mage"! It wouldn't heed my warnings, and it wasn't fazed by my arrows, so I had to retreat to the city for help. In short, we must deal with it as soon as possible! ｜ 火是很危险的！无论是在植被茂盛的森林，还是气候炎热的沙漠，都要对火源抱有十二万分的戒心！但上次我{0}巡视的时候，察觉到了一股异样的热浪，罪魁祸首就是一个红色的家伙，学者们好像叫它…「深渊法师」来着！它不听我的劝告，但也不怕我的弩箭，我只好暂时撤退，来城里搬救兵了。总之，一定要尽早铲除它！

- Liloupar doesn't have enough power to dispel this Atmospheric Vortex yet... ｜ 利露帕尔目前还没有足够的力量使大气涡流消散…
- A Conspiracy Under Winter's Resplendence ｜ 冬日密谋
- Um... I'll be fine. You go help them first, Miss Forest Ranger. I'm okay, really! The sand got into my eyes, that's all! ｜ #啊…我没事的。巡林员姐姐，你先去帮{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}们吧。我真的没事，刚刚只是沙子迷了眼睛！
- Hmph! Don't you underestimate Paimon! ｜ 哼哼，可不要小看派蒙！

- Really? Okay, well... I'll hit it back with my cap! ｜ 真的吗？那可莉也要用帽子和它对撞！

- Hmm... Wait, rhythm...? That's right! That's it! This is the rhythm I'm looking for! ｜ 咦，等等…节奏？没错，我要找的就是这种节奏感！
- Really? What a coincidence! Are there only photos of Madame Melo in there? ｜ 居然真是这个，实在是太巧了…这里面只有夫人的画片吗？
- That's the whole point of saving time in the first place! So I can spend it on things I enjoy... Oh, we mustn't forget about our guests... ｜ 那就是我节省时间的用处，我要将我的时间节省给我想做的事…唔，这两位客人和一位客龙…
- Kiminami Anna starts making pizza... ｜ 木南杏奈开始制作披萨…
- Wish I had a teapot like this. Then, nobody would be able to find me when I'm trying to slack off. ｜ 要是我也有一个这样的壶就好了。想偷懒了就往里面一钻，看谁还发现得了我。
- I know, I know. Everything's fine, really. I'm just... I'm just nervous. ｜ 我知道我知道，我没有不开心，我只是…我只是很紧张。

- To Abattouy, for a machine to truly be considered a mechanical life form, it must possess features similar to any other living organism... It should be structured similarly, it must be able to cry and laugh, and it must have the capacity for independent thought... ｜ 与真实生命构造相似、会哭会笑、会自主思考…在阿巴图伊看来，拥有这些性能的机械，才能被称为机械生命吧。
- Alright, we'll go there right away. ｜ 好，我们这就去找她。
- I see. If you think all those versions of me are worth a Gnosis... Then, deal. ｜ 原来如此。假如你认为那么多个「我」比得上一颗神之心的价值…成交。
- Huh. You do have a point... ｜ 嗯，莫娜说的也有道理…
- If you need help hiring a wayfinder, feel free to contact me. I'll be around here all day, more or less. ｜ 如果你以后需要雇旅行家，也可以来联系我，我白天基本都在这附近。
- I know, right? ｜ 就是！
- To put it shortly, the Fungus is the congregation of overgrown and over-evolved spores.\n<color=#F39000FF>Exposing it to Pyro or Electro will Scorch or Activate it, respectively. While in either one of said states, the Fungus will drop special materials</color>\nIt is said the infestation of Fungi is the result of a lab accident. At first, a certain sage had hopes of utilizing spores for medical purposes. If that is true, the person had clearly underestimated the spores' adaptive and reproductive powers. ｜ 一言以蔽之的话，就是过度成长、过度进化的孢子。\n<color=#F39000FF>在遇到火元素或雷元素后，会转化成「枯焦」或「活化」状态，并且在这个状态下能产生特别的素材。</color>\n据说蕈兽的广布来自实验事故。最初须弥的贤人期冀将孢子一些特性运用在救死扶伤上。若果真如此，此人显然低估了孢子的环境适应力与传播能力。
- There's... really no end to these gulls and their appetites, is there? ｜ 这群紫金渔鸥…真是吃个没完啊。简直就像是永远也吃不饱一样。
- The Perch seems to be in a good state. I'm sure the ceremony will go well this time! ｜ 栖木的状态很好，这回的祭典一定会很顺利的！
- Well, it won't be troubling this garden again. ｜ 这样一来花圃应该不会被打扰了。
- So, I'll give it to you as a gift. ｜ 所以，这份图纸我就送给您了，请您收好。
- Synopsis (Shots 4 to 7):\nThe first <color=#e5870a>two letters</color> that Faruzan receives politely decline her mentorship proposals. Feeling dejected by the repeated mention of the word <color=#e5870a>"focus"</color> in the letters, she then opens <color=#e5870a>a reply from Collei</color>. ｜ 脚本规划（第4至第7镜）：\n珐露珊收到的<color=#e5870a>前两封</color>信件均婉拒了珐露珊的招揽。珐露珊正为信中<color=#e5870a>方向</color>一词失落时，又拆开了<color=#e5870a>来自柯莱的回信</color>。

- It was never Ayaka or Ayato's intention to make me the housekeeper, I volunteered. I like this kind of work. Putting everything in order gives me a great sense of achievement, and based on everyone's reactions... Yeah, I think I do a pretty good job. ｜ 不论是神里小姐还是家主大人，最初都没打算让我担任家政官，还是我自告奋勇的。我很喜欢这些活，将一切打理得井井有条，特别有成就感。看大家的反应…嗯，我应该干得不错。

- "The tragic death of my beloved daughter, Huachu, has shattered my heart into a thousand pieces! I am now selling this property so that I can give her the funeral she deserves." ｜ 「近日小女花初不幸亡故，使我心肠崩摧！今特转让老宅一座，以厚葬爱女。」

- That's right, though it only seems to have become one very recently — it lacks the power and intelligence to speak just yet. Still, it appears to have been attracted by the festive atmosphere. ｜ 嗯，这孩子似乎是新近才成了妖怪，还没有开口说话的妖力跟灵智…不过还是被「三川花祭」的氛围吸引来了呢。

- When that child was first brought here, she was effectively illiterate. It wasn't a huge issue, though. She's a hard worker and a diligent student, so she's made good progress. Still, her goal is to learn advanced medical techniques, so she still has a long way to go. She sometimes puts too much pressure on herself... Help her out when you can, would you? Consider it a favor for me as her mentor. Thanks a lot. ｜ 这孩子刚被带过来的时候，可以说是大字不识一个。不过问题不大。她学习勤奋，态度也认真，进步很快。只是，距离她习得精湛医术的目标还有很远的路要走。她有时会给自己很大的压力…噢，你有机会的话也多帮帮她吧？就当是我这个做师父的拜托你啦，多谢。

- Not quite. Heh... well actually, to tell the truth, I'm still a long way off... ｜ 还没呢。呃，不如说…还早呢…
- Offering up kindling is the established rule of the Nation of Pyro.\nTo acquire a certain amount of something, one must first pay the corresponding price. Sometimes, you may end up paying too much to obtain something; while other times, you may pay too little, and lose it as a result. Understanding how to strike this balance between giving and receiving is one of the meanings of offering kindling. ｜ 火之国土的成规是焚燔。\n想要取得多少的东西，就要付出相应量级的代价。有时为了得到而付出太多，有时却付出的不足而无法得到。能够认识如何正确的付出与得到，也是焚燔的意义之一。

- A lightning-charged feather that still flickers with the wrath of the Thunderbird's cruel retribution. ｜ 带电的雷之羽，是雷之魔鸟降下残酷的报应。遗落的羽毛仍闪烁着它盛怒的雷光。

You see why the dish is also called "the Romance of Sailors." W—Wait just a minute! Does this mean that Lambad's adventure stories are not exaggerated after all? ｜ 略带花香的烤鱼。金黄的鱼肉，宛如染上晚霞的浪花一般，卷起细碎的蔷薇，带着花香扑面而来。难怪这道菜肴有着「海员的浪漫」这一别称…莫、莫非兰巴德大叔的那些冒险故事也不尽是夸夸其谈？

- Paimon was having a hard time thinking of an Archon as an ordinary person, but seeing this portrait... it kinda makes sense now. ｜ 嘿嘿，「神在成为神之前只是个普通人类」，之前还很难想象，直到看到了这幅画。

- The obsession with godhood has burst like a bubble, disappearing like a daydream.\nAnd yet when you step into the secret workshop beneath that breach, the memories of your battle against Shouki no Kami reemerge in your mind, fresh as the morning dew.\nSuch a recollection does not need the use of the Akasha to reproduce perfectly. ｜ 「成神」的妄念如同泡沫破碎，像午后的梦一样消散得无影无踪。\n但迈入破洞之下的秘密工坊时，与「正机之神」战斗的经历又鲜明地浮现在脑海中。\n如此鲜明的记忆，即使没有「虚空」赋予的知识与经验，也能在脑海中重现吧。

After Normal Attacks deal Elemental DMG, the Foliar Incision effect will be obtained, increasing DMG dealt by Normal Attacks and Elemental Skills by <color=#99FFFFFF>210%</color> of Elemental Mastery. This effect will disappear after 28 DMG instances or 12s. - Rex Lapis, most ancient of The Seven, has lived far too long.\nRex Lapis still remembers that moment when the final archon took their divine seat, thus ending the Archon War and the era of warring gods. The Seven were a diverse lot and dispersed far and wide, but they all shouldered the burden of guiding humanity.\nAs time passed, many of The Seven's titles changed hands, and only two of the first Seven remain in positions of rulership: Rex Lapis and the Anemo Archon.\nThe carefree Barbatos, the Anemo Archon, is the second eldest of The Seven.\nWhen Barbatos first came to Liyue, Rex Lapis believed his fellow archon to have encountered some terrible crisis in pursuit of their duties, thus requiring his aid.\nSo when Barbatos descended in a gust of wind, the Geo Archon had already prepared himself to receive this neighboring deity and lend what help he may.\nBut as he looked, the Anemo Archon tossed a wine bottle at him.\n"Here's some wine from Mondstadt. Care for a taste?"\nTo forsake one's duty to deliver a single bottle of wine — what a preposterous notion!\nYet the Anemo Archon kept coming to visit, to explore Liyue Harbor, all sorts of strange questions on his lips. The Anemo Archon's questions knew as little limits as the wine in his hands.\nFrom then on, the first Seven would often gather in Liyue.\nRex Lapis still remembers how those wines tasted.\nThe world has changed much since then, and all that was once familiar has faded into memory.\nThe seven seats changed and again were changed, till five of the seven at the table were all departed.\nNor would the duty of guiding humanity be honored by the new archons.\nEven the hardest rocks may be worn down after three thousand years.\nNor would the wind ever return again.\nOne drizzly day, the ancient ruler was strolling about Liyue Harbor, and overheard a merchant telling one of his workers,\n"You've finished your duties, go ahead and call it a day."\nLong did he stand amidst the milling crowd.\n"Have I... already finished my duties?" ｜ 作为七神中最古老的一位，「岩王帝君」已经度过了太长的时光。\n「岩王帝君」还记得，在魔神战争的战火刚刚熄灭时，最后七位魔神各自登上「神」之座，自此终结了「魔神战争」时代。他们虽然性格迥异又相隔万里，却都肩负着「引导人类」的神圣职责。\n时代变迁，七神多有更替。时至今日，最初的七神之中，尚在执政之位的唯留下两位：「岩王帝君」，与那位自由而快活的风神。\n七神中第二古老的，是那位自由而快活的风神，巴巴托斯。\n两千年前巴巴托斯初临璃月，「岩王帝君」的第一反应是：这位同僚在履行职责时遇到了困难，需要自己的帮助。\n所以还没等巴巴托斯从风中落下，岩之神已经做好准备迎接这位邻国神明，只等他开口，自己就将倾尽所能。\n然而，风之神却将一瓶酒递到了他面前。\n「这是蒙德城的酒，你要尝尝吗？」\n——为了送一瓶酒而弃职责于不顾，实在荒唐。\n即使如此，那位风神依然不断前来造访，到璃月港四处游玩，还总向岩之神问出各种奇怪问题。这位风神的好奇心，就和他手中的酒一样无穷无尽。\n自那时起，那个时代的七神往往会在璃月相聚。\n到现在，「岩王帝君」仍能回忆起那些酒的味道。\n此后，世界不断变迁，他曾熟悉的一切都在逐渐消逝。\n七神之位更迭再更迭，酒会上的七人已逝五人。\n最初七神「引导人类」的古老职责，终于也开始被一些新任神明视为无物了。\n亲历三千多年风霜，最坚固的岩石也能被磨损。\n而且，风也没有再来到他身旁。\n某个微雨的清晨，古老的帝君漫步于璃月港，听见一个商人对属下如此夸奖道：\n「你很好地完成了你的职责。现在，去休息吧。」\n……\n「岩王帝君」在熙攘的人群中驻足良久。\n「我的职责…又是否已经完成？」\n神灵如此自问。
- Th-Then, please help me! Please make me some authentic Liyue dishes! ｜ 那、那就请你快点帮帮我，做点正宗的璃月菜给我吧！

- While I and my companions ranged across the land, struggling mightily to contain the power of the primordial waters, he used his eloquent tongue to sway those who remained. ｜ 在我和同伴巡行各地，为遏制原初之水的力量而奋战之时，波爱修斯用他如簧的巧舌蛊惑了剩下的人。

- But do you not wish to reach the place where Nabu Malikata slumbers? Hehehe... I shall not aid you, girl, or your... "Matriarch." ｜ 但你不是要去娜布·玛莉卡塔沉眠之处吗？嗯…呵呵，我不会帮助你，或者你的什么「首领母亲」…

- Randomly dispels the disguise of one Rebel and marks their location on the minimap for a long period of time.\nIf the target is nearby, their location will be marked by a pillar of light.\nThe target cannot Disguise themselves for the duration of this effect.\nThe Rebels will be warned of this action. ｜ 随机解除一位「游侠」的伪装，并在小地图上长时间标记目标的位置。\n此外，若目标在附近，则会以光柱标明其在场景中所处的位置。\n效果持续期间内，目标将无法再次进行伪装。\n施放时，游侠阵营将得到警告。

- A stone hilt obtained from an ancient statue. The chips and grooves speak to the brutal battles its owner once weathered.\nPerhaps their obsession with immortality led the one who made the golems to construct their heavy longswords of marble rather than metal. Today, this broken hilt stands testament to the utter falsity of that ideal. ｜ 自古老雕像上取得的的石质剑柄。剑柄上的断口与刻痕似乎记录了其主人曾经历过的残酷战斗。\n或许是出于对于不朽的执着，制作魔像之人并未使用金属，而是用白石制作了沉重的长剑。如今，断裂的剑柄已宣告了其理想的虚妄。

- I got to be a champion too, for once. I've not sparred much with desert folk before. It was a pretty unique experience. ｜ 这次我也当了强者呢，很少在沙漠里跟人打架，感觉还挺特别的。
- Is that how it is... Seems like it really was goodbye... Will we ever see her again...? ｜ 这样吗…结果，真的是告别呀…我们以后还会再见到她吗…？
- This is a favorite among our regulars. Bamboo shoots, meat and ham are cooked together, creating a richly-flavored soup. ｜ 这是老主顾们特别喜欢的一道菜，笋和肉和火腿一起煮，调出风味浓郁的汤汁。
- If you do not warm up before a dive, or if you cannot adapt to the water pressure in time, you may suffer from muscle cramps or other symptoms such as tinnitus. ｜ 要是不提前在潜水前活动身体，或是无法及时适应水压的话，可是很容易出现抽筋、耳鸣等症状的。
- Therefore... you must be outlanders. Or are you... something else? ｜ 所以…你是外来人吧？还是说你是什么「别的东西」…
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Let's just pick one, huh? One's enough to show that you care. ｜ 我看这绯樱绣球，不如就取一团，作为你的心意就好。

- That's right... Or, well, she used to. Now, she just handles regular forging commissions. ｜ 是的。但是…她如今已经不再打造「古名」，只做一些普通的锻造工作了。
- Even the God of Wisdom is restricted by the habits of cognition. How disappointing. ｜ 连智慧之神都会被「认知」的惯性所束缚，实在令人失望。

- Anyway, what happened just now? Why did you end up hiding inside a rock? ｜ 所以，刚才到底是怎么回事？为什么你会躲在石头里？
- Healthy meals... ｜ 健康餐…

- Whoa! What's going on!? The wind's so strong — is this a sandstorm!? Paimon's gonna get blown away! ｜ 哇——怎么回事！好大的风——是沙尘暴吗！？要被吹飞了！

- According to Iris, there are other strange shards here on Dragonspine. If you follow the strange blue plants, you may be able to find shards of this sort around the <color=#00E1FFFF>Snow-Covered Path</color>, <color=#00E1FFFF>Entombed City Outskirts</color>, and <color=#00E1FFFF>Starglow Cavern</color>. These shards seem to hold the key to removing that odd air current... ｜ 根据玉霞的说法，在这座雪山中，似乎还存在着奇怪的碎片。如果循着蓝色的奇异植物，就能在<color=#00E1FFFF>「覆雪之路」</color>、<color=#00E1FFFF>「雪葬之都·近郊」</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>「星荧洞窟」</color>找到这类碎片。这些碎片似乎是解开奇怪气流的关键…

- Ugh! Even just glancing at the borrowing records gives me flashbacks to how awful that book was... How irritating. ｜ 受不了，对着借书记录都会想起借到那种书的感觉…哎，真烦。
- A prophecy... of the former Hydro Archon? Wow, this is the first time that we've ever heard of it... ｜ 是前代水神留下的预言吗？这个我们倒是头一次听说…
- Of course it does! But I want to know why... ｜ 当然不会高兴啦！但我更想知道原因…
- I think you may have misunderstood something. The reason Sachin chose that architect to inherit his research was that only he could really empathize with both the calamity and the humanity that these notes seek to convey. ｜ 我想你们误会了什么。萨齐因之所以会选那位大建筑师来继承研究，是因为只有他才会真正共情资料里记录的「灾难」与「人性」。

- Please go ahead. ｜ 您请说。
- Complete the challenge to obtain ｜ 完成挑战可获得
- Real Erick came to the guards for help, but we didn't know then what we know now. So we put it down to hallucination, and sent him to the observation ward. ｜ 真正的埃里克找到看守求助，而当时，我们这边因为信息不足，只能暂且将他当作妄想症患者送进了监护室。

- I do know the word — Inazuman for those eccentric types, who always go around dressed to the nines. Just the sort of person that I'd like to meet, actually. ｜ 我知道这个词在稻妻一般指那些特立独行、衣饰特殊的人，倒是一直想见见配得上这个说辞的人。
- Or... Who has the hardest head, a Ruin Guard or a Geovishap? ｜ 或者…遗迹守卫和岩龙蜥，谁的脑袋更硬！

- Well, didn't I just say so? I'm studying the terrain and drawing a map. ｜ 嗯…我刚刚说了呀，我在勘探地形，绘制地图。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh yeah, have you drawn fortune slips at the shrine before, {NICKNAME}?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> If we draw them before our next adventure, they may provide us with some guidance.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Hmm, but what if our draws are inauspicious or turn out to be a bad omen? If that happened, we'd probably end up in a bad mood...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh, that's fine. According to the shrine maidens, if someone draws a bad omen, they just need to hang it on a tree in the shrine...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> So, we should keep on drawing and drawing, until we get a super lucky draw! Then, we'll hang all the bad ones on the tree!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> If everyone did that, there'd be no more space left to hang the slips... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对了，{NICKNAME}，你有去过神社求签吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>做事之前先去求个签，说不定能得到一些启示哦。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>唔，但有可能会抽到「凶」或者「大凶」一类的吧？感觉会影响心情…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>没关系的，听神社的巫女说，要是抽到了不好的签，挂到神社的御签挂上就可以啦…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>所以只要一直抽一直抽，直到抽中「大吉」为止就好啦！其他的全挂到御签挂上！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果大家都像你这样做，御签挂会挂不下吧…
- No, no, how could that be? I do not believe any would hold to such contemptuous thoughts! ｜ 怎么会，我想绝不会有这样的轻慢之徒。
- Good Medicine Tastes Bitter ｜ 良药苦口
- Listen... This isn't a sauna... ｜ 我说…这又不是在蒸桑拿…
- Well, next up, let's get the issue of the large device at the center squared away, shall we? ｜ 接下来，我们去解决中间那个大机关的问题吧。
- Nope! The tailor happened to be in Liyue looking for a change of scenery and fresh inspiration. We got talking and really hit it off. So it was no trouble at all! ｜ 你放心啦。那位设计师最近正好来璃月港采风，说是想从异国节庆中寻找灵感，我们一拍即合，一点也不费功夫。
- Master, we're the only servants left! Are you sure about this? After we're gone, who's going to... ｜ 少爷，我们是最后的家仆了啊！您当真要遣散大家？那往后，谁来…

- "In the end, I'm the only one left to take care of the elders. It's not that I don't want to, it's just that doing everything alone can be hard sometimes..." ｜ 「结果，现在照顾老爹他们的只有我了。不是不愿意，只是一个人始终还是有些辛苦呢…」

- The standard railings used in the Hotel Debord. Made of sturdy materials and decorated with magnificent patterns, the air of artistry positively radiates from it. It is said that the philosophy of the Hotel Debord's owner, Vaneigem, is "Art is the best seasoning for haute cuisine." In service to this philosophy, he specially ordered a set of custom ornamentation to create an elegant atmosphere of high culture, turning the entire venue into a celebration of art. And these exquisitely designed railings elevate the allure and deepness of the entire aesthetic feast, just like "Sprinkling a few fresh mint leaves when plating." ｜ 德波大饭店内的标准护栏，用料扎实，饰有华丽的花纹，极富艺术气息。据说，德波大饭店的老板瓦纳格姆坚持的理念是——「艺术是美食最好的作料」，为此还专门定制了一整套装潢，用以塑造高雅的文化氛围，将整个饭店变成了艺术盛典的会场。而这些精心设计的护栏，则将整个盛宴变得更为诱人与深邃，就如「在摆盘之时点缀的薄荷新叶」。

- Are there enemies nearby? ｜ 附近有敌人吗？

- Hitotsume Kozou and the others did all the work, Bull-chucker. You're really lumping them in with your gang? ｜ 放牛的，你不会是把独眼小僧他们也算进荒泷派里了吧？
- #Haha, and once again, thanks to the two of you, {NICKNAME} and Paimon! In truth though, I'd heard your names a long time ago — after all, as couriers, staying in the loop is how we make a living! ｜ #这次也多谢你们啦，哈哈，{NICKNAME}和派蒙，你们的名字我其实早就知道了，毕竟讯使是靠信息吃饭的嘛。
- Eh? Wasn't he... ｜ 欸？他不是…
- And not only were there hilihogs, there were hiliHOUNDS, too! Ugh, don't you know anything? *hic* Well... if we can hunt that hilihog, it'd mean a lot of food for a long time. ｜ 不仅有丘丘猪，还有丘丘狗呢，看你就没见识…哎呀，要是能猎到那只丘丘猪，肯定能吃很久…
- Those from the Akademiya have the fattest wallets. They never quibble over prices or delay payments. ｜ 教令院是全须弥钱包最鼓的地方，他们付酬金从不讲价，也不拖欠。
- 3. Friends will stroll through the forest again. That which is good will return, and the painful memories will vanish. Just like a stream purifying itself or a withered tree sprouting once more. ｜ 三、挚友将再次同行于茂密的森林中。一切美好的事物终将归来，一切痛苦的记忆也会远去，就像溪水净化自己，枯树绽出新芽。

Please log into the corresponding post-transfer account via the official server after said transfer is complete. If you have any questions, contact official Customer Service via the HoYoLAB app.\nBan End Time {1}\n Ban Reason: {2} ｜ UID：{0}\n由于您的账号已申请进行数据迁移，相关账号已被暂时封禁；请在完成迁移后，登录官方服务器对应迁移后账号，如有疑问可以通过米游社APP联系官方客服咨询。\n封禁结束时间【{1}】\n封禁理由：【{2}】
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Embroidered Lantern: Lofty Grandeur.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「锦缎华灯-『飞阁流丹』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- #Anyway, Paimon's name is Paimon, and this is {NICKNAME}. ...Okay, great, that went well. At least this mysterious room doesn't rob everyone of their memories. ｜ #顺带一提，我是派蒙，旁边这位是{NICKNAME}哦。呼，太好了，看来这里不是会让人失忆的神秘房间。
- A soft, fluffy red nightcap. Can be used to build a Puffy Snowman.\n"You can play with the snowmen tomorrow!" So the adults tell the children. "Snowmen need to sleep too, you know? They go off to Dreamland once we head back home!" These sayings wound up being taken for truth by the children, and some gentle kids give their snowmen comfy sleeping caps as a result. ｜ 松松软软的红色睡帽，可用于组装「噗噗雪人」。\n「雪人们也是要睡觉的，我们回家以后，他们也会进入梦乡，所以，明天再来找他们玩吧！」——大人们劝说孩子们回家时所说的这句话，不经意间被孩子们当成了真理，一些温柔的孩子因此为雪人戴上了舒适的睡帽。
- Must be. They seem to be handing off the shipment... They'll definitely start transporting it soon. ｜ 没错，看起来他们就是在接手货物…想必马上就要开始运货了。
- My mistake... ｜ 好失态…
- Brat! Really trying to take us for a ride? ｜ 好崽子，这是把俺们当羊牯了？
- If Paimon was trapped here, Paimon would definitely want to go back home and be with everyone else... ｜ 毕竟如果是我的话，比起待在这种地方，还是更想回到花海和大家待在一起…
- And your main goal, for which you gave up everything you had... you weren't able to achieve it. I hope you can see and understand that. ｜ 另外，你倾尽全力去追求的事，它最核心的目的…并没能达成，这一点还请你明白。
- In the trials of "Battlefront: Misty Dungeon," you must activate all the Ancient Runes within the time limit to gain access to the Final Challenge. ｜ 在「迷城战线」的试炼中，需要在指定时间内寻找并激活所有的「古代符文」，进行「最终挑战」。
- Defeat the slimes ｜ 消灭史莱姆
- I, for one, am inclined to agree with Venti's understanding of Barbatos. ｜ 我相信温迪对巴巴托斯的理解。
- Uh... So if we want to play this music, we'll have to find some kind of special instrument? This is getting more and more complicated... ｜ 呃…那样的话如果想要演奏这篇乐章的话，就必须得找到这种专门的乐器才行了吧，怎么感觉越来越复杂了…
- Talk to Depierris ｜ 与德皮耶里对话
- ...Leave it to me then. ｜ 唉…交给我吧。
- We came here to save lives. One arm for that many people is still a pretty good deal if you ask me. Rahman, I'm holding up my end of the deal here. You'd better not let me down. ｜ 救人要紧，一条胳膊换那么多条人命，怎么都划算。拉赫曼，我答应你的要求，你也不要让我失望。
- Got it! Thanks, Miss Yoimiya, we'll try and be more patient! ｜ 知道了！既然宵宫姐姐都这么说了，我们就再耐心一点！
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- According to intelligence, the target has the following special traits:\n·Especially fierce\n·Invulnerable to Cryo DMG\n·Invulnerable to Pyro DMG\n\nAdditionally, the target has the following weakness:\n·Takes greatly increased DMG from sword-wielding characters ｜ 根据调查，目标具有如下特性：\n·特别凶暴\n·冰元素伤害无效\n·火元素伤害无效\n\n此外，目标具有以下弱点：\n·使用单手剑的角色造成的伤害大幅提升
- Ah, I get it. It's like that thing from the Akademiya's dumpster! I call it "Banu's Wisdom," but everyone else calls it "Ayesha's Chaos Prospector." ｜ 啊我懂了，就像你从教令院的垃圾堆里淘来的那个东西那样。我管它叫「芭努的智慧」，但大家都叫它「阿叶夏混沌勘探器」。

- Oh, what is it, Granny? Need any help? ｜ 怎么啦，婆婆，您有事需要我们帮忙吗？
- What are you doing? ｜ 你在做什么？
- They're planning to use your festival to promote Aisa Bathhouse! ｜ 嘿嘿，她们可打算一起用你的祭典，狠狠打一波广告呢！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hmph. She was peacocking around the whole time, driving me up the wall... and now she's finally silent. What a relief. ｜ 那个家伙，整天一副高高在上的态度惹人不爽，现在可算是安静了…让我松了口气。
- After I help you with your matters here, I need to head over to Fontaine. The adventurers over there are notorious for frugality, so I need to receive them well. ｜ 等为你办好了这边的事务，我还要继续瞬移前往枫丹呢，那边的冒险家可是出了名的锱铢必较，必须要好好接待才行。
- I mean, I did warn you from the start — you should really have paid a little more attention to your arts of disguise. ｜ 顺便，我一开始就忠告过了，你们还是多在意一下伪装比较好。
- She left a while ago. ｜ 早就分开了。
- I—I... You're quite mistaken. I would never doubt the leaders of my clan. ｜ 我…我不会那样怀疑家主他们的，您过度揣测了。

- I'm glad to see you're giving it some serious consideration. ｜ 看起来你在认真考虑。
- Right? So that makes two of us! ｜ #对吧？果然{NICKNAME}也和我一样呢！
- Hammer it in the middle and work your way out to the edges. ｜ 从内向外敲打。
- If you're willing to help us, then of course you are. ｜ 如果你愿意帮忙的话，那是当然了
- This has never happened before. ｜ 从来没遇到过这种情况啊。

- Have some faith, it'll be fine. ｜ 相信我，准没错。
- Let's meet up at the temple. Perhaps your questions about the Abyss will be answered there. ｜ 在那里汇合吧。你对深渊的疑惑，或许在那里会有解答。
- But... but traveling wouldn't be any fun without surprises to look forward to! ｜ 这、这是为了保持旅程的期待感嘛！

- Each fall, the west wind blows in Mondstadt. Legend has it that the wonderful scent of Mondstadt's wine-making during the harvest season entices even the Anemo Archon into attendance, being the great wine-lover that he is. ｜ 蒙德每年秋天都刮西风，传说，这是因为丰收时节酿酒的香气太过诱人，引来了酷爱饮酒的风神。
- To defeat the opposing god and Fatui forces. ｜ 击退魔神与愚人众。
- You willingly took this work on, knowing that it would be tedious, and you have worked diligently. My secretaries and I are very grateful to you. ｜ 你明知事务琐碎，还承担了下来，并且尽心尽力…几位秘书还有我都十分感激。

- So, the challenge... You up for it? ｜ 怎么样，挑战…试试吗？

- Haha, you can stay as long as you like, granted you don't cause any trouble, that is. Her Excellency has stated that all friendly visitors are welcome. ｜ 哈哈，你想在这里呆多久都可以，只要不做坏事。珊瑚宫大人说过了，我们欢迎所有友善的客人。
- I shall speak no further. Lead him away... He was once one of us, so you know what to do. ｜ 多说无益，把他带出去吧…他曾是我们的族人，你们知道该怎么做。
- Jade Chamber Administrator ｜ 「群玉阁」管事
- At least he's still got some choices to make. ｜ 不过至少，他还有得选。
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>8–10%</color> of Max HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的<color=#3399CCFF>8%-10%</color>。
- Oh! She did mention a little disagreement you had, yes... But you know, she talks quite carelessly, but isn't actually good at expressing her feelings. ｜ 哦！她是说和你们闹了些小小的不愉快。这孩子有时候大大咧咧的，反而不太会表达自己的情感，哈哈！
- I'm sorry, I... I've been so harsh on you, but you still trust me... ｜ 对不起，我一直对你这么苛刻，你还相信着我…
- That's not the case. Training is tough. Urville has to complete all the training courses in order to join the Fontaine Fleet. ｜ 不是的，训练是很辛苦的，尤维尔要努力完成训练科目才能加入枫丹舰队。
- ...Do you have a moment, Director Merieux? ｜ …梅里埃导演，请问有空吗？
- Complete the challenge within 140s ｜ 挑战用时小于140秒
- I'd always known that Mondstadt is the City of Song and Freedom. But more recently, I heard that the Anemo Archon returned to Mondstadt for a festival in the Fall, and learned that he himself is a patron deity of music. ｜ 我知道蒙德是自由与诗歌的城邦，近来又听说风神大人在秋天回了蒙德，据传他也是音律的守护神。
- Is that so... ｜ 这样啊…
- Dharmakirti ｜ 陀罗诘利
- What a beautiful way to see the world. It almost makes me feel a little guilty... Hm, then out of respect for you, I shall redefine myself. ｜ 真是美好的理想啊，让我有些愧疚。那就尊重你，改改我对自己的定义吧。
- Shadow of the Ancients - Event Ending ｜ 「古时孤影」活动结束提醒
- I'm really sorry. I hope you understand... ｜ 真的非常抱歉，请您谅解…
- Guards are present around the clock to ensure that civilians who have evacuated here from the surrounding lands may safely enter the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. There has been no update from this sector for some time. Situation unknown. ｜ 这里随时都有人驻守，确保从四处疏散而来的平民能安全进入圣火竞技场。消息长期未更新，目前情况不明。
- Did they really think that as long as they didn't do any of that stuff right in front of me, I would never know? ｜ 他们不会以为不让我看见，我就永远不知道吧？
- Eh? Why Mt. Yougou? ｜ 咦？为什么是影向山？
- It's the Fatui! ｜ 是愚人众啦！

- Drink the potion ｜ 饮用药水

- Thank you, and I hope things stay that way. ｜ 谢谢，但愿一直如此。

- Then there is only one solution... ｜ 那就只有一个办法了…
- (Aww ...Why didn't Amber come? *sigh* So... how should I ask Lisa about Amber? Ahh, what should I do...) ｜ （呜…安柏怎么没有来…哎呀我该怎么跟丽莎小姐问安柏的事，啊我好混乱。）
- Spirit Carp and Votive Rainjade... ｜ 苍灵鲤与祀珑…
- Ironically, due to the chaos created by the Tatarigami, the Shogunate and the rebels have not been fighting over this place quite as hard. ｜ 不过讽刺的是，多亏了「祟神」作乱，幕府和叛军打仗也没以前那么拼命了。
- Ah, how could these two things be comparable? One's trip was made specifically to lay eyes on mountain and water, and since it is also one's first time, capturing the scenery is but the logical choice. ｜ 欸，怎能同论？本仙此行目的本就是观山玩水，既是初次来访，存些秀色掠影理之固然。
- What, no answer? Surely you're not insinuating that you, a group of legendary Marechaussee Hunters, sought to take the treasure for yourselves? ｜ 怎么了？没人回答吗？身为「传说中的逐影猎人」，总不会想要私吞王国的财富吧？
- Sometimes we have criminals who have more energy than they know what to do with... their daily work alone isn't enough of an outlet for them. ｜ 总有些精力过剩的犯人，日常工作并不足以消耗他们的激情。
- I wanted to make it smell like Zaytun Peaches at first... But for some reason, once I added them into the mixture, the perfume became all sticky... ｜ 我本来想做「墩墩桃」味的，但不知道为什么，我只要加入墩墩桃，香水就会变得黏糊糊的…
- Many happy returns. Here is a bag of herbal medicine for you. You must be very surprised that I remembered? Let me explain. Last time you told me, I wrote your birthday down on a piece of paper. If I look at something once a day, it eventually goes into my long-term memory, and it will stay there forever. ｜ 生辰快乐。给，草药香囊。很惊讶吗？上次你告诉我的时候，我就记在纸上了。每天都看一遍的话，今后也不会忘记的…
- It's Nilou! Heyyyyyy! ｜ 是妮露！真的是妮露欸！妮露——！

Additionally, Iktomisaurs and Masters of the Night-Wind characters can <color=#FFE14BFF>Hold their Aim over Radiant Reflections</color> to pause their movement for a short time... ｜ 灵觉隐修的迷者会造就与自己形象一致的浮彩分身并隐匿其中。此时，<color=#FFE14BFF>击破所有浮彩分身的元素护罩</color>，即可使其现身并露出破绽。此外，暝视龙与「烟谜主」部族成员的角色在<color=#FFE14BFF>长按瞄准浮彩分身</color>时，似乎可以使其短暂停滞一段时间…
- Hmm, everyone's here to eat, what should I cook? Lemme think... I've got some Fowl and some Fish... and Shrimp Meat, so I can do two snack dishes... yes, and a few stir-fries! ｜ 唔…大家都来吃饭，做什么菜好呢？我想想…禽肉、鱼肉都有…有虾仁，可以做两道点心…嗯，再加些小炒！

- "Hehe, a game of cards, eh? I'm getting all fired up already!"\nHint: Xinyan's deck has a lot of cards with "Discard" or "Draw" effects. She can Discard extraneous cards to gain an advantage in tempo. ｜ 「说到要和你玩牌，我的热情就涌上来了！」\n【提示】辛焱的牌组包含了大量具有「弃牌」和「抓牌」效果的卡牌，能够通过舍弃多余的手牌来获取节奏上的优势。

- Hehe, I'll take the compliment. ｜ 那就借你吉言，嘿嘿。
- Hmm, well. Being willing to support your employer is a good thing, I suppose. It shows that you value contracts just as the people of Liyue do. But you can't fool me. ｜ 唔，愿意维护雇主是好事，说明你们和璃月人一样重视「契约」。但是你们骗不了我。
- Talk to Shousen ｜ 与涉川对话
- It's hard to pull yourself out of that kind of hatred... especially when you've been living in that headspace for so many years. ｜ 想靠自己从仇恨里清醒过来是很难的…何况他已经独自在仇恨里活了这么多年。

- A plant of a unique shape that cannot really be classified based on its outward appearance alone. It seems more like the shape a seed of life would take upon blooming gently as pure Hydro nourishes the land. Even on dark nights, it gives off a vital luminescence. ｜ 形姿奇妙的植株，单看外形，难以用寻常的草、灌木或花来界定它，似是纯净的水元素滋养土地后，生命的种子盛意绽开后的姿态，即便到了昏暗的夜里，也能放出富有活力的荧光。
- My wife is on Watatsumi Island. I have to serve here because of the war, so we've been separated. ｜ 我的妻子远在海祇岛，而我因为战事不得不出征，和她分隔两地。
- Everyone's so proud of you. ｜ 大家的骄傲。

- C'mon Traveler, let's chase them off! ｜ 我们快点去打倒他们吧！
- Ouch... That hurts... ｜ 好痛，好痛…

- A challenge track located at Falcon Coast that is carefully designed by Tiantian, the Recruiter of the Adventurers' Guild, and her colleagues in Mondstadt.\nDash forward using the fireworks' propulsion and enjoy the thrill of extreme speed and the beauty of flickering sparks. You can also hone your skills with the Wind Glider here. ｜ 冒险家协会的宣传员甜甜与蒙德的同事联合设计的挑战赛道，位于鹰翔海滩。\n借助烟花的力量迅疾前行，竞速的快感与光焰明灭的美景兼备，亦能锤炼使用风之翼的技巧。
- Never mind, let's just give the slates to Soheil. Paimon would love to see his awestruck face right about now! ｜ 不管了，我们直接把石板交给索赫尔吧，他一定会惊讶地说不出话的！
- But Mein Fräulein, was it not the Traveler who ultimately apprehended them? ｜ 但小姐，真正出手抓住恶徒的，是旅行者…

- Paimon'll cheer for you! That counts for something, right? ｜ 派蒙也会努力给你加油的！
- "Ooh, so you play Genius Invokation TCG too, huh? - Nobody wants to risk failing their exams, you know. ｜ 毕竟，大家都不想自己的考试运受到什么影响嘛。
- I suppose I should start from the beginning here... A long time ago, my father came to Inazuma as a foreign gourmet foodie. He was very impressed by the local culinary scene, so he volunteered to be a kitchen assistant at this restaurant. ｜ 这就要从头说起了…很久之前，身为异国美食家的父亲来到稻妻城，被这里的厨艺深深折服，自愿作为帮厨留在了店里。
- A sullen woodcarving head that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It is unpainted and has the unique texture and aroma of logs.\nAccording to a study by a renowned Haravatat researcher, children are more likely to accept stories with protagonists who get kicked in the teeth, probably because most fairy tales have a happy ending, which is not the case in the adults' world. ｜ 闷闷不乐的木刻脑袋，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。未经上色，拥有原木的独特质感与香气。\n根据一名知论派学者的研究，比起大人来，小朋友们更能够接受主角经受挫折的故事，大概是因为童话故事大多有一个好结局，而大人们的世界里并非如此吧。
- Noailles filled appeal forms out for you already. But you should stay out of trouble until a final decision has been made. ｜ 申诉书的话，诺瓦勒斯已经帮你们填好了。不过在最终结果出来以前，劝你们还是不要再惹麻烦了。
- Furina ｜ 芙宁娜
- Performs a swift thrust, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> to opponents along the path.\n\nWhen Cyno is under the Pactsworn Pathclearer state triggered by Sacred Rite: Wolf's Swiftness, he will instead unleash a <color=#FFD780FF>Mortuary Rite</color> that deals thunderous <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color> and extends the duration of Pactsworn Pathclearer.\n\n<i>"This judgment brooks no choice. There is no rejection or acceptance here... We have both long been bound up in this conviction."</i> ｜ 疾速突进，对路径上的敌人造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n\n当赛诺处于元素爆发「圣仪·煟煌随狼行」的启途誓使状态下时，将转而施展<color=#FFD780FF>冥祭</color>，释放惊雷的力量，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>，并延长启途誓使状态的持续时间。\n\n<i>「这场审判，你无权选择接受或拒绝。你与我…都早已置身其中了。」</i>
- #{NICKNAME}, the next time she changes the spirit veins, pay close attention to those Miasmic Simulacra! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，她下次改写灵脉的时候，要注意观察那些「氲气源像」！
- When one's spirit is as keen as can be, you shall burn bright at center stage. At this time, the minutiae of your techniques will cease to matter. Rather, unleash your desire for battle to the fullest extent — let the stage burn! ｜ 锐气积聚到顶点时，舞者便会成为全场最为炽亮的焦点。此时此刻，具体的招式与剑技已不再重要，只需尽情释放战意，让激斗的舞台灼烈燃烧…
- But I've heard a story about the rule... ｜ 不过关于这件事，我听过一个传说…
- Restore <color=#f39001>{1}</color> Vigor to <color=#f39001>{0}</color> random Principal Cast members, but gain <color=#f39001>{2}</color> fewer Fantasia Flowers after completing this Act's Combat Event ｜ 随机<color=#f39001>{0}</color>名可出战角色恢复<color=#f39001>{1}</color>点耐力值，但完成本幕的战斗事件获得的「幻剧之花」减少<color=#f39001>{2}</color>
- You can't? That makes you weak, Pale Floater. Being compassionate is indeed one of the great Simurgh's many noble qualities, but one cannot survive here with merely a kind heart. ｜ 可怜？白飘飘还真是软弱，虽说慈悲是神鸟大人也拥有的高贵品德，不过光靠仁慈可是没办法在此地生存下去的。
- Lisa ｜ 丽莎
- Hahahaha! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈…
- Hey! Where did you louts put your bows? ｜ 你们的弩呢！到哪里去了呀！
- Hehe, Paimon loves being friends with you since you say such nice things! ｜ 嘿嘿，我就喜欢和宵宫当朋友，说话真好听！
- Whoa! Wait, what do you even mean? ｜ 呜哇…等等，这话是什么意思啦！
- Right again! You're pretty perceptive! ｜ 没错没错，你眼光真好！
- So, what should I do now, Xilonen? ｜ 希诺宁姐姐…我接下来，该做什么呢？
- Let's see... ｜ 我看看…
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Taking private documents from the Fontaine Research Institute. Which would generally be considered as constituting theft. ｜ 将枫丹科学院的资料放进自己的口袋。被认为是盗窃也合情合理。
- Erica Mendez ｜ 艾丽卡·门德斯
- Astute Amusement ｜ 浮世笑百姿
- AoE DMG ｜ 范围伤害
- Huh? Wait... Did it all have something to do with this gem, then? ｜ 啊？这样想的话…难道和这颗宝石有关？
- Uhh... True, true... ｜ …呃，确实…
- Join the Adventurers' Guild... ｜ 冒险家协会…
- Complete "Masquerade of the Guilty" ｜ 完成「罪人舞步旋」剧情

- We have to complete the Aranara mission now and stop the Varuna Contraption in order to go down and remove those bad bugs and heal the machine. ｜ 现在我们要完成兰那罗的使命，要令法留纳神机停止，才能向下，去清除那些坏虫，治好法留纳神机。
- If we can <color=#00E1FFFF>hide amidst the Iktomisaurus patrol squad</color>, maybe we'll have an easier time getting in! ｜ 如果能<color=#00E1FFFF>混进暝视龙的巡逻队伍</color>里，说不定能很轻松地潜入进去呢！
- The Varuna Contraption's branches and leaves are everywhere in Vana. They give the machine power to turn black rain into good rain. Good rain then gives things life. ｜ 法留纳神机的枝和叶散在桓那各处，有了它们，法留纳神机才有力量，把黑色的雨变成好的雨，带来诞生的雨。
- No... no... no! ｜ 不不不，
- View Available Characters ｜ 查看可选角色
- Xudong ｜ 旭东
- Take a walk around Mamere's house while she puts the painting tools away. ｜ 在玛梅赫整理好画具前，先在她家附近随便走走看吧。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Nightsoul Fault ｜ 「夜魂灵隙」
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- ... ｜ ……
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Such immaturity! It is the duty of one senior to give pointers to their juniors. How can I speak softly to them in the face of such errors? ｜ 何等幼稚！前辈对于后辈，自然是要多加提点的，怎么能看着她们犯错，还温声细语！
- W—Well... There are just some things that have more... ceremony, when you do them. ｜ 唔，这个嘛…有些事情还是你来做比较有仪式感。
- Kairagis Defeated: #2#/%2% ｜ 击败海乱鬼：#2#/%2%
- Lucky Dog's Silver Circlet ｜ 幸运儿银冠
- Single Player ｜ 单人演奏
- Venti ｜ 温迪
- He's been acting strange recently... He avoids me for days on end, consumes himself with some secret investigation, and then out of the blue pushes me to do that acting job... ｜ 他这几天总是避着我，神神秘秘地查什么事…还突然推着我去演戏…很不正常。
- Go and pick 3 Qingxin flowers from atop the cliff ｜ 前往崖顶，采摘三朵清心
- Agh, this thing is so tough! We can't hurt it at all! ｜ 可恶…这家伙好难对付！为什么没办法打伤它呀！
- Even the lighthouse got knocked down... ｜ 灯塔也被撞倒了…
- Indeed, "Hibiki," "Asase Shrine," "Domeki"... these names are all quite concerning, actually. ｜ 确实，「阿响」…「浅濑神社」和「百目鬼」，都很让人在意。
- Can be eaten once cooked. As a spice, it can bring wonderful flavor to dishes. ｜ 烹饪后可食用的植株。作为香料能给食材带来奇妙的滋味。
- To the heir of the Ragnvindr Clan, ｜ 莱艮芬德家的贵公子收：
- As for how much it is going to be... It depends on your reason for staying in Inazuma. ｜ 至于费用几何…那就得看阁下来稻妻的目的了。
- But that cowardly Debal... Bah! He deserves to be poor. He couldn't hold onto Mora even if you handed it to him on a silver platter. ｜ 但德巴内这个胆小鬼…！呸！活该他穷死，钱到眼前都抓不住的家伙。
- "I want a robot with cool powers!" ｜ 「想要超级帅气的机器人！」
- And let's not forget that Albedo still has a portrait to complete. We don't have time to be slacking off! ｜ 再说阿贝多还要创作呢，可没时间陪你这个游手好闲的家伙！
- Same here. ｜ 好期待！
- A low-cost floor lamp that uses a brazier-like metal base. It can be found within the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. It is said that the original intent behind this design was to replace some of the small braziers used in the Stadium. With sources of fire come safety concerns and the requirement for dedicated maintenance staff. In contrast, using phlogiston for light sources skirts such issues. To minimize costs, the artisans chose to repurpose braziers into lamp bases, ultimately giving us the floor lamp design we see today. ｜ 造价低廉的地灯，采用了形似火盆的金属底座，可见于圣火竞技场内。据说，设计这款地灯的初衷是为了替代竞技场内一部分使用的小型火盆。毕竟，火源在安全性上存在一定的缺陷，并且需要专人负责维护。相比之下，使用燃素作为光源则避免了这些问题。而基于成本最小化的原则，工匠们选择了将火盆改造为地灯底座的技术方案，并最终催生了现今所见的地灯设计。
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Those guys from earlier? ｜ 就是刚才那些家伙吧？
- I'm afraid we don't know anyone called Sanka. ｜ 我们是有些朋友，但都不叫山下。
- Character Story 1 ｜ 角色故事1
- I remember. ｜ 我还记得。
- Grants <color=#FFFFFFFF>2 $[K6] points</color> to your active character. ｜ 为我方出战角色提供<color=#FFFFFFFF>2点$[K6]</color>。
- Soheil's Wish ｜ 索赫尔的心愿
- Palais Mermonia had arranged an emergency plan before disaster struck, so we escaped the worst, thank goodness. ｜ 而且灾害之前沫芒宫就给我们布置了应急预案，所以没有造成特别大的损失，真是谢天谢地啦。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Chuychu wanted to be a hero, and in my heart, she always will be. ｜ 葵可她想要成为英雄，她也永远会是我心目中的英雄。
- Aimed Shot|{param7:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param7:F1P}
- Food ｜ 食物
- Oh, the Kalimi Exchange. It's a place where you can see people's strengths, courage, and insights in action. ｜ 喏，就是这个，卡里米交易所，能够见证人们底蕴与胆识的地方。
- The reason is simple: We are scholars, and there are new projects that await our attention. ｜ 理由也很简单——我们都是学者，还有新的研究要做。
- #Oh... but {NICKNAME} and Paimon have been gliding for ages now. This is the first we've heard about it! ｜ #唔…{NICKNAME}都飞了这么久了，之前都没有听说这种东西…
- Some are... Others are mad I always come out on top. A few decades like that, and people stop knowing how to deal with you. ｜ 有些是怕我，有些是不服气又打不赢我…慢慢地，大家就有点不知道怎么跟我相处了。
- Sumeru: The Gilded Desert - Series II ｜ 须弥·饰金砂原·其之二
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param5:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param5:F1}点
- Acting Grand Sage Alhaitham? ｜ 艾尔海森大人？
- "Potton" ｜ 「波顿」
- Windgrasper Challenge Time Remaining: {0}s ｜ 「循风挑战」挑战剩余时间：{0}秒
- I'm good at taking care of people, so that can be left to me. ｜ 照顾人的事情，就让瑶瑶来做好了。
- Ah, is that so... It's alright. Our booth will be open for the entire duration of the Gala. ｜ 这样啊…没关系，我们的摊位在学院游乐会期间会一直开设。
- I locked him in a chest. I'm going to win the tournament solely on my own merit, so he's not needed during the competition. ｜ 被我锁在箱子里了。比赛期间不需要他，我会凭自己的本事赢。
- Afternoon tea? Sounds great! I could really use some refreshments. Long days of deliveries always leave me parched. Thanks for the invitation! ｜ 下午茶？好呀好呀！正好我送了好久好久的货，又干又渴，谢谢这位大姐姐啦！
- "Sink into this immortal prison with us, xenoproles." ｜ 「与我们一同沉入永生的囚牢吧，异族。」
- ...What kind of experience, Your Majesty? ｜ …国王陛下的经验？
- Obtained through capture ｜ 捕捉获得
- Slow and Steady Wins the Race ｜ 循序渐进是关键
- Pahsiv? ｜ 珀西芙？

---
### Part 060

- "Cocouik" ｜ 「绿松石」
- What's the problem? Hair ties may look simple and unassuming, but they actually require a lot of intricate craftsmanship to make! ｜ 怎么了？发圈这是麻雀虽小五脏俱全呀。
- Ematol ｜ 艾玛托
- Beautiful! Great performance! ｜ 漂亮，演得太出色了！
- I'll deliver it right now. ｜ 我这就送过去。
- Yikes! I've been spotted... ｜ 噫！被抓住了…
- Thoma vaults forward with his polearm and delivers a flame-filled flying kick that deals <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color>, while also summoning a defensive Blazing Barrier. At the moment of casting, Thoma's Elemental Skill applies <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro</color> to himself.\nThe DMG Absorption of the Blazing Barrier scales off Thoma's Max HP.\nThe Blazing Barrier has the following traits:\n·Absorbs <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color> 250% more effectively.\n·When a new Blazing Barrier is obtained, the remaining DMG Absorption of an existing Blazing Barrier will stack and its duration will be refreshed.\n\nThe maximum DMG Absorption of the Blazing Barrier will not exceed a certain percentage of Thoma's Max HP.\n\n<i>As a guest from afar, only the most burning passion would allow one to master the pure and precise spear arts of Inazuma. Thoma's mastery, indeed, is not limited to being the "swiftest-studying student" or "a master of the spear," but he has imbued his will to protect others and fend off foes into his art as well.</i> ｜ 托马以枪尖刺地作为支点，倾注燃焰之力，向前迅猛踢击，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，唤出护体的烈烧佑命护盾，并在施放的瞬间，为托马施加<color=#FF9999FF>火元素附着</color>。\n护盾的伤害吸收量受益于托马的生命值上限。\n烈烧佑命护盾具有如下特性：\n·对<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>有250%的吸收效果；\n·护盾剩余的伤害吸收量在获取新的烈烧佑命护盾时将会叠加，并刷新持续时间。\n\n护盾的伤害吸收量至多不超过托马生命值上限的一定比例。\n\n<i>作为异乡来客，唯有点燃最为炽烈的盛情之火，才能习得精湛且纯粹的稻妻枪术。而托马的成就远远不止于「最速学成出师」与「枪术豪杰」，有着「守护」信念的他，还将御敌的技巧与甲胄的特性融入了自己的枪术之中。</i>
- The sounds of monster activity ring through the valley beyond the Children of Echoes. Teams of warriors are giving their all in deploying defensive works to hold off the imminent impact. There has been no update from this sector for some time. Situation unknown. ｜ 「回声之子」外侧的山谷中传来魔物活动的声音，战士小队正在全力搭建防御工事，以应对即将到来的冲击。消息长期未更新，目前情况不明。
- Wow, we're in trouble now... Best we go back and apologize to Flora... ｜ 这下糟糕了…我们还是回去向芙萝拉小姐道歉吧…
- Anything yet? Anything at all? ｜ 调查到新线索了吗？
- New Entry ｜ 新怪物
- 6-Hit DMG|{param7:F1P}+{param8:F1P} ｜ 六段伤害|{param7:F1P}+{param8:F1P}
- It's "Paimon"! How hard is it to remember one name? ｜ 我已经说腻了，我的名字是「派蒙」啦。
- Pfft, you were having plenty of fun playing the bad guy a moment ago. Now you're trying blame it all on me? ｜ 哇，你刚才演反派演得那么开心，现在反倒怪起我来了？
- Four... It's hiding again. Where has it gone? ｜ 四只…它又躲起来了，躲到哪里去了？
- Yelan, you're here! ｜ 夜兰，原来你在啊！
- She's... well, the only person in all of Mondstadt who'll listen to anything "the evil Fatui uncle" says — other than you, of course. ｜ 除了你之外，整个蒙德城里愿意听我这个「愚人众坏叔叔」说话的，估计也就只有莉莉这孩子了。
- Oh! My origami bird flew further this time! ｜ 嘿，这次是我的折纸鸟飞得更远！
- Collect Sublime Anemograna \nto restore Elemental Energy to characters and increase Elemental Burst DMG. ｜ 拾取「高妙风种子」\n角色的元素能量持续恢复，元素爆发伤害提升
- Joining Party: II ｜ 加入队伍·其二
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- {0}/{1} ｜ {0}/{1}
- Every 4s a character is on the field, they will deal <color=#99FFFFFF>9%</color> more DMG and take <color=#99FFFFFF>2.2%</color> more DMG. This effect has a maximum of 5 stacks and will not be reset if the character leaves the field, but will be reduced by 1 stack when the character takes DMG. ｜ 角色在场上时，每4秒提升<color=#99FFFFFF>9%</color>造成的伤害，<color=#99FFFFFF>2.2%</color>受到的伤害。该效果最多叠加5层，不随角色退场重置，受到伤害后会减少1层效果。
- Prince ｜ 小王子
- Good Evening ｜ 晚上好…
- It's done. I hope I didn't keep you waiting. ｜ 久等了吧，我都搞定了。
- To tell you the truth, you've impressed me quite a bit. If you'd only put your enthusiasm to better use, you'd have bright futures ahead of you. ｜ 说实话，我已经有点佩服你们了。如果把这股劲头用对地方，你们可能会成为相当了不起的人。
- By then, we should be facing the Wenut directly, and hopefully we'll have some sort of clue. ｜ 到时候我们应该会直接面对沙虫，希望能多少研究出一点端倪。
- Begin the Target Balloon challenge ｜ 开始「游靶气球」挑战
- To pay off the damages to the equipment, I took some part-time jobs. I just went to work whenever I couldn't sleep. It took me forever to pay off what I owed. ｜ 不过为了支付损坏设备的罚金，我那段时间睡不着就会去打工，花了很长时间才把摩拉付清。
- A new round of Target Balls is about to appear ｜ 新一轮的标靶球即将出现
- During "Duel! The Summoners' Summit!," reach a score of {param2} in the "Dice Stratagem: IV" challenge in "Heart of the Dice" ｜ 在「决斗！召唤之巅！」活动的「妙骰战法」玩法中，「妙骰应敌·之四」的挑战积分达到{param2}
- Glaze Lily ｜ 琉璃百合
- Detailed Diagnosis, Thorough Treatment ｜ 细致入微的诊疗
- Which means... Oh, thank goodness! It was all a dream after all! Ehehehe, gotta hand it to my imagination, it all felt super real! There were these toy people, but they were alive, and they could talk... ｜ 啊…！太好了！真是太好了！果然昨天发生的都是梦啊，哈哈哈，真是好真实的一场梦呢，梦里积木做的小人还会说话…
- Research Center Emergency Machine Operation Handbook ｜ 研究中心紧急机械操作手册
- If only I had his courage... ｜ 我要是有他这种勇气的话…就好了。
- Well... we've realized that... no one really wants to play with us. ｜ 其实，大家都不愿意和我们玩。
- After he took the Gnosis, we lost all contact with him. Now comes the task of trying to hunt it down and get it back... I actually don't mind it — it means I get to travel all over. Wonder if I'll run into you somewhere along the way? ｜ 他带着「神之心」与我们失去了联络，后面才有了追回那颗心的行动。我倒是不介意去四处走走，说不定还能在哪儿和你偶遇？
- And you don't want your reunion to be a disappointing one, do you? ｜ #「不希望重逢的时候让{MATEAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}失望」，对吧？
- Huh, looks like we're up against tough opposition. Don't give up, Kindlejoy! ｜ 对手有两下子嘛，别气馁哦，「欢腾之火」！
- After the challenge begins, <color=#ffcc33>Thunderstrikes</color> will descend near the active character's position every <color=#ffcc33>{0}</color>s, dealing Electro DMG and applying Engulfing Storm to the character: <color=#ffcc33>drains {2} Energy every {1}s</color> until the inflicted Electro element is removed. ｜ 挑战开始后，每<color=#ffcc33>{0}</color>秒将在当前场上角色的位置附近降下数道<color=#ffcc33>落雷</color>，造成雷元素伤害，并为角色施加「嗜能之雷」：在附着的雷元素消除之前，<color=#ffcc33>每{1}秒流失{2}点元素能量</color>。
- After waiting for a while, Gou San'er comes back, panting for breath. ｜ 等了一会儿之后，狗三儿气喘吁吁地回来了。
- As for the former site of the Institute, we will keep it preserved forever and rebuild it as the Fontaine Research Institute Safety Education Center. ｜ 至于降落下来的科学院旧址，我们会将它永久保存，建设为「枫丹科学院安全研究教育院」。
- Many may view the notion of searching for immortality in poisons and illnesses as a flagrant violation of the natural order. But to me, it is no different from the way our ancestors tested the medicinal qualities of herbs by sampling each and every one. ｜ 穷究百毒百病，以达不死之境…即便在常人看来有悖天理，但于我而言，这跟先人们遍尝百草，克服百病并无区别。
- The countless lights converge into tiny motes, the white glow ascending from the tree's base.\nEventually, the once-dark sky lights up. ｜ 无数的光芒汇聚为极小的光点，白光自树底上升。\n最终，点燃了原本漆黑一片的天空。
- Good, then we are officially introduced. See? Simple as that. ｜ 好，那我们就算正式认识了。你看，多简单的事呀。

As the name suggests, the bark has the feel of coconut palm husks, and is both smooth and aesthetically pleasing once sanded and polished, with exceptional hardness and humidity-resistant qualities...\nCan be used to create furnishings. ｜ 产自「桃椰子树」的木材，正如其名，树皮有着椰子壳般的质感，打磨后光滑而美观，硬度和防潮性能都极为出色…\n可用于制作摆设。
- Eat all you want, you sneaky little thief! I'm going to catch you, if it's the last thing I do! ｜ 喜欢吃就吃个够好了！我就不信逮不到这只讨人厌的坏家伙！
- Nara friend is impressive indeed. Arachanda should try hard to catch up. ｜ 那菈朋友果然厉害，兰阐荼也要努力修行。

- "Eh, since I can't sleep, I might as well continue drawing my star map..."\nTo avoid the obstruction of dense leaves and branches and gain a clear and broad field of view with which to conduct observations, students who study the stars often organize expeditions to the border between the desert and the rainforest, walking along the Wall of Samiel as they look for research material, so much so that it has practically become a regular study trip of sorts.\nAs for the young woman suffering from a chronic lack of sleep, she found it hard to sleep in a quiet room, never mind a tent outdoors.\nBut such observations could also give rise to unexpected surprises. For example, she discovered a special plant after persisting in her star map drawings for one night, finding that its pale white leaves had a unique shape that just so happened to be similar to the distribution of certain stars in the sky. It seemed that her drawing this time had an element of serendipity to it. ｜ 「反正也睡不着，不如就继续绘制星图吧…」\n为了避开茂密枝叶的遮挡，获得广阔而清晰的观测视野，研究星象的学生们时常组织考察行动，来到沙漠和雨林的边界，沿着防沙壁一路宿营，一路求取研究资料，如同一场周期性的学术旅行。\n对于睡眠不足的少女而言，在安静的房间中尚且难以入眠，更不必说野外的帐篷了。\n不过这样的考察行动偶尔也会给少女意外的惊喜。比如某天后半夜坚持绘制星图时，少女发现身边不远处有一株特别的植物，淡白的叶片呈现出别致的形姿，恰巧与天空中某片星辰的分布相仿，似乎是在提示她，这次绘制的星图有着独特巧合的宝贵价值。
- Having met her, I don't believe she was the one. ｜ 见过以后，感觉确实不是她。
- It wasn't any impassioned, encouraging speech, but she motivated me greatly just the same. We haven't kept in contact too much over the years, but I've never forgotten her words. ｜ 虽说不是特别煽情的鼓励，但她确实给了我澎湃的动力。以至于，这些年我没怎么和她打交道，也一直记得她的话。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>{NICKNAME}, have you noticed?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>In Inazuma, people who wear swords on their waists are a minority. Most soldiers use spears.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Could it be that swords are a symbol of status... Should we wear them as well?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But the swords here are all too big for Paimon... There's no other way, we'll have to find a famous swordsmith to make a custom one!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>A custom-made sword will cost a lot of Mora though.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Are you saying that Mora is more important than the desires of your lovely companion?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>...Actually, I've already prepared something for you, Paimon.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Really? Really? Let's have a look!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey! Isn't that the knife we use to cut fruit?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well, at least it's the right size for you...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Ahem, "What matters isn't the value of the sword, it's the fighting spirit."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Nice try, but Paimon won't fall for this, no matter how cool it sounds! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你注意到了吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>在稻妻，只有少数人的腰间有佩刀，大部分的士兵还是用长枪呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说不定刀其实是一种身份的象征…我要不要也带一把呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过这里的刀对我来说都太大了…果然还是去找名家定制一把比较好！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但是定制刀的话，要花不少钱吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>难道摩拉，比可爱同伴的愿望还要重要吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>…其实我早就给派蒙准备好了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真的吗真的吗，快给我看看！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂，这不是我们用来切水果的刀吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>至少大小上很适合派蒙啦…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>咳，「重要的不是刀的价值，而是追求武道的心」。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不要试图用听着很帅的台词糊弄过去！

When opponents with Honed Spirit take hits from attacks that are considered Normal Attack DMG, they will lose 3% Physical and All Elemental RES. A maximum of 30% of each may be lost this way. The RES lost this way will be reset every 20s. ｜ 挑战中存在部分敌人具有「锐气」效果，所有元素抗性与物理抗性提升10%。具有「锐气」效果的敌人受到视为普通攻击伤害的攻击后，所有元素抗性与物理抗性降低3%，至多通过这种方式降低30%。每20秒，通过这种方式降低的抗性将被重置。

- Alright... There you go. ｜ 好，我现在就把地方给您标好了。
- "Bah! The lectures of the sages are beyond boring. Why don't we get ourselves some fine wine garnished with floral honey and set out on a journey across the seven seas?" ｜ 「贤者的说教何其枯燥，不如斟满花酿的美酒，踏上征服七海的航程。」
- A tall, upright plant with interwoven yellow and green leaves, which has earned it the moniker "Smokeleaf." ｜ 挺拔的植株，叶片黄绿相间，有「栌青」的雅称。
- The zone charted by the organizer of the Nilotpala Cup Beast Tamers Tournament. It is believed that the Fungi inhabiting here match up well with Wisdom Orbs. Therefore, even the most basic type of Wisdom Orbs alone should suffice to capture and tame them. ｜ 由「月莲杯」驯兽师大赛主办方划定的区域，据说在此区域内生活的蕈兽与「意智宝珠」有着相当之高的匹配度，因此，只需基本型号的「意智宝珠」就能将它们捕捉并驯化。
- Ah, come now, see what I told you? And look at you — you've grown quite a bit since you left, haven't you? ｜ 瞧瞧，老夫之前说什么来着？比起离开那时，你又长个子了。
- (Come to think of it, I've never seen him smile either...) ｜ （其实我也从没见他笑过…）
- New dish... ｜ 新做的料理…
- Please pick one you like! Just think of it as a symbol of our friendship. I've brought all of my best and shiniest ores, so come on, take one! I'll be really happy if you do! ｜ 来挑一个你喜欢的吧！作为我们是好朋友的证明。我能收集到的最好看、最闪亮的矿石全都在这里啦。如果你愿意选一颗收下的话，我会很开心的！
- They say it's an obligation... But I don't like being with a whole group of adults. It's so boring. ｜ 他们说这是什么「义务」…不过我才不喜欢和一群大人挤在一起，太无聊了。
- So you can also control the Varuna Contraption from other parts of Vana. ｜ 在桓那的别处也能控制法留纳神机。

- You've got a point. ｜ 你说的也有道理。

- And what would a festival be without me? I'll be sure to go have a look, too. ｜ 庆典怎么能少了我呢？我也过去看看。
- You see, the supervisor has approved my transfer request. So, in principle, at least... ｜ 您看，部门主管已经批准了我的调任申请，那么从原则上来说…
- Wait, there's a Spiritway over there. We can ride it back! ｜ 等等，那边有游隙灵道，我们可以坐那个回去！
- Boss once told me that Demoiselle had already been selected as the next target of the serial disappearances case. ｜ 老板曾亲口告诉我，大小姐已经被选为了「少女失踪案」的目标。
- Opponents that are Frozen will regenerate 1% HP per second. ｜ 怪物处于冻结状态下时，每秒恢复1%生命值。
- The Special Security and Surveillance Patrol is just one of the many branches of the Maison Gardiennage. We have a more daring way of doing things, and some in the Maison Gardiennage are under the impression that we don't exactly play by the rules.\nBut, I don't think the way the Special Patrol operates should be influenced by outside forces. The criminals we face aren't your everyday goody-goodies from the Palais Mermonia. When crimes are committed swiftly and without warning, like the sudden downpour of a rainstorm, we have to be able to respond just as fast. ｜ 特巡队是隶属于执律庭的多个执法部门之一。因为我们的行事风格和人员组成都非常大胆，在执律庭某些先生嘴里，我们是「最不守规矩」的部门。\n但是，我认为特巡队的行事准则不应受外界影响。我们要对付的恶徒可不是沫芒宫里的好好先生。如果罪人的违法乱纪来得像暴雨一样突然，那我们也绝不能慢他们半拍。
- Warrior, hear me now! Never stop honing your skills! ｜ 勇士，以后也要坚持磨砺自己！
- This one appears to be the most mischievous among the many forms of Monetoo. Lifting it with a Wind Current created through Nightspirit Graffiti and gently touching it should calm it right down... ｜ 在诸多形态不一的幻写灵中，似乎也是尤其顽皮的一类。用通过灵谜涂鸦创造的风场将之吹起，并轻轻触碰它，就能让它安分下来…
- Heroes' Tea Party ｜ 勇者们的茶会

Perhaps its strength can allow you to cross the boundary between this place and a certain other location... ｜ 刻画有「花羽会」风格纹饰的黑曜石环，是部族与深沉夜晚建立联系所用的古老媒介，或许可以凭借它的力量跨越某处的边界…
- Exactly! I just need to go on a few more adventures... and get a few more wins under my belt... and then I'm sure to be less nervous. ｜ 嗯！只要能再多经历一些冒险…还有…成功的经验，我应该就不会那么容易紧张了。
- Let go of your confusion. Sorrow and hesitation are the enemy of an implacable weapon. ｜ 舍弃困惑吧。带着忧愁和犹豫，可没法成为无情的兵器啊。
- I only serve the Tanit tribe, you know, as our exclusive distributer of goods. All trade and other transactions have to go through Matriarch Babel, and I take a small cut of that. ｜ 我是只为塔尼特人服务的，是部落的商品分配人。所有交易和收益要向芭别尔主母负责，而我从中扣留一点利润。
- "I will invite Sadigua to tell stories of the heroes' mighty deeds, and so shall they be remembered!" ｜ 「所以到时候还会邀请萨迪古亚来给大家讲故事，讲那些英雄们的故事，就这么决定啦！」
- Hmm? A child? Where from? Did some new legionnaire disobey orders and bring their family into the camp again...? ｜ 嗯？孩子？哪里有孩子？该不会是哪个新兵又违反军令，擅自把家属带进了营地…

- Hmm... Y'know, when you put it like that, it does seem that Haniyyah might be the one who needs an eyemask. ｜ 呜呜，好像海妮耶更需要眼罩。

- Anyway, class is canceled tomorrow. Go have fun. ｜ 明天放假，你去玩吧。

- Prank-prone rascals with a slim and agile form.\nThey are named Boot Weasels due to their four limbs, which are covered in dark-colored fur. These creatures are a bit more frightened and cautious than other weasel species, and their tiptoeing movements have only deepened the impression of them as "weasels in boots." As such, all sorts of strange legends circulate around Teyvat concerning these thieving little creatures. \nIt is said that Chubby met Boot Weasels who befriended children. These weasels had received the gift of boots and imitated the movements of the young humans by walking upright on their hind legs. ｜ 身材细长灵巧、钟爱恶作剧的捣蛋鬼。\n因为四肢的深色毛发看似长靴而得名。靴子鼬性情较其他同类更加胆小谨慎，其蹑手蹑脚的动作反过来正加深了「穿靴子的鼬」的印象。因此，提瓦特大陆的居民们多有关于这些贼头贼脑的小动物的奇妙传说。\n据说阿嘟曾见过与孩子们成为朋友的「靴子鼬」，这些鼬鼠当真得到了靴子的赠礼，还模仿孩子们的动作，直立着双足行走，有模有样。
- We drew inspiration from the legendary Akitsu Haz{RUBY#[S]Haneasobi}ura. It took a lot of youkai power to set it up. ｜ 我们是参考传说中的「秋津羽戏」修建的，消耗了许多许多妖力才搭建出来。
- The rain continued to pour down, and the gutters began to swell... ｜ 雨还是哗啦啦地下，原先那小水沟里的水也是越积越多…
- Tasty Volcano Cake! ｜ 「火山蛋糕」，好吃！
- The small village to the west of the Wall of Samiel is the only way to get to the deep part of the Great Red Sand. The people of the desert have been living in harsh conditions for many years. ｜ 防沙壁以西的小村落，也是进入大赤沙海深处的必经之路。沙漠子民们在这里与恶劣的环境艰难共处了不知几许岁月。
- The "treasure" was actually... ｜ 它们其实是…
- They should still be held down by some power despite being scattered, so my guess is that they're nearby. Maybe we just need to look around... ｜ 虽然分散，但是毕竟仍然是受到力量的约束，所以应该就在附近才对，或许需要找找…
- Open Paimon Menu ｜ 打开派蒙界面
- "...By order of Dominus Boethius, exalted Harmost, and in accord with the most sacred, beneficent Symphony of our great Sebastos, the Initium Iani are to be shut from today on. No one enters, and no one leaves..." ｜ 「…依循大调律师波爱修斯之令，依循至尊至圣至善之音律，即日起封锁雅努斯之门，任何人不得随意出入…」
- Still, it's kinda nice to have everyone together like this, so... yay for silver linings. ｜ 不过，大家像现在这样聚在一起，也算是因祸得福吧。
- Iridescent Legacy: Part IV ｜ 镌光的遗记·其四
- *sigh* Oh well... There's no reason to stay if I can't remember the reason for it. I might as well leave and go look around. ｜ 唉，罢了。既然忘记了，那就没有继续留下去的必要，还不如离开这里，出去走走。
- Well, it would be just wonderful if you could let us know! ｜ 能跟我们说一声就再好不过啦！
- Jazari ｜ 加扎里
- My family has pretty good connections with the Yashiro Commission. We work very closely with them. And whenever there's a national event of any sort, the other two Commissions come to us, too. ｜ 我家和社奉行还算有点关系，来往很密切。要是稻妻想举办什么活动，另外两家奉行也会有委托过来。
- Your Grace, we've taken the society members into custody. ｜ 公爵大人，这里的「檐帽会」成员我们已经控制住了。
- You could say that. ｜ 这么说也没错。
- Inagi of the Grand Narukami Shrine told you about the Sacred Sakura Cleansing Ritual, and you also obtained a rather powerful Memento Lens, which can be used to view Earth Kitsune Statues and thus see images of the past. Use this small gadget to find the correct sacred words and obtain the Ward from the Sky Kitsune Statue. ｜ 从鸣神大社的稻城口中，听到了「神樱大祓」的名字，还得到了有些匪夷所思的「留念镜」。通过这个透镜观察「地狐雕像」，似乎可以看见过去的景象。利用这个小物什，找到正确的「言灵」，并从天狐雕像中取得「镇物」吧。
- Time to dig in. ｜ 那我就不客气了…
- So, what is it about? ｜ 唔…这上面画的是什么呢…？

- And uncultured Paimon is here too! ｜ 见识浅薄的派蒙来啦！

- You're not from around here originally? ｜ 你原本不是这里的人？
- Yes. Aravinay understands. You are a Nara full of stories. If you have good stories, let's share. ｜ 嗯。兰随尼明白，你是充满了故事的那菈。如果有好的故事，我们就分享吧。
- Hehe, oh, this is much livelier than my place, but it also isn't quite the bustling hive of activity the wharf is. ｜ 嘿嘿，这里比我家中热闹多啦，但又不像码头一样熙熙攘攘。
- A "big brother" figure must have "cred" with the youngsters. Even Genius Invokation TCG, a leisurely pastime, has become a matter of reputation to be managed as well...\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: You will not use your own deck, but a preset deck named "The Ingenious Uses of Mehrak" instead.</color> ｜ 身为「大哥」般的角色，在年轻人们之间建立威信相当重要。作为消遣的七圣召唤，也成为了一种必须玩好的「脸面」…\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】我方不使用自己的牌组，而是使用预组的牌组「梅赫拉克的巧用」进行挑战。</color>
- If the Dendro Archon were as mighty as the legends claim, I would only need to feed people some mushrooms, and bam, they would be healed. ｜ 如果草神真有这么全能，那我就直接给病人吃点蘑菇，他们就能痊愈了。
- Oh, this is a good one... ｜ 唔，这个地方不错…
- #Huh, really? Y'know, {NICKNAME}, Paimon's suddenly kinda curious as to what that story might be. Why don't we try going back and asking? ｜ #哦？！卡隆老板和那个冒险家？我突然一下就好想知道是什么故事哦，{NICKNAME}，不如我们再去问问看吧？
- Regardless, I have to get to the bottom of th—! ｜ 但无论如何，都要查清…！
- I have a big wish that I've been thinking about for a long time now... ｜ 我有个很重要的愿望要许…
- I think that if you ask the staff at Wanwen Bookhouse, you should be able to find this author. ｜ 我想，问问「万文集舍」的人，应该就能找到这位老师了。
- I once dreamed of becoming one just like you. But that dream is now shattered. ｜ 我也做过这样的梦，想要成为你这样的事物。不过这个梦，刚刚破碎了。
- Security Support ｜ 安全支援
- I don't know why Lulu would have a need for perfume... But I suppose she is growing up. ｜ 虽然不知道璐璐为什么要香膏…不过，那孩子也在长大呢。
- Hahaha! Of course! The process of making poetry is quite clear and easily understood. ｜ 哈哈哈，当然！这诗歌的创作过程清晰明确，十分容易理解。
- Well, that should do it! Phew, Paimon's exhausted! ｜ 这样就可以了！好累。

- I can't say for sure... it's just a guess. ｜ 不能说是知道…只是猜想。

- A common streetlamp seen throughout the Veluriyam Mirage, they are crystal-like luminescent candies hung on the branches. Many guests who came in the past thought that "If candy did grow on trees, that's definitely what it would look like." Over time, the staff themselves accepted this origin story, and passed it on to new guests. It is said that Idyia herself is planning to make candies shaped like the lamps, as a special amusement park dessert. Of course, Idyia and the staff take care to remind visitors, do not touch lit lamps if you don't want to get burned. ｜ 可见于「琉形蜃境」多地的路灯，悬挂在枝梢的灯盏如同晶莹的糖果，在一些曾经游历至此的小客人看来，「长在树上的糖果，肯定就是这个样子」。久而久之，这个源于巧合的可爱故事逐渐被员工们接受，并讲给之后的游客们听。据说，伊迪娅也打算制作这种灯盏外形的糖果，作为乐园中的特色甜品。当然，伊迪娅也有让员工郑重提醒小客人们，千万要注意安全，不要轻易触碰亮着的灯，以防被烫伤。

- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Shuyu's Baffling Beetle Battle Bowl" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「漱玉工奇斗虫大玄境」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- So... just who is the Darknight Hero? ｜ 那么「暗夜英雄」到底是谁呢？
- This seemingly ordinary "bamboo-teal" shrub grows just nicely under specific humidity. It is said that when dried in the sun, it can be used as medicine to relieve dampness and heat. However, the most notable aspect of these plants lies in their speedy growth. As long as they are not pulled up by the roots, they will always regrow into their ideal forms within a few months, much like a green flame bursting forth from the ground. As such, some less popular authors once took it as a symbol of immense vitality and wrote it into their poems and stories. ｜ 看似寻常的灌木，在特定的湿度下呈现出恰到好处的「御纳户色」。据说叶片日晒干燥后可以入药，作为祛除湿热的偏方。但这种植物最特别的地方在于它的生长速度，只要不被连根拔起，它总能在数月之内生长至最佳状态，像是从地底奔涌而出的苍绿火焰，因此，一些冷门作家曾将它当成生命力顽强的典例，写进诗歌与小说之中。
- You can hear the sound of a mechanism in operation somewhere, but it seems to have gotten stuck... ｜ 从不知何处传来了机关运作的响声，但机关似乎卡在了某处…
- Those two from Khaenri'ah have a terrible reputation here in the tribe. All the more reason for my story to be as exciting as possible! ｜ 部族里对于坎瑞亚那两位兄弟的印象可谓是糟糕透顶，所以我一定要说出个足够精彩的故事啊。
- Compact assistance meka developed to increase the overall utilization rates of meka teams, providing aid for underwater projects. They were originally designed to remove junk, vegetation, and other underwater debris in order to prevent these from clogging up the vital parts of other clockwork meka, thereby minimizing failure rates. From another point of view, they are undoubtedly benefiting Fontaine's ecosystem greatly as underwater cleaners.\nEquipped with high-sensitivity sensors, the meka can efficiently "nose out" target items through smells as well as detect the optical characteristics of underwater junk. As a result, they can be attracted by certain types of bait and are occasionally caught by anglers, who refer to them as "Water Maintenance Fish" or "Iron Fish."\nUnder certain conditions, Maintenance Meks will treat the food of some underwater creatures as targets to be cleaned, and thus sometimes find themselves embroiled in conflicts in which they are at a disadvantage due to their small size and lack of power. Over time, an increasing number were being damaged as a result. \nTo protect the previous two models and ensure safe cleaning, researchers utilized existent frameworks and did their best to increase the power density of core structures. In the end, they developed a third model with certain combat capabilities, which was primarily designed to drive away underwater creatures by ramming into them. The new model was rapidly manufactured on the basis of previous processes.\nHowever, the plan to further enhance "Situation Controllers" was suddenly terminated by the Fontaine Research Institute. After all, if these little things were capable of driving ferocious underwater creatures away, then what were all the other underwater meka for? In reality, these "Situation Controllers" were of no real use against the underwater creatures that actually posed a threat to the other meka, and could only deal with common fishes and damage the ecosystem. As a result, researchers had to shut down some of them intentionally and restrict their offensive capabilities. ｜ 为了辅助水下活动的发条机关，提升机队总出勤率而开发的紧凑型辅助机关。最初的设计目的是清除水下的垃圾、植物残渣等杂物，避免它们吸附在发条机关关键部位，从而尽可能降低发条机关的故障率。从另一种角度看，它们无疑也扮演着「水下清洁工」的角色，对枫丹的生态环境有益。\n这种机关搭载了灵敏的传感器，能有效用「嗅觉」寻获目标物，或是发现水下垃圾的光学特征。因此，有时它们也会被一些鱼饵吸引。钓上了这种机关的鱼师则将它们称为「水域维护鱼」或「铁鱼」。\n某些特定情境下，维护机关会将一些水下生物的食物当成垃圾清理，并与水下生物发生冲突，功率较低的小型机关自然占不到上风。久而久之，如此折损的维护机关总量愈发悲观。\n为了保护前两种型号的维护机关，让它们安全地清理水域，研究员们沿用了已有的框架，尽可能提高核心机构的功率密度，开发出了具备一定战斗能力的第三种型号，试图让它们用撞击的方式驱离水下生物，从而为其他维护机关维持一个正常工作的态势，并以原有的生产链快速大量投产。\n然而，研究员们后续加强「态势控制者」的开发计划被枫丹科学院紧急叫停了，毕竟「如果这种小东西都能打跑凶猛的水下生物，那还要原来那些水下机关有什么用！」。事实也证明，这些「态势控制者」根本无法驱赶不利的水下生物，反倒只能「清理」一些普通鱼类，对环境造成严重破坏。因此，研究员们还专门关停了一部分「态势控制者」，并对其攻击行为进行了限制。

- Eh? Wasn't I describing a really happy dream? Why are you both looking at me like that... Wait, could this be an example of the emotion known as "pity"? ｜ 欸？我分明是在讲述一个很开心的梦啊，你们为何都是这副表情。难道说…这就是「同情」？
- So, why do they glow? ｜ 那发光是…

- I anticipated the same, at first. But Lady Guuji Yae found a professional to assist me, saying she appreciated our tireless efforts during the festival period. ｜ 我原本也在为此发愁，但八重宫司大人说是念在我等连日操劳的份上，就找了一位「专业人士」前来帮忙。

- Huh! I had no idea we'd run into you here. An unexpected pleasure. ｜ 哟！没想到会在这种地方遇见各位，真是意外之喜啊。
- When you think about it like that, I suppose all those people at the Lantern Rite were celebrating me, then! The same goes for all the people coming to Wangshu Inn. They must all be here for my blessings, no? ｜ 这么一想，海灯节大家都是来贺我的啊！这望舒客栈这么多人，也都是慕名而来想得到我的好运的吧？
- Time out... Is this one of our normal arguments, or a serious one? ｜ 先暂停。这次打算认真吵架还是随便吵吵？

- So Itto and Shinobu are kinda like you and me. ｜ 一斗和阿忍就像你和我。

- Oh! And have you seen my brother? His name is Li Ding, we were climbing the mountain together. ｜ 对了！你们看见过我兄弟吗？他叫李丁，我们俩是一同上山的。

"In time, cat mothers would tell tales of that shadow to unruly kittens, and these tales would always begin with the sound of lapping tides..."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: Abyss Herald: Wicked Torrents starts with the Talent Card "Surging Undercurrent" equipped. After triggering "Watery Rebirth," they will gain a "Surging Ward."</color> ｜ 「喵。」「久而久之，猫妈妈就会用那道身影的故事来吓唬不听话的小猫，那道身影的故事总是以潮水的声音开始…」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「深渊使徒·激流」初始装备有天赋牌「暗流涌动」；触发「水之新生」后，为自身附属「涌流护罩」。</color>

- I'm glad to hear that. ｜ 嗯，你能这么想就好了。

Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field. ｜ 元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color>。元素战技命中后，角色流失3点元素能量，并在此后的6秒内，每2秒恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>3</color>点元素能量。该效果每10秒至多触发一次，角色处于队伍后台也能触发。

- The current disguises in this Contested Zone are: <color=#FFCC33>wooden basins, vases, and water tanks</color>.\nThe resistance hiding out in the rural villages are holding a training session, such that they may be ready to stand against the keenest hunters in the most perilous circumstances.
