- A scale from which an ominous power radiates. They say that the fell dragon of Simulanka dropped this. ｜ 散发着不祥力量的鳞片，据说系希穆兰卡的邪龙掉落。
- "If we ever should meet again, do tell me once more of the mountain city of stone and the snowstorms of the north. Or perhaps, tell me about dandelions and wine instead. What say you?" ｜ 「等有机会再见面，再为我讲讲岩港的山、北国的风雪，或者蒲公英与酒，如何？」
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- That's right. How did you know? Did you already investigate the matter, or something? ｜ 对对对，老板你怎么知道？你不会已经偷偷调查过吧？
- Wha—! Wouldn't that mean that I would have to join those evil guys? No way. ｜ 什…！那岂不是让我和邪恶组织同流合污…我才不要。
- How did I know it was him? To be honest, I can't know for sure... ｜ 你问为什么我觉得那就是岩王爷？我其实也不是很确定…
- Hmph. Well, no matter. Soon, I will be back in the saddle... no, I shall be on the rise! ｜ 哼，也罢，小爷肯定能咸鱼翻身…呸，是东山再起的！
- She believes that people of similar ages communicate better with one another, and that teaching Grandmaster Hanakado will also help to reinforce my own learning. ｜ 师父觉得，同龄人之间的沟通更轻松，同时，也能让我在教导花角玉将时总结并巩固自己的知识。
- Because if you're gonna play, you should play hard! Paimon was having fun watching from the sides, too! ｜ 因为玩就要玩得尽兴嘛！我在旁边看得也很开心呢！
- So, the time for jolly cooperation has come? ｜ 所以，到合作的时候了吗？
- Okay, let's see about your results, shall we? ｜ 好，让我们看看结果如何！
- "This crane is only to be used in the transportation of goods. Those who are not specialized in its use may not touch it!" ｜ 「本起重机仅供运送物资所用，除专门操作人员外，不得擅自动用！」
- What is this Hyakunin Ikki? ｜ 「百人一揆」是什么来着？
- Hello there. Thanks for bringing Anisa back safe and sound. ｜ 你好，谢谢你把阿妮萨安然无恙地带来。
- Ei ｜ 影
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Even if four of them were to perish, the Ode of Resurrection would still take effect. All you need is for one person to return victorious. ｜ 哪怕战况惨烈，有四个人都牺牲了，但只要剩下那个人凯旋归来，「还魂诗」就能生效。
- In the end, after two months of slogging away, I'd only finished less than five percent of the total... My hands were so sore they felt like they were about to fall off, and my brain had totally crashed... ｜ 结果埋头苦干了两个月，只完成了不到百分之五的工作量…手要画断了，脑子也要转不动了…
- #I believe in you, Knight {NICKNAME}, and in Paimon. You are wise and powerful... and you are also kind people. ｜ #我相信{NICKNAME}骑士和派蒙。我相信你们，你们有很多智慧、很强大的力量。而且，你们都很好。
- Apologies, due to too many people signing up for the seminar, the Akademiya has decided to limit attendance to Amu{RUBY#[S]Biology}rta students and ranger personnel. ｜ 非常抱歉，由于本次讲座报名人数太多，为方便知识管理，经教令院讨论决定，将仅限生论派的同学及巡林工作人员参加，特此公告。
- This warmth... I—It must be... R—Radish Veggie Soup! ｜ 这…这股热气，是萝卜时蔬汤！
- On any other day, I would, but... Something's going on with the tribe, and it's kinda keeping me up at night. ｜ 换平时我肯定答应。今天嘛，先算了，部族里出了点小问题，挺闹心的。
- Meet a mysterious fairy on Erinnyes. ｜ 结识伊黎耶岛上的一位神秘精灵。
- Twenty thousand...! ｜ 两万…！
- Sorry, I wasn't listening. What did you say? ｜ 噢，不好意思，我刚刚没在听。你说什么？
- Ah, right. Then what's an "Apshvaana"? ｜ 啊，也对。那「亚普修那」到底是什么呢…
- That was the principle of the matter, yes... Precisely why we cannot allow such dangerous power to be abused! ｜ 原理上确实是这样…所以才不能允许这种危险的力量被滥用啊！
- Electro Cicin Mage's Memorial Ceremony ｜ 雷萤术士的纪念礼
- Oh! Sorry, sorry, I got carried away. ｜ 啊，糟了！抱歉，光顾着聊自己的事情了。
- I went all out when I was acting as an archon, so why wouldn't I do the same for my own life? ｜ 我扮演「神」的时候都尽心尽力，又有什么理由不认真演绎「自己」的人生呢？
- What about other materials? ｜ 其他材料呢？
- Here's your strip of paper. ｜ 这就是你的纸片儿。
- From your mannerisms, you are not from Byakuyakoku either. ｜ 言行举止，看上去也并非白夜国民。
- Let's see what they wrote. ｜ 我们快看看匿名信的内容吧。
- We'll leave the area below to you. Thanks for doing this. ｜ 那下面的事情就拜托你们啦，我和绿宝会在这里等你们回来。
- So in other words, for the people of Mondstadt, Windblume means dandelion? ｜ 也就是说，蒙德人口中的「风之花」就是蒲公英！
- A Seelie? In the ancient stories, Seelie were a great race with wisdom and beauty beyond the pale of this earth. They traveled with Nara and taught Nara languages and the philosophy of nature. ｜ 仙灵吗。在远古的故事里，仙灵曾是伟大的种族，拥有不属于地上的智慧与美貌。他们与那菈同行，教导那菈语言与自然哲学。
- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- Fetch water from the stepwell ｜ 到达梯井下接水
- Ooh? Why does our little Paimon sound so doting all of a sudden? ｜ 小派蒙的语气，突然变得溺爱了起来…！
- Huh, so people in Sumeru do dream after all. In fact, we're all in one big dream together right now! ｜ 所以说须弥人其实是会做梦的，而且现在我们大家都在梦里…
- Look at the ingenious machinery all around. What a masterpiece of human civilization! ｜ 到处都是精妙的机械，真是人类文明的杰作。
- It's normal for you not to know. After, my father... Anyway, since we're all adventurers trapped in here, how about we work together until we beat that evil dragon? ｜ 你们会不知道也很正常，毕竟那是老爹…总之，既然同为被困在这里的冒险家，在打倒那条恶龙之前，要不要先一起行动呢？
- What do you need Windwheel Aster for? ｜ 你要风车菊干嘛？
- So "Grandpa" walked up to Isak and patted him on the head. He even took Isak to the entrance of the village, where he patiently taught the boy the names of the stars, and accompanied Isak until he fell asleep. ｜ 「爷爷」走到伊萨克身旁抚摸他的脑袋，还带他到村口，教他一颗一颗辨认天上的星星，陪伴他，直到他睡着。
- But, this is just a small send-off. What are we going to do with all this stuff? ｜ 可我们这个出征仪式规模不大，根本用不了这么多东西。
- Pre-determine the color of blocks ｜ 颜色预涂
- ... ｜ ……
- Report back to Xavier ｜ 向泽维尔回报
- Huh? You're saying he used to be a member of the International Trade Association? So he's an outlander, too? ｜ 欸？他以前也是万国商会的会员吗？也就是说他其实也是外国人咯？
- But Aranara are spirits of the forest. So, we can recover and regain our senses by absorbing <color=#00E1FFFF>the power of Dendro</color>. ｜ 但是，兰那罗是草木的精灵。所以，只要吸收<color=#00E1FFFF>草元素的力量</color>，就能恢复、清醒。
- Yay, the show's finally about to start. Ooh, Paimon can hardly wait! Paimon's never seen a real live magic show before! ｜ 终于要来了吗！我还没在现场看过魔术表演呢，真是期待！
- Indeed. Our journey to solve the problem has only just begun... ｜ 是啊，我们解决问题之旅才刚刚开始呢。
- Thou hast done well. 'Tis also most evident that thou dost possess the virtues of a knight. Go, take thy position, and wait for the performance to begin. ｜ 汝做得很好。骑士的美德，汝也已然具备。去吧，就位，等待演出开幕。
- But you're not helping! ｜ 这样才帮不了我！
- DoT|{param8:F1P} ｜ 持续伤害|{param8:F1P}
- Crossfire ｜ 交叉火力
- Go to the "Whispering Isle" and make a wish to the three "goddess" statues ｜ 前往「絮语岛」，向三座「女神」雕像许下心愿
- Opening Treasure Chest: III ｜ 打开宝箱·其三
- Traveler from afar, a foreign merchant once told me of a special type of stone from the desert that holds extraordinary power in store... ｜ 异邦的旅人啊，我曾听外来的行商说，在沙漠之中有一种特殊的辉石，蕴藏了不起的力量…
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param7:F1}/s ｜ 重击体力消耗|每秒{param7:F1}点
- Actually, we didn't really help at all... ｜ 其实没帮上什么忙…
- Sure, then I'll cut to the chase! ｜ 好！那我就进入正题了！
- Leaping Momentum: Phase 1 ｜ 旋跃的趋势·第一阶段
- A balanced combination of seafood. The crab, mint, and Calla Lily come together perfectly to dance on your tongue. It reminds you of playing barefoot by the lake in summer. ｜ 营养均衡的海鲜羹。蟹肉的鲜美在舌尖跃然绽放，配合上清凉的薄荷和嘟嘟莲，仿佛正赤脚在夏天的池边嬉戏。
- (Best not to bother her.) ｜ （还是先不打扰她了。）
- It's said that the destruction of the city was not a deed done from without, but that it fell to revolt from within. That certainly lines up with what we've seen... ｜ 据说这座城塞并非毁灭于外人的入侵，而是因内乱而被废弃。今日一见，果然如此呢…
- End of the Line ｜ 竭泽
- Eide, are you okay? ｜ 埃德，你还好吗？
- Seems like this thing is for switching tracks. Let's bring the cart onto it. ｜ 这个装置好像能把货车送到其他轨道上，我们把货车开上去试试看？
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- Thanks be to the God King. All goes as planned. ｜ 神王保佑，目前一切都在规划之内。
- Why can't I get him out of my mind... ｜ 怎么可以这样花心呢…
- Before I met you, I wasn't close with anyone. There were barely any topics that would ever spark my interest. ｜ 但在认识你之前，我熟悉的人不多，感兴趣的话题也…几乎没有。
- Frozen Duration Reduction ｜ 冻结时间缩短
- You pretentious... Lemarcq, Morgen, Pattyn, let's get them! ｜ 装模作样的杂碎…勒马克、莫尔让、帕坦，跟我上！
- Don't say that. I'm hardly the lucky type myself, so I'm not about to go blaming every little thing that goes wrong on you. ｜ 别这么说。我自己也不是什么运气很好的类型，不会因为一些小意外就把事情都怪到你身上。
- Suspicious Tonkotsu Ramen ｜ 奇怪的兽骨拉面
- I think I can handle things from here. You don't need to stay here if you find it boring. You're here to have a good time, after all. ｜ 我觉得我状态还不错，你们如果觉得有点无聊也不用一直陪着我，毕竟你们是来玩的嘛。
- If we break these Hydro Ambers, we'll be able to soak these monsters to the bone... ｜ 打破这些「水琥珀」，应该就能让魔物都变得湿漉漉的…
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param7:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param7:F1}点
- Plus, if everything goes wrong, your identity as an outlander will help us to... ｜ 就是万一搞砸了，也可以借您异人的身份…
- I've always been like that. I'd be the first to cry when we encountered some hooligans on the streets, but my brother would have me get behind him with a "don't worry, watch me send them flying with my knuckle sandwich!" ｜ 从小我就是这样的，遇到找麻烦的混混我第一个哭，但大哥就会把我挡在后面说，「看大哥把他们一拳打飞！」
- When characters (other than Gorou) within the AoE of Gorou's <color=#FFD780FF>General's War Banner</color> or <color=#FFD780FF>General's Glory</color> deal Geo DMG to opponents, the CD of Gorou's <color=#FFD780FF>Inuzaka All-Round Defense</color> is decreased by 2s.\nThis effect can occur once every 10s. ｜ 处于五郎自己的<color=#FFD780FF>大将旗指物</color>或<color=#FFD780FF>大将威仪</color>领域中的当前场上角色（除了五郎自己）对敌人造成岩元素伤害后，五郎自己的<color=#FFD780FF>犬坂吠吠方圆阵</color>冷却时间减少2秒。\n该效果每10秒至多触发一次。
- Conscription Slate ｜ 征发令石板
- The Sacred Secular what now? What is that? Some manner of oni treasure? ｜ 神鹰大斧？那是什么？是鬼族的宝具吗？
- You know what they say about "idiots and smoke..." ｜ 「笨蛋和烟…」
- The Smiling Send-Off ｜ 微笑着告别
- We now face a common enemy. It's time to put our differences behind us and look to the future. ｜ 大敌当前，我们就不拘泥于那些礼节上的问题，把你我之间的不愉快一笔勾销吧。
- Ematol ｜ 艾玛托
- Our financial situation is nowhere near as dire as you're imagining. And in any case, passing our business woes onto our customers is hardly the solution. ｜ 秋沙钱汤的经营状况远没有两位想象的那么糟糕，再说了，反过来麻烦客人也肯定不适合作为解决问题的手段。
- What was all that horsing around for? ｜ 刚刚在乱跑什么呢？
- ... ｜ …
- "Ah... A sight to behold..." ｜ 「欸…雷光凄美啊…」
- *sigh* It got away, again... Ah! Stranger danger! ｜ 唉……又跑掉了。啊，是陌生人！
- Ah! Sorry, interrupted again, didn't I... Hehe, it's just quite exciting, meeting these three people I've heard so much about. I never imagined I'd get the chance. ｜ 啊！不好意思…嘿嘿，因为我早就听过一些几位的事迹，没想到能见到真人，有点激动。
- Look for a way forward ｜ 寻找前进的通路
- You'll pay for that. ｜ 你不走运。
- Oh, uh... hi... Your flattering words... flatter us. Um, please excuse the sudden... -ness of our visit, for it is most improper etiquette... ｜ 呃，你好…言重了，此番登门，略显唐突，礼数不周，还、还请…
- Well, let's brainstorm a little more about what other resources we can draw on. ｜ 那么，好好地想一想，还有哪些可利用的资源。
- No, no, we just, uh... have a lot of experience with these kinds of jokes. ｜ 不不不，只是我们…呃，有些这方面的经验。
- Ahoy, there. Has your ship sprung a leak? ｜ 嘿，老板，您要修船吗？
- Listen to and solve the troubles of the citizenry ｜ 倾听并解决蒙德居民的烦恼
- Okay... to start with, let's limit the search to inside Guili Plains... ｜ 我想想…搜索范围就暂定在这片「归离原」之内…
- I kept trying to earn your approval, but I only disappointed you over and over. The truth is, I ran away from home as a means to vent my recurring frustrations. ｜ 我一直想得到你的认可，却总是让你失望，我离家出走，其实也只是在发泄这种屡屡受挫的情绪。
- Eight-Hands ｜ 「八只手」
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- It's done! The one and only Sugar-Frosted Slime! Carefully now. Into the box it goes, and dust it over with a bit more powdered sugar... ｜ 做好了！独一无二的糖霜史莱姆！把它小心翼翼地摆进礼盒，点缀一些糖粉…
- They take on various contracts and work all across Sumeru, so they naturally accrue intelligence. ｜ 他们接取各种委托，行走须弥各地，手上自然也有许多情报。
- You might find this hard to imagine, but many people in this world would love a chance to restart their lives. ｜ 你可能想象不到，这世上有多少人想要一个「重启人生」的机会。
- I just wanted to say my apologies to Mr. Callas in person... I should have noticed all of this much sooner. ｜ 我只是想对卡雷斯先生说声抱歉…这一切，我都应该早些注意到的。
- Final Score ｜ 最终得分
- If the clock is accurate, then it is not far off now. Perhaps we shall lay ourselves down to sleep tonight, and the sun shall not rise in the morn. Perhaps the sea shall evaporate tomorrow. ｜ 如果时钟的走时无误，或许距离我们已经不远了。或许今晚睡下后，明天的太阳不会再升起。或许明天大海就会蒸发。
